content: Create a full-page vintage Japanese Super Famicom game box advertisement designed like a worn 1990s magazine spread or game package front, on aged yellowed paper with creases, stains, frayed corners, fold marks, and slight print fading. The layout should feel authentically retro and densely composed, with bold Japanese promotional copy, a fake fantasy RPG logo, a character lineup on the right, a gameplay screenshot on the left, and pricing and feature callouts near the bottom. At the top left, place a large black “SUPER FAMICOM” header with smaller Japanese subtitle text beneath it, and nearby a red Japanese slogan line. At the top right, include a small Super Famicom style logo badge in a black rectangle with the English text “SUPER FAMICOM LICENSED BY NINTENDO” underneath. In the upper center, feature the game title logo “Epic 7 Seven” in ornate fantasy typography, dark teal and black, layered over a circular magical crest or sigil in pale blue. Under the logo, add small Japanese katakana subtitle text. On the right half, show 4 anime fantasy party members in a polished JRPG promotional illustration style: 1 white-haired young male hero in a white cloak and blue-black outfit holding a sword, 1 pink-haired female knight or mage in dark armor with gold trim, 1 tall long-black-haired swordsman in dark layered robes, and 1 blonde twin-tailed maid girl in a black-and-white frilled dress reaching one hand forward. Their faces should be generic and soft-featured, front-facing or three-quarter view, grouped in a heroic composition. Add 4 dark blue nameplates with Japanese character names and short class descriptions near each character. Place a tall vertical yellow Japanese slogan with black outline between the screenshot and the character group. On the left lower-middle, include 1 in-game battle screenshot framed in a dark blue rounded rectangle: a pixel-art dungeon battle scene showing 1 purple dragon monster facing a 4-character party in a stone corridor. At the bottom of the battle screen, show a classic RPG interface with 4 command options in Japanese and a party status list with character names, HP, and MP values. In the lower left, add a red Japanese headline followed by 4 black square bullet points of Japanese feature text. Near the bottom center, place a red circular burst sticker with white Japanese text indicating strong sales, beside a large printed price reading “9,800円” with smaller surrounding Japanese retail text. At the bottom right, include 1 yellow information box labeled “RPG” with additional Japanese text and a separate dark box below for player count reading “1人”. Use a muted retro print palette of cream, dark blue, teal, red, gold, black, and faded pastel character colors. The whole image should resemble a highly convincing fictional Super Famicom advertisement for a classic fantasy RPG titled {argument name="game title" default="Epic 7 Seven"}, with visible Japanese text, nostalgic print imperfections, and authentic 1990s console game marketing design.
title: Retro Super Famicom RPG Ad
description: A faux 1990s Japanese Super Famicom advertisement for a fantasy RPG, useful for recreating nostalgic game box art or magazine promo layouts.

content: A clean editorial magazine cover on an off-white studio background, designed like a premium illustrated automobile magazine. The main headline at the top is huge condensed blue sans-serif text reading {argument name="magazine title" default="AUTO ICON"}, with a small subtitle beneath it reading "THE ILLUSTRATED AUTOMOBILE MAGAZINE". In the top right, place small blue issue text reading {argument name="issue date" default="May 2026"} above a larger blue number line reading "No.128" with a thin underline. The central feature is a beautifully illustrated classic {argument name="car model" default="red Lancia Stratos"}, shown in a front three-quarter view facing left, low and wedge-shaped, bright glossy red paint, black roof spoiler, pop-up headlights raised, detailed vents on the hood, black grille, gold wheels, realistic tires, and subtle reflections and shadows on the floor. To the right of the car stands a slim anime-style {argument name="companion character" default="blue-haired girl"}, full body, facing left toward the car, short muted blue bob haircut with a small tied section in back, minimalist facial detail, white long-sleeve top, pale blue skirt, white socks, blue sneakers, and a blue shoulder bag, posed casually with one arm bent near her chest. Use a refined blend of soft cel-shaded anime illustration and realistic automotive rendering, with lots of negative space and elegant print-layout balance. Add large red Japanese cover text on the left in two lines reading {argument name="main cover line" default="赤いランチア・ストラトス"}, with a smaller blue Japanese subheading beneath it reading "伝説のラリーカーを、イラストで楽しむ。" Add another small blue line reading "特集 / CLASSIC SPORTS" and a handwritten-style light red note saying "with blue-haired girl". At the bottom left, include two blocks of small Japanese cover copy and a realistic barcode with tiny issue digits. Keep the overall aesthetic minimal, sophisticated, airy, and poster-like, with soft daylight shadows and a high-end Japanese magazine cover composition.
title: Illustrated Classic Car Magazine Cover
description: This prompt generates a stylish Japanese-inspired magazine cover featuring a red classic sports car and an anime girl, ideal for editorial poster art or faux publication covers.

content: Create a clean flat vector app logo presentation on a dark UI background. Center a large rounded-rectangle preview card in warm light beige. Inside the card, place a cute minimalist gaming logo: on the left, a stylized handheld game console icon drawn as a rounded rectangular device stacked over 2 visible offset layers like pages or cards, with a small ribbon bookmark hanging from the bottom edge. The console body is coral red with cream screen details, thin dark brown outlines, and tiny dark brown controller symbols: 1 cross-shaped D-pad on the left, 4 small circular buttons on the right, plus 4 tiny decorative dots in the center forming a smiling playful face impression. To the right of the icon, place the lowercase brand wordmark {argument name="brand name" default="gamelist"} in thick rounded geometric sans-serif letters, colored coral red to match the icon. Keep the spacing balanced so the icon and text read as one cohesive modern startup logo. Use a soft, friendly, vector-only aesthetic with no gradients, no photorealism, no texture, and high SVG-friendly simplicity. The palette should be limited to 4 colors: {argument name="primary color" default="coral red"}, cream, dark brown, and warm light beige. Show 4 small vertical thumbnail variations aligned along the right side of the dark interface, each showing the same logo on slightly different light neutral backgrounds. Add subtle UI framing only: a circular gray Edit button at bottom left of the large preview card, a circular gray share/upload button at bottom right of the card, and small monochrome action icons below the card on the dark background. Overall composition should look like a screenshot of an AI image generation result showcasing an app logo concept.
title: Cute Gamelist App Logo Mockup
description: A polished AI-image-style logo preview showing a friendly gaming app wordmark and icon, useful for generating SVG-ready startup branding concepts.

The bottle is centered slightly to the right, made of clear faceted glass with a large transparent crystal stopper, filled with rich amber-gold perfume that glows from within. Tiny condensation droplets cover the glass, adding texture and realism. Dramatic warm lighting from the upper left creates golden highlights, deep reflections on the marble, and a soft luminous bloom in the background. Wisps of elegant smoke curl around the bottle on both sides, enhancing a moody high-end advertisement feel. Dark background, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed studio product photography, luxury beauty campaign aesthetic, crisp focus on the bottle, realistic reflections, warm black-and-gold color palette. Add a small white {argument name="corner logo" default="Pollo.ai"} in the top-right corner. Square composition, premium commercial ad, photorealistic, high contrast, refined and sophisticated.
title: Luxury Amber Perfume Ad
description: A photorealistic luxury perfume advertisement image, ideal for beauty branding, premium product campaigns, and social media promos.

content: A hyper-realistic modern magazine cover for a fictional design magazine titled {argument name="magazine title" default="FORM"}, shot like a premium editorial portrait in a minimalist architect’s studio. The cover uses a clean, restrained European design aesthetic with lots of white space, sharp typography, and warm natural indoor lighting. At the top, place an enormous bold black sans-serif masthead spanning nearly the full width. Beneath the left side of the masthead, add small uppercase text reading “THE MAGAZINE OF DESIGN” and “APRIL 2026”. The main cover line on the left reads {argument name="cover headline" default="The Last Analog Designer"} in large black sans-serif text stacked over multiple lines. Below it, add a smaller teaser paragraph: “In a world of algorithms and automated tools, one designer still believes in pencil, paper, and the power of thought.” In the lower left, include 3 secondary cover lines in small white sans-serif text over the darker desk area: “MILAN PREVIEW” with “What to See in 2026”, “MATERIAL INTELLIGENCE” with “The Next Surface Revolution”, and “STUDIO VISIT” with “Inside the Practice of Space Popular”. In the bottom right, add a realistic white barcode box with small price text above it reading “$8.99 US   $10.99 CAN” and the issue number “04”. The scene shows 1 seated middle-aged male designer at a worktable, wearing a dark navy or black knit sweater, with salt-and-pepper curly hair, leaning forward and sketching on white paper with a pencil. His face is obscured by a square blur block, creating an anonymous portrait. On the desk are exactly 8 visible object groups: scattered sketch papers with geometric chair drawings, 1 pencil cup holding several pencils, 1 rolled white blueprint on the right, 1 closed dark notebook on the left, 1 small brown eraser near the center, 1 blurred black object in the front-left foreground, 1 large flat book or material sample in the front-right foreground, and the active drawing sheet under his hand. Behind him is a warm wooden credenza with neat stacks of books, 1 white dome desk lamp on the far left, and a white wall displaying exactly 4 pinned design references: 1 small dark photo of a chair, 1 light sketch beneath it, and 2 larger minimal line drawings on the right. Use muted neutral tones, off-white walls, walnut wood, black clothing, and a calm contemplative mood. The composition should feel like a believable high-end magazine cover, straight-on and carefully art-directed, with editorial realism and no visible publisher logos other than the fictional masthead.
title: Fictional Design Magazine Cover
description: This prompt generates a realistic editorial magazine cover featuring an anonymous designer in a minimalist studio, ideal for concept art, mock covers, and design-themed visual storytelling.

content: Create a polished Japanese tech advertising banner for a mobile app, widescreen 16:9, with a futuristic blue-to-purple gradient background filled with glowing network lines, connection nodes, soft lens flares, and subtle digital particles. At the top center, place a modern app logo: a cyan hexagon icon with large white letters “SC” and a small circuit symbol inside the C, followed by the brand text “SKILL Cert by AI” in a clean sans-serif font, with “SKILL” large and black, “Cert” below it in black, and “by AI” smaller in cyan. Center the composition around a bold Japanese headline in very large white text with a dark navy outline and soft drop shadow: {argument name="headline text" default="AIが出題する資格バトルアプリ"}. Directly below, add a second line of medium-large white Japanese text with the same outline and shadow: {argument name="subheadline text" default="200以上の資格でオンライン対戦"}. In the middle foreground, place one large glossy rounded rectangular call-to-action button in bright cyan with subtle gradient, bevel, and shadow, containing bold white Japanese text: {argument name="button text" default="今すぐ無料で対戦"}. Show exactly 3 smartphone mockups arranged around the center: 1 on the lower left, tilted slightly right, showing a leaderboard app screen with a line graph at the top, small profile avatars, ranking rows, and Japanese UI labels; 1 large phone on the lower right, tilted slightly left, showing a multiple-choice quiz screen with Japanese question text and radio-button answers plus a cyan bottom button; 1 smaller phone on the far right edge, angled inward, showing a darker dashboard-style screen with charts and Japanese text. Add exactly 4 floating UI graphic clusters in the background: 1 analytics line-chart panel near the upper left, 1 holographic cube/dashboard cluster near the upper right, 1 glowing wireframe brain or neural sphere near the lower left-center behind the button, and 1 hexagon chart/card element near the right-center. Use a sleek AI, SaaS, and edtech marketing aesthetic, high contrast, crisp typography, layered depth, neon glow accents, and premium app-promo lighting.
title: Japanese AI App Promo Banner
description: A futuristic Japanese marketing banner for an AI-powered certification battle app, suitable for app ads, landing pages, and social media promotions.

content:
A polished Japanese fashion magazine cover photographed in a bright, airy outdoor setting with a pale blue sky and softly blurred modern railing in the background, portrait orientation. The masthead is enormous across the top in elegant soft pink serif letters reading "L’Allure", with small Japanese text above it and a bracketed Japanese subtitle at the top right. The issue information appears on the upper left as a large black "5" with smaller stacked text beside and below it indicating May 2026, No.156, and a May 2026 issue line. The cover features two adult East Asian women standing side by side from about mid-thigh upward, posed like a luxury editorial cover. Their faces are intentionally obscured by smooth soft rectangular blur blocks. Lighting is soft, natural, and flattering, with a refined premium magazine aesthetic.

The woman on the left wears a navy blouse with dramatic koi-scale sleeves in navy, white, and silver, styled with a bow or scarf-like neckline, tucked into a long flowing off-white skirt with a wide waistband. She carries 1 fish-shaped handbag: a navy and cream koi-inspired purse with a round eye detail, scale pattern, tail fin silhouette, gold hardware, and a thin chain strap hanging from her hand. Her hair is dark brown to black, loosely tied in a low messy bun with soft strands framing her face. Her pose is elegant and slightly angled, one hand near her chin.

The woman on the right wears a crisp white blouse with a soft bow-tie or vertical ruffle/placket detail at the front, paired with a striking koi-inspired skirt or dress panel featuring 2 main colors, coral pink and deep blue, with layered fish-scale motifs and a circular eye-like ornament at the waist. She holds 1 structured handbag: a rectangular white bag with coral pink koi face paneling, blue accents, gold hardware, top handles, and a shoulder strap. Her dark hair is tied back in a low ponytail. She stands facing slightly left with relaxed hands and a calm editorial expression implied by pose.

The fashion concept is themed around koi streamers and carp motifs, transforming traditional Japanese koinobori imagery into sophisticated contemporary womenswear. The palette is soft sky blue, blush pink, navy, white, cream, and coral red. Fabrics appear smooth, elegant, and lightly flowing, with printed or embroidered scale patterns. The overall mood is graceful, feminine, seasonal, and upscale, balancing tradition with modern fashion.

Add multiple Japanese cover lines in a realistic editorial layout. On the left side, include 4 grouped text blocks: 1 feature header in red and black about moody carp streamer fashion, 1 smaller blue subhead about inheriting traditional beauty with a fresh elegance balance, 1 black text block about basics and updates for women in their twenties, and 1 blue makeup feature line about translucent early-summer makeup. On the right side, include 3 grouped text blocks: 1 red "Cover Story" heading with larger black Japanese headline text beneath, 1 blue text block about conservative style that shines in fresh greenery, and 1 pink boxed reader gift notice with black Japanese text below about luxury brand new bags and accessories. Near the lower left, place 1 circular pink badge with white and cream Japanese text about a special walking guide supplement. Across the lower center, place a large dramatic Japanese main headline in pink and black serif and brush-style type, spanning most of the width.

Design this as a realistic premium women’s fashion magazine cover for {argument name="magazine name" default="L’Allure"}, themed around {argument name="fashion theme" default="koinobori-inspired spring fashion"}, featuring {argument name="issue month" default="May 2026"}. Keep the text predominantly in Japanese, the masthead in large pink serif type, and the composition clean, aspirational, and luxurious.
title: Japanese Koinobori Fashion Magazine Cover
description: A luxury Japanese women's magazine cover featuring two models in koi streamer-inspired outfits, ideal for editorial fashion spreads and mock magazine covers.

content: A fashion magazine cover styled like a luxurious Japanese women's magazine, photographed in soft natural daylight against a pale blue sky with a faint city skyline blurred in the background. The masthead is huge and elegant across the top, reading {argument name="magazine title" default="Lumiére"} in oversized soft pink serif lettering, with small Japanese cover text above and around it, plus a small issue marker on the upper right reading "5", "May 2026", and "No.218". Center the cover on exactly 2 young adult Japanese women standing close together from about thigh-up, facing camera in a poised editorial pose, with their faces intentionally obscured by smooth soft rectangular blur blocks. The woman on the left wears a flowing pale blue dress inspired by koinobori carp streamers: high Mandarin-style collar, sleeveless inner dress, long sheer cape panels draping from the shoulders, elaborate layered metallic and satin fish-scale appliqué across the bodice, a large stylized fish eye motif on the chest, more scale detailing and fin-shaped ornamentation at the hip, and a cinched waist with decorative jeweled clasp. Her dark hair is in an elegant updo with loose wisps, and she wears dangling earrings. The woman on the right wears the same design concept in pale pink and white, also with a high collar, translucent cape-like side panels, layered fish-scale bodice, a visible fish eye motif near the waist sash, soft pleated skirt, tassel ornament at the belt, and matching dangling earrings; her dark hair is also swept into a refined updo with a few loose strands. The overall styling is airy, graceful, feminine, and sophisticated, mixing traditional Japanese elegance with modern couture. Use a pastel palette dominated by baby blue, blush pink, white, and subtle gold trim, with bright but diffused lighting and a premium glossy magazine editorial finish. Include visible Japanese cover lines arranged like a real magazine layout: one left-side block introducing the cover girls, one large main headline block across the lower half, one right-side vertical cluster of smaller teaser text, and exactly 2 pale blue circular callout badges on the right side containing Japanese text; the upper badge advertises a special appendix gift set and includes exactly 2 small product images of pouch-like accessories, and the lower badge contains a shopping-plan checklist with exactly 3 checkbox lines. Add a small pink ribbon-like label above the main headline. The composition should feel clean, aspirational, and seasonally themed around Golden Week and koinobori fashion.
title: Japanese Fashion Cover with Koinobori Dresses
description: This prompt generates a polished Japanese magazine cover featuring two women in pastel carp-streamer-inspired couture, ideal for editorial fashion, seasonal campaigns, or mock magazine designs.

The setting is a photorealistic, natural-style room with the ita-bag placed on a wooden table.

description: A detailed prompt for generating a photorealistic 'ita-bag'—a fan-decorated bag featuring specific anime character elements like badges and plushies—customizable with specific colors and motifs.

content: Generate a photo of {argument name="food" default="steak and dessert"} in the style of a {argument name="style" default="British steakhouse"}. It should look like it was taken with a smartphone and suitable for posting on Instagram. No people. Then, observe the elements appearing in the photo and add meaningful hand-drawn annotations to each element. [Drawing Rules] - Thin hand-drawn lines as if drawn with a white pen - Rough, slightly uneven single-stroke style - Add outlines as if tracing the outer periphery of objects - Use arrows or dashed lines to create visual guidance [Text Rules] - English handwritten text - Short, self-talking comments - Tone is "diary, single word, emotional connection" [Comment Generation Rules] - Drink -> Taste, temperature, mood (e.g., refreshing, gentle sweetness) - Food -> Texture, deliciousness (e.g., moist, best) - Space -> Atmosphere (e.g., relaxed, good time) - Overall -> Single word summary (e.g., too happy~) [Decoration] - Moderately add steam, sparkles, hearts, small emojis, etc. - Do not overdo it, leave "white space" [Finished Style] - Instagram story style, rough magazine note style - Fashionable and relaxed atmosphere
title: Hand-Drawn Annotated Food Diary Style
description: A complex, multi-layered prompt for creating Instagram-style food photography with artistic hand-drawn notes and stickers.

content:
Luxury feminine skincare advertisement, vertical 9:16 composition, ultra-realistic studio beauty product shot with dreamy soft focus and warm golden morning sunlight. Center a single elegant pump bottle serum in the foreground on a fluffy lavender-purple faux fur surface. The bottle is translucent pastel lavender glass with a shiny metallic gold pump and collar, premium glossy reflections, soft shadows, and subtle sparkle in the liquid. The front label reads {argument name="brand name" default="LUMIÈRE"} in gold serif lettering, with smaller text below reading {argument name="product name" default="RADIANCE ELIXIR"}, then “NOURISH • HYDRATE • GLOW” and “FOR SOFT, SMOOTH & GLOWING SKIN,” plus tiny size text at the bottom. Surround the bottle with a luxurious vanity setup: an ornate vintage mirror in the background, 1 ribbed glass candle jar with a lit flame on the lower left, 1 faceted glass perfume bottle with a gold neck on the right, strings of cream pearls draped across the surface, and airy white baby’s breath flowers framing both sides and the lower right foreground. Use a soft beige and blush background with creamy bokeh and a cozy high-end beauty branding mood.

Add cute white and purple hand-drawn doodle elements: exactly 3 heart doodles, 2 sparkle/star doodles, 1 small zigzag doodle, 1 curved arrow pointing toward the bottle, and 2 short accent line clusters above the headline. Add exactly 4 handwritten paper-note stickers with torn edges and taped scrapbook styling: left note says “Self care ♡ Everyday”, upper-right note says “For Soft, Smooth & Glowing Skin.♡”, lower-right note says “Radiant Confident You ♡”, and a purple heart-shaped sticker near the candle says “Glow is my favorite color ♡”. Place large hand-lettered headline text across the upper half reading {argument name="headline text" default="Glowy Skin In A Bottle"} in white brush-script with a soft lavender outline or glow. Beneath it, place a horizontal lavender paint-stroke banner with the subheading {argument name="tagline text" default="Nourish • Hydrate • Glow"} in white handwritten lettering. Clean composition, premium soft feminine branding, Instagram/TikTok-friendly viral beauty ad style, polished editorial product photography, pastel purple and gold color palette, cozy glamorous atmosphere.
title: Luxury Lavender Skincare Ad
description: A premium pastel-purple skincare product advertisement with handwritten overlays and vanity props, ideal for beauty branding and social media promo visuals.

content: Create a vertical luxury skincare advertisement in a soft feminine pastel aesthetic, styled like a viral Instagram or TikTok beauty promo with no app UI. Show a single glass dropper serum bottle centered on a fluffy lavender-purple surface, photographed in ultra-realistic studio lighting with warm golden sunlight streaming from the upper left, soft shadows, glossy reflections, dreamy haze, and creamy bokeh in the background. The bottle label should read {argument name="brand name" default="ELEGANT SKINCARE"} and {argument name="product name" default="SERUM"}, with a pale pink-lilac translucent bottle and shiny rose-gold dropper cap. Surround the product with an elegant feminine vanity setup: 1 gold-framed round tabletop mirror on the left, 1 lit white candle in a glass jar on the right, 1 pearl necklace draped across the lower left foreground, and 4 clusters of white baby's breath flowers placed in the left foreground, left midground near the mirror, right foreground, and far right edge. Add cute hand-drawn doodle decorations in white and purple: curved arrows pointing toward the serum, sparkles, tiny hearts, short accent strokes, and small loops scattered around the composition. Include 2 paper note cards: one left of the bottle saying {argument name="left note text" default="My daily glow secret!"}, and one lower right saying {argument name="right note text" default="Feels amazing!"}; add 1 small round lavender sticker attached to the right note that says "MUST HAVE". Use large handwritten dark-purple headline text at the top reading {argument name="headline text" default="Glowy Skin In A Bottle"}, with a torn white tape-style strip underneath containing {argument name="tagline text" default="Nourish • Hydrate • Glow"}. Add smaller dark-purple copy to the upper right of the bottle reading "For Soft, Smooth & Glowing Skin", and at the bottom center repeat "For Soft, Smooth & Glowing Skin" with "Self care Everyday" beneath it in a lighter soft white tone. Keep the composition clean, premium, cozy, glossy, and highly aesthetic, with the serum as the clear focal point.
title: Pastel Luxury Skincare Ad
description: A soft pastel vertical beauty advertisement featuring a glowing serum bottle in a feminine vanity setup, ideal for skincare branding and social media promotional creatives.

content: Create a vibrant tropical commercial poster for a citrus soda bottle, in a bright summer advertising style. Show a single large plastic bottle of {argument name="product name" default="Soda"} centered slightly to the right, tilted a little left, with a yellow cap and transparent bottle covered in cold condensation droplets, filled with glowing golden-orange soda. The label should feature sliced oranges and citrus artwork with the brand text "{argument name="product name" default="Soda"}", the phrase "aux agrumes d'été", and a small green "500 ml" mark. Use a sunny beach background with vivid blue sky, turquoise ocean, soft clouds, and blurred tropical palm leaves entering from the upper right corner. Add dramatic water splashes around the base of the bottle, scattered clear ice cubes, and 5 visible citrus pieces in the foreground: 2 orange wedges, 1 lime half, 1 grapefruit half, and 1 partial orange slice at the far right edge. Place large French promotional text on the left: a huge white headline "{argument name="headline text" default="Soda"}" with a small splash accent above it, then yellow script text "aux agrumes d'été" underneath. Add a yellow paint-stroke badge at mid-left with the text "LA FRAÎCHEUR QUI PÉTILLE !". Add a vertical feature list on the lower left with 3 round icons and French captions: "SAVEURS NATURELLES", "SANS COLORANTS ARTIFICIELS", and "EXTRA RAFRAÎCHISSANT". Add a green brushstroke banner at the bottom left reading "FORMAT PRATIQUE 500 ml". Add a round beige eco-style seal at the bottom right with green outline and leaf motif, containing the text "{argument name="seal text" default="PLAISIR FRUITÉ À CHAQUE GORGÉE"}". Lighting should be glossy and high-energy with strong sun flare from the upper left, saturated citrus colors, crisp packaging detail, realistic droplets, and polished supermarket-ad realism.
title: Tropical Citrus Soda Ad Poster
description: A bright French-language beverage advertisement showing a chilled citrus soda bottle on a tropical beach, ideal for summer product marketing and packaging mockups.

content: A realistic overhead lifestyle photo of an open lined notebook lying on a dark wooden desk, shot in soft natural indoor light with warm neutral tones. The notebook fills most of the frame and is centered vertically, opened to two pages with neat black handwritten French notes, casual rounded handwriting, slight imperfections, a few doodles, and some crossed-out lines. Show a black ribbon bookmark hanging from the bottom center of the notebook. Include a partial stack of pale books or paper at the top left edge and a partial white mug entering from the top right corner. The pages should look cream-colored with faint horizontal ruling and a subtle center crease. On the left page, write the underlined heading "Plan articles blog" near the top, followed by exactly 6 bullet items: "Écris intro + pourquoi j’ai lancé le blog", "10 idées reçues sur le minimalisme" with the number 10 circled, "Ma routine du matin (version réaliste)", "Témoignages / retours lecteurs", "Outils que j’utilise au quotidien", and one crossed-out line reading "bons plans (liens affiliés)". Lower on the left page, add the underlined subheading "Idées à creuser :" followed by exactly 3 bullet items: "article sur les achats impulsifs", "parler d’argent sans tabou" with a small star doodle nearby, and "digital declutter : par où commencer ?", plus one additional fully crossed-out handwritten line beneath them. At the bottom left, draw a large cloud-shaped outline containing the text "Objectif : publier 2x/mois et rester authentique !" and add a small heart doodle near the lower right corner of the left page. On the right page, write the underlined heading "Routine matin idéale" at the top, then exactly 6 schedule lines: "6h30 : réveil (sans tel !!)", "6h40 : eau citron + respiration", "6h50 : 10 min de lecture", "7h05 : écriture / gratitude", "7h20 : sport / yoga / marche", "7h45 : douche + préparation", and then "8h15 : focus boulot" lower down with a hand-drawn star doodle to its right. Beneath that, add the underlined subheading "Pensées du jour :" and the quote across 3 lines: "La discipline, c’est choisir entre", "ce que tu veux maintenant et", "ce que tu veux vraiment.", with a small heart doodle below. At the bottom right, add the underlined subheading "À ne pas oublier :" followed by exactly 3 bullet items: "appeler la banque", "prendre rdv médecin", and a crossed-out "annuler abo salle (trop cher)". Keep the composition clean, minimal, and believable, like an authentic productivity journal or blog planning notebook photographed casually from above.
title: Open Notebook with French Handwritten Plans
description: This prompt generates a realistic top-down desk photo of an open notebook filled with handwritten French planning notes, ideal for productivity, lifestyle, or blog-themed visuals.

content:
A high-fashion surrealist advertising poster for {argument name="brand" default="Crocs"}. The scene is set in a minimalist, monochrome {argument name="background color" default="light blue"} studio with a semi-reflective floor. 
The central focus is an oversized, giant white Croc clog positioned on its heel at a diagonal angle, serving as a backrest. A fashion model with long dark hair, dressed in a {argument name="clothing" default="clean, all-white coordinated sweatshirt and wide-leg trousers"}, leans her entire back against the giant shoe in a relaxed, leaning posture. She is facing right in profile, looking ahead with a serene expression, and wearing standard-sized white Crocs.
In the background, the word "CROCS" is written in massive, bold, white condensed sans-serif typography, partially occluded by the giant shoe and the model to create a sense of depth. At the  top right, "Designed with ChatGPT"

content: A luxurious editorial fashion portrait of 4 elegant young women posed together in a dark royal-blue baroque interior, styled like a haute couture group photoshoot. The scene is monochromatic in deep sapphire, midnight blue, and silver tones, with heavy velvet drapery, floral arrangements, a classical column, and ornate metallic vessels in the background. All 4 women wear distinct navy and cobalt evening gowns with elaborate embellishment: crystal beading, sequins, embroidered floral appliqué, layered tulle, satin, and sheer lace. The top-left woman has very long black hair and wears a dramatic long-sleeved sheer lace gown with floral embroidery and a fitted corset-like bodice, raising one arm above her head in a regal pose. The top-right woman has long wavy light brown or blonde hair and wears a sleeveless spaghetti-strap satin gown with blue flower appliqués at the bust and waist, seated upright with a poised expression. The bottom-left woman has long straight black hair and wears a structured satin dress with thin straps, jeweled floral ornaments across the bodice and skirt, and a voluminous gathered skirt. The bottom-right woman has long dark hair and wears an off-shoulder sheer glittering gown with translucent embroidered sleeves, leaning forward slightly with one hand near her chin in a soft, contemplative pose. All 4 wear coordinated sapphire gemstone jewelry including earrings, necklaces, and decorative hair accessories. Composition is a tightly framed vertical portrait with layered seated poses, rich fabric pooling across the foreground, soft diffused studio lighting, high detail, glamorous luxury campaign styling, moody shadows, polished skin, and a refined opulent atmosphere.

Photorealistic aerospace engineering, sharp focus on the spacecraft surface, high contrast, epic realism, premium sci-fi documentary style.

The mood is elegant, urban, powerful, and refined, like an upscale fashion magazine cover about after-work style. The woman has long dark hair styled in a thick side braid over one shoulder, a slim sophisticated silhouette, and a poised runway-like stride. Use flattering soft golden-hour lighting, realistic skin and fabric textures, crisp fashion-photography detail on the outfit, and slightly blurred businesspeople in the background walking through the plaza to suggest a busy city evening. The background should include exactly 4 distant office workers, softly out of focus, spread across the walkway. Your best look starts here."; in the lower right, the cover line "EVENING ELEVATED" with the smaller text "From desk to dinner plans— effortless style that transitions beautifully."; and a realistic barcode box at the bottom right with "MAY 2024", US and CAN prices, small issue numbers, and barcode lines. content: A polished high-fashion magazine cover portrait of a beautiful young office woman standing beside a floor-to-ceiling window in a bright modern corporate office, photographed in a refined editorial style. She faces slightly toward the camera with a calm, elegant, confident expression, her face intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur. She has long dark brown hair styled in a thick side braid draped over one shoulder. She wears a fitted ribbed mock-neck knit top in {argument name="top color" default="deep navy blue"} with short sleeves and three gold shoulder buttons on the left side, tucked into a high-waisted black pencil skirt with a slim black belt. Her right hand is raised, holding a folded light-colored cleaning cloth against the glass, suggesting a symbolic lifestyle-fashion scene rather than literal cleaning; her left arm rests naturally by her side. Warm daylight streams in from the window, creating soft highlights on her clothing and skin, subtle reflections on the glass, and a luminous cityscape of tall office buildings outside. The interior background is softly blurred, showing a minimalist office with 1 potted plant, 1 desk, and 1 office chair. Compose the image vertically like a premium magazine cover, full body cropped around mid-calf, with the model centered slightly right to leave room for typography on the left. content:
Create a bold, high-end commercial poster for a premium {argument name="product" default="orange juice"} brand, shot in a hyper-realistic studio environment with a strong emphasis on freshness, precision, and striking visual appeal.

content: Create an elegant luxury travel poster for {argument name="region name" default="NORTHERN EUROPE"}, designed like a premium tourism campaign brochure cover. The main image area is divided into 4 equal vertical scenic panels showing iconic destinations at golden hour with soft glowing skies and cinematic realism. Panel 1: Denmark, Copenhagen, a colorful harbor waterfront with historic buildings, boats, calm reflective water, and a domed landmark in the background; include a small Danish flag above the labels DENMARK and COPENHAGEN. Panel 2: Sweden, Stockholm, a waterfront old-town skyline with church spires and warm sunset light reflected in the water; include a small Swedish flag above the labels SWEDEN and STOCKHOLM. Panel 3: Finland, Helsinki, a small stone castle-like island fortress in blue water under a bright sky; include a small Finnish flag above the labels FINLAND and HELSINKI. Panel 4: Norway, dramatic fjords with steep jagged mountains, a waterfall, and a tiny red-roof coastal village at the water’s edge; include a small Norwegian flag above the labels NORWAY and FJORDS OF NORWAY. Beneath the 4 country panels, add a row of 4 gold line icons with captions, evenly spaced: mountain icon with ICONIC LANDSCAPES, Viking ship icon with RICH HERITAGE, moose icon with WILD NATURE, camera icon with UNFORGETTABLE JOURNEYS. Near the bottom center, place a gold divider and the title A TASTE OF THE NORTH. Under it, show exactly 5 food thumbnail panels in a horizontal strip, each on a plate or bowl with warm appetizing lighting and dark blue framing: 1) Smørrebrød — Denmark, open-faced sandwich topped with shrimp; 2) Köttbullar — Sweden, Swedish meatballs with cream sauce and lingonberries; 3) Gravad lax — Finland, sliced cured salmon in a bowl; 4) Fish soup — Norway, creamy fish soup with herbs and seafood; 5) Kanelbulle — Sweden, a glossy cinnamon bun on a plate. content:
Create a luxurious vintage-style travel poster for {argument name="country name" default="Germany"}, designed like a premium tourism campaign advertisement. Use a grand, symmetrical composition with elegant editorial typography and a refined gold border frame with tiny ornamental corner details. At the top center, place a small gold national emblem above the word “DISCOVER”, then a very large serif title reading {argument name="headline country" default="GERMANY"} in deep navy blue. Under it, add the slogan “LAND OF HISTORY. CULTURE. INSPIRATION.” in gold uppercase, followed by a smaller classic serif tagline reading “Timeless Traditions. Unforgettable Journeys.” with a tiny horizontal accent in the colors black, red, and gold.

Show a majestic panoramic montage of iconic German scenery at golden hour under a softly glowing blue sky with scattered clouds. On the left, feature a fairy-tale white hilltop castle resembling Neuschwanstein, perched above autumn trees. In the center distance, place dramatic alpine mountains. On the right, show a historic European riverside city with dense red-roofed houses, an arched stone bridge crossing the water, a domed cathedral, and a towering Gothic cathedral with twin spires. Add calm river reflections and a small white sightseeing boat at the lower right. The image should feel nostalgic, romantic, and aspirational, with warm sunlight, crisp architectural detail, and rich cinematic color grading.

Along the lower middle, include exactly 5 gold line-art cultural icons with labels beneath them, evenly spaced in a horizontal row: “ICONIC LANDMARKS”, “RICH HERITAGE”, “VIBRANT CULTURE”, “AUTHENTIC TRADITIONS”, and “BREATHTAKING LANDSCAPES”.

At the bottom, create a dark horizontal food showcase strip with the centered heading “SAVOR THE TASTE OF GERMANY” in gold. Inside the strip, include exactly 5 framed food panels, each labeled in white uppercase beneath the image: “BREZEL”, “BRATWURST”, “KARTOFFELSALAT”, “SCHWARZWÄLDER KIRSCHTORTE”, and “GERMAN BEER”. Show each item as an appetizing close-up: a glossy pretzel on a plate, grilled sausages with sauerkraut, creamy potato salad, a slice of Black Forest cake topped with cream and cherry, and a frothy beer mug. Keep the overall design polished, high-end, poster-like, and suitable for a luxury destination campaign.
title: Luxury Germany Travel Poster
description: A refined tourism poster showcasing Germany’s iconic landmarks, cultural highlights, and traditional foods, ideal for destination marketing or editorial travel art.

content: A dynamic close-up concert photo of a {argument name="idol performer" default="young female J-pop idol"} on stage, shot from the audience perspective with a shallow depth of field. She is leaning toward the camera and reaching one hand forward in the foreground, creating dramatic foreshortening, while holding a black handheld microphone with a red accent ring in her other hand near her mouth. She wears a highly detailed red-and-white frilly idol costume: twin-tail dark brown hair with straight bangs, 2 fluffy red pom-pom hair accessories tied with ribbon bows, dangling red earrings, a red choker with lace and a small heart jewel, a cropped lace-trimmed top with 1 oversized satin bow at the chest, off-shoulder frilled sleeves, a corset-style midriff section with red ribbon lacing and small metallic charms, and a layered satin skirt with sparkling bead chains and 1 heart-shaped jeweled ornament at the waist. Her manicure is glossy red with cute white decorative nail art. The lighting is vivid pink and crimson stage lighting, with a glamorous live-idol atmosphere. The background is filled with soft bokeh, LED screens, rigging, and numerous glowing heart shapes and floating heart confetti, creating a dreamy romantic concert scene. Use a photorealistic style with crisp fabric texture, shiny satin highlights, lace detail, concert ambience, slight motion energy, and an overall {argument name="color theme" default="red and pink"} palette. Include a subtle sense of excitement and fan-service stage charisma, like a promotional live-performance shot for a {argument name="theme" default="cute romantic idol concert"}.
title: Red Idol Concert Close-Up

A polished square Japanese digital advertising banner for an AI e-commerce optimization tool, split into 2 main visual zones by a bold diagonal blue divider running from upper center to lower center-left. On the left third, show a realistic nighttime home-office scene with 1 tired young woman sitting at a desk, her face intentionally blurred, resting her head on one hand while looking at an open laptop. Warm desk-lamp lighting illuminates her and the desk, with a mug in the foreground, scattered papers, shelves and a wall clock softly out of focus in the dark background, creating a late-night overwork mood. On the right two-thirds, place a deep blue gradient promotional panel with subtle financial-growth graphics in the background: 1 ascending line chart with arrow and 4 vertical bar-chart columns in a lighter transparent blue near the top right. Fill this panel with bold oversized Japanese headline text in white with strong drop shadow, stacked across 4 lines: {argument name="headline text" default="深夜の
サムネ入れ替え、
もう自動化
できます。"}. Beneath it, add 1 subheadline line in white reading {argument name="subheadline text" default="楽天専用 A/Bテスト自動化ツール"}, accented by a thin cyan underline. Below that, place a horizontal process strip containing 3 white rounded-corner cards connected by 2 cyan right-pointing arrows. Card 1 shows 2 handbag thumbnails side by side labeled exactly 2 items: "サムネA" and "サムネB", with blue and gray percentage badges reading "64.3%" and "35.7%", and a centered "VS" between them. Card 2 shows 1 selected black handbag thumbnail, a small gold crown icon above it, gray checklist lines to the right, and a turquoise confirmation checkmark badge, with a small Japanese heading indicating automatic optimization. Card 3 shows 1 simple analytics chart with axes, several blue bars, 1 pink upward trend line, small Japanese labels for sales and CTR trend, and a pink result figure "+47.2%" at the lower right. At the bottom left, add 1 bright pink rounded promotional badge with bold white Japanese text on 2 lines: {argument name="offer text" default="1週間
無料トライアル"}. At the bottom right, add 1 dark navy rounded logo bar containing a simple white geometric emblem and the brand name {argument name="brand name" default="Easy Creative"} in bold white sans-serif. Use a clean modern SaaS-ad aesthetic, high contrast, crisp typography, glossy UI cards, subtle shadows, and a professional conversion-focused layout sized 1:1.

content: A photorealistic premium magazine cover in the style of an international design and business publication, shot as a sophisticated editorial still life. The cover features a dark, moody interior with shallow depth of field and warm ambient lighting. Center-right, standing upright on a glossy black marble table, is a cream-colored paperback book titled {argument name="book title" default="The Pathless Path"} by {argument name="author name" default="Paul Millerd"}. The book is angled slightly to the left so both the front cover and spine are visible. The cover illustration is minimalist navy-blue line art showing an office interior with an open door leading into a winding outdoor path, framed pictures on the wall, a water cooler, a desk with stacked papers, and a person slumped in an office chair. The author’s name appears near the lower left of the front cover, and the title also runs vertically on the spine. To the left of the book on the marble surface is a small stack of 4 books, softly out of focus, and in the lower-left foreground sits 1 dark coffee cup on a saucer. Behind them is a dim, elegant room with blurred shelving and a soft green plant shape in the background. The magazine masthead dominates the top: {argument name="magazine title" default="MONOCLE"} in very large white serif letters across the width, with small white issue text at top left reading {argument name="issue text" default="MAY 2024 • ISSUE 167"} and small white tagline text at top right reading “THE ENTREPRENEURS’ MAGAZINE”. Beneath the masthead is a thin rule and a category line in small gold serif text with 6 categories separated by dots: “AFFAIRS • BUSINESS • CULTURE • DESIGN • ENTERTAINING • FASHION”. On the left side, large white serif cover headline text reads “Rethinking Success”. Below it is a white serif subheadline about leaving the default path behind and building a life and work that matters, followed by a small gold page number. Further down the left column are 4 editorial teaser blocks, each with a gold circular icon and gold uppercase heading, white descriptive text, and a gold page number. The 4 headings are “ESCAPE THE DEFAULT”, “WORK WITH PURPOSE”, “A NEW STORY”, and a boxed teaser “DESIGN SPECIAL”. At the bottom right is a realistic barcode block with small pricing text above it and a small issue number beside it. The overall layout should feel like a real luxury magazine cover mockup: crisp typography, elegant serif fonts, black, white, cream, and gold palette, glossy reflections on the marble, cinematic shadows, subtle product reflection beneath the book, and high-end editorial photography styling.
title: Luxury Magazine Cover With Featured Book
description: This prompt generates a photorealistic premium magazine cover mockup featuring a prominently displayed nonfiction book in an elegant editorial interior, ideal for publishing, branding, or promotional visuals.

content: A highly realistic studio portrait of a woman in her mid-20s with a naturally fit build, framed from mid-torso up at eye level, standing in a relaxed yet confident pose with squared shoulders and a calm, neutral, self-assured expression. She has thick, long, dark brown to nearly black curly hair with natural volume, loose defined curls, and a slightly off-center part, falling over both shoulders. She wears 2 visible clothing pieces: an olive green fitted crew-neck t-shirt and a light beige casual jacket worn open and slipping off both shoulders for an effortless editorial look. Use a muted neutral palette with earthy tones. Shoot with an 85mm portrait lens at f/2.8, tack-sharp focus on the subject, shallow depth of field, and soft natural background blur. Light the scene with a professional studio setup: a soft front key light, subtle fill to preserve gentle shadow detail, and a faint rim light for separation. Place her against a clean smooth studio backdrop in a soft warm beige-gray neutral gradient with no distractions. Keep skin tones accurate and realistic, color grading natural and balanced, post-processing minimal, and overall styling like a modern editorial fashion portrait in casual streetwear, ultra-detailed, clean, and photorealistic.
title: Editorial Studio Portrait in Olive Tee
description: This prompt generates a clean, photorealistic editorial studio portrait of a casually dressed young woman, ideal for fashion, lifestyle, or portrait comparison renders.

content: A highly realistic studio portrait of a {argument name="subject gender" default="female"} in her mid-20s with a naturally fit build, framed from the chest up at eye level, centered against a smooth warm beige studio backdrop with no distractions. content:
Create a polished Japanese travel agency summer banner ad for Okinawa in a bright, inviting commercial style. Use a wide horizontal layout with a vivid tropical beach scene as the full background: crystal-clear turquoise ocean, white sand shoreline, small green island in the mid distance, deep blue sky with large fluffy white clouds, and palm leaves hanging in from the upper right corner. On the right foreground, place 1 traditional Okinawan shisa lion-dog statue sitting on a stone wall, surrounded by red hibiscus flowers and lush tropical greenery. Near the water, include 1 small glass-bottom sightseeing boat floating close to shore. Add 2 small simple fish doodle icons over the sea.

Make the typography the hero element. Across the left-center to center, place very large Japanese calligraphic headline text reading {argument name="headline text" default="夏の沖縄"}, with a blue gradient and white glow or soft outline, highly legible and elegant. Above it, add a handwritten-style Japanese catchphrase in blue reading {argument name="catchphrase" default="青い海、青い空、心ほどける島時間。"} with a loose underline flourish. Under the main headline, add a smaller Japanese subheading reading {argument name="subheading" default="感動の景色と、あたたかいおもてなしに出会う旅へ。"}.

In the upper left, add a circular summer badge with a sunburst feel, soft cream background, tiny wave lines, a small hibiscus accent, and Japanese text reading "この夏は 沖縄で 最高の思い出を!". Decorate the headline area with 1 pink hibiscus flower on the left and subtle ocean-wave graphic strokes.

Along the lower middle, place 3 rounded white feature cards in a row, partially overlapping the beach scene. Count and depict all 3 cards clearly: the first card shows a sea turtle swimming underwater in a circular photo, with Japanese heading "美しい自然を満喫" and smaller body text about transparent waters and scenic spots; the second card shows a bowl of Okinawa soba in a circular photo, with heading "沖縄グルメを堪能" and smaller body text mentioning 沖縄そば and ゴーヤチャンプルー; the third card shows Shuri Castle in a circular photo, with heading "観光スポットも充実" and smaller body text mentioning 美ら海水族館 and 首里城. Add small coral, shell, hibiscus, and starfish decorations around these cards.

On the right lower-middle, overlap the beach with 1 tilted circular promotional sticker in pale blue and cream, with a small yellow tab on top. The yellow tab says "早めの予約がおトク!" and the main circle says "夏の沖縄ツアー 好評受付中!". Add a white plumeria flower accent near the sticker.

Create a full-width dark blue footer bar across the bottom. On the left side of the footer, place a white travel company logo icon and company name text {argument name="company name" default="〇〇旅行株式会社"}, with a smaller Japanese tagline below. Across the center of the footer, place exactly 3 circular line-icons with short Japanese captions: 1 calendar icon for tour plans, 1 support staff icon for travel assistance, and 1 suitcase icon for comfortable travel help. On the right side of the footer, add a boxed CTA area with Japanese text "詳しくはこちらから" and a mock search field containing {argument name="search text" default="〇〇旅行　沖縄"} plus a search icon. Overall design should feel premium, cheerful, summery, and highly marketable, like a professional Japanese web banner or travel campaign visual.
title: Okinawa Summer Travel Banner
description: A bright Japanese travel-agency promotional banner for Okinawa, suitable for summer tour ads, website hero images, and campaign marketing.

content: A stylized Japanese fashion magazine cover titled MODE TOKYO, designed like a glossy contemporary women's style publication. The composition is a high-angle, dynamic street-fashion anime illustration of 2 girls looking up toward the viewer from beside a brick wall with colorful graffiti and dramatic sunlight. The girl on the right has {argument name="hair color" default="golden blonde"} hair in a lively messy ponytail with loose bangs, bright green eyes, a wide cheerful grin, and a sporty-feminine outfit: a light blue lace-trim camisole or slip-style top, short bottoms, chunky white sneakers, and a black choker. She is posed energetically, leaning forward with one knee bent, giving a confident summer-fashion editorial feel. The girl on the left has long vivid teal-green hair with straight heavy bangs, large blue eyes, and a calm, cool expression. She wears a casual layered street outfit in dark tones with a sleeveless top and sits lower in the frame, angled toward the right girl while gazing upward. Use bold cel-shaded anime rendering with crisp linework, glossy highlights in the hair and eyes, soft skin shading, and a polished commercial illustration finish. The background should combine sunlit urban texture, blurred mural colors in pink, purple, orange, and black, and deep shadows to create contrast. The overall palette mixes hot pink typography, summer sunlight, teal, blonde, and saturated street-art hues. Include dense magazine-cover typography in a premium editorial layout: a giant pink serif masthead reading {argument name="magazine title" default="MODE"} across the top with TOKYO vertically on the left; on the upper right a dark circular or rounded block containing {argument name="issue number" default="06"}, JUNE 2024, vol.218, and cover lines in Japanese; on the left side several smaller Japanese and English fashion blurbs including NEO BASIC STYLE and SPORTY × FEMININE; a pink circular badge on the right with Japanese text and Trend 7; a large hot-pink Japanese headline across the lower left and center reading 私らしく、もっと輝く季節。; elegant white handwritten script diagonally across the lower right reading Shine in my Style; small footer cover lines and hashtags in Japanese; and a small BEAUTY label at bottom right. Make it look exactly like a real high-end Japanese fashion magazine cover, vertical format, full bleed, vibrant, youthful, feminine, sporty, and trendy.
title: Anime Fashion Magazine Cover
description: This prompt generates a polished anime-style Japanese fashion magazine cover with two stylish girls, dense editorial typography, and a vibrant sporty-feminine streetwear aesthetic.

content: A bright futuristic classroom or science museum learning lab filled with school-age children interacting with large mixed-reality holograms, cinematic ultra-detailed photorealism. The scene is a wide-angle interior during warm late-afternoon sunlight, with floor-to-ceiling glass windows, modern tables, bookshelves, digital displays, and a clean high-tech educational atmosphere. About 9 children and 1 adult teacher are spread across the room, actively exploring science exhibits with gestures and touch interactions. In the center, a glowing semi-transparent holographic human heart floats at chest height while 3 children gather around it, reaching toward it in curiosity. Suspended overhead is a large holographic solar system mobile with exactly 9 planets orbiting a bright sun, with luminous orbit trails and a magical scientific visualization style. On the left side, one child interacts with a tall vertical holographic DNA double helix. On the front-left table, there is a circular tabletop hologram of a miniature mountain-and-river ecosystem containing exactly 4 visible animals: an elephant, a deer, a llama or alpaca, and a bear. On the back-left table, there is a circular holographic architectural city model featuring a grand classical domed building and surrounding structures. On the right-front table, there is a large ball-and-stick molecular model made of glowing spheres and rods. In the mid-right and upper-right space, include additional floating science holograms: exactly 2 geometric polyhedra, exactly 2 molecule diagrams, exactly 2 spherical energy or data globes, and 1 hourglass-like abstract hologram. The children should be ethnically diverse, dressed casually, engaged, amazed, collaborative, and looking at different holographic subjects. content: Create a square 1:1 macro photography image of an open antique history book on a clean white background, styled like an edible history pop-up book. The book is thick, vintage, leather-bound, and lying open flat at 180 degrees. Its pages are aged parchment with yellowed paper, worn edges, and visible paper texture. On the left page, show an abundant, slightly messy cocoa harvest spread partially covering the printed text: exactly 5 whole or split cacao pods in deep red-orange and brown tones, 1 wooden bowl filled with cacao nibs, a large scatter of loose cacao beans, broken cacao shells, small piles of nibs, and several glossy green leaves tucked among the ingredients. Everything should feel organic, overflowing, and tactile. On the right page, create a large 3D pop-up sculpture of assorted Swiss chocolate built entirely from chocolate and confectionery materials: exactly 8 visible chocolate bars or bar segments in mixed dark, milk, and white chocolate, arranged in a bouquet-like upright structure with 5 large leaf-shaped cacao or chocolate leaves behind them, curled pale chocolate shavings at the base, scattered cacao crumbs, and a wrapped paper base with a vintage label reading “CHOCOLAT SUISSE” and smaller text “Maison de Qualité”. Beside it, place a tiny 1:35 scale Victorian-era chocolatier gentleman in an apron, actively presenting and adjusting the chocolate display with both hands. Print on the right page in bold black serif text: “Vevey, 1875”. Below that, include a short faded cursive lore paragraph about cacao and Swiss chocolate culture. The paragraph should read: “From the cacao pod’s humble shell emerges a confection of elegance. In Swiss chocolate houses, cacao is refined into a treasured delicacy, shared in salons and homes alike, prized for comfort, celebration, and the craft of sweet invention.” Lighting is soft, warm museum lighting focused at the center of the open book. Mood is educational, whimsical, and richly textural. Emphasize photorealism, shallow depth of field, miniature world aesthetic, premium editorial styling, and extremely high material texture fidelity.
title: Edible History Pop-Up Chocolate Book
description: A photoreal macro editorial image of an antique open book transformed into a whimsical cocoa-and-Swiss-chocolate pop-up scene, ideal for food storytelling, historical campaigns, and premium generative art comparisons.

content:
A clean premium food advertisement poster on a light gray-white studio background, featuring {argument name="fruit name" default="tomatoes"} as the hero subject. In the center, show exactly 7 tomato pieces arranged on a shallow round wooden plate: 5 whole ripe red tomatoes stacked in a natural pyramid, 1 halved tomato standing upright at the front center with glossy flesh and visible seeds, and 1 wedge slice placed at the lower right foreground. The tomatoes are fresh, vivid red, covered with realistic water droplets, with green stems attached to most whole fruits. Add a few green leaves and two small yellow tomato blossoms near the lower right edge for freshness accents. Use soft commercial lighting, gentle shadows, sharp focus, and highly realistic texture, in a polished supermarket-poster style.

Design the layout as a Chinese nutrition and freshness infographic poster. In the upper left, place a large two-line Chinese headline with strong typographic hierarchy: the first line in black reads {argument name="headline line 1" default="自然成熟"}, the second line in large warm red reads {argument name="headline line 2" default="营养美味"}. Below it, add a smaller gray Chinese slogan: {argument name="slogan text" default="每一口都是大自然的馈赠"}. Under the slogan, place exactly 3 simple red line icons in a horizontal row with short Chinese labels and gray sublabels beneath each: 1) a sun icon with text "充足日照" and subtext "自然成熟", 2) a sprout or leaf icon with text "科学种植" and subtext "健康美味", 3) a heart outline icon with text "新鲜采摘" and subtext "产地直供".

On the right side, create a thin curved red guide line framing the tomatoes, with exactly 4 circular nutrient callouts stacked vertically from top to bottom. Each callout is a red or red-orange gradient circle with a white symbol or letter inside, connected to the curve. Use these Chinese labels and explanatory text: 1) top callout with "C" and title "富含维生素C", description "有助于增强免疫力 促进胶原蛋白合成"; 2) second callout with a molecular icon and title "番茄红素", description "强效抗氧化剂 有助于抵御自由基"; 3) third callout with a leaf icon and title "膳食纤维", description "促进肠道蠕动 帮助消化"; 4) bottom callout with "K" and title "钾元素", description "有助于维持 心脏健康".

On the left lower side of the tomatoes, add exactly 2 red text feature callouts with fine red leader lines: the upper one titled "美味多汁" with smaller gray text "果肉饱满，汁水丰富 酸甜可口，回味无穷"; the lower one titled "新鲜采摘" with smaller gray text "人工精选，严格挑选 确保每一颗都新鲜优质".

Across the bottom, place a rounded rectangular nutrition table bar in white with light gray dividers. On the left end, add a solid red rounded label block containing the Chinese title {argument name="table title" default="营养成分表（每100g含量）"}. To its right, show exactly 6 nutrient columns with gray headings and darker values beneath: "能量" "20kcal"; "蛋白质" "0.9g"; "脂肪" "0.2g"; "碳水化合物" "4.2g"; "维生素C" "14mg"; "钾" "179mg". Center a tiny gray footnote below the table: "* 数据来源于《中国食物成分表》". Overall style: elegant Chinese fresh-produce marketing poster, balanced whitespace, red-accented infographic design, realistic product photography blended with clean vector UI elements.

In the back left, add a large blue wall sign reading {argument name="store slogan" default="PLAY HAS NO LIMITS"}. In the mid-background, add 1 vertical red banner with Japanese text reading {argument name="banner text" default="未来は上にある。"}. content: A dreamy pastel pink Japanese mobile game advertisement poster in a vertical smartphone format, kawaii fantasy style, ultra-cute and glossy. The kitten is extremely fluffy and round, with soft glowing fur and a plush-toy feel, lit with warm magical highlights. The entire scene is filled with pink hearts, sparkles, lace details, soft bokeh, and candy-colored decorations, creating a soothing but playful atmosphere. In the background is a pastel pink bedroom or nursery interior with shelves holding exactly 3 stuffed animals: a pink rabbit, a mint-blue cat, and a lavender bear. Add translucent floating soap-bubble circles with white bone-shaped icons inside, small decorative charms, ribbons, and floral ornaments. On the left side, large bold vertical Japanese headline text in glossy bubble lettering reads 「脱出できない」 with smaller vertical text beside it reading 「かわいくて、」, all in bright pink with white glow and thick outline. Near the top inside a white lace-edged circular badge, include Japanese text reading 「もふもふ にゃんこと おへやから脱出？」 with a pink paw print icon beneath it. At the bottom, place a decorative game logo with large rounded Japanese text reading 「もふふミルクと にゃんこ」 and a ribbon banner below reading 「脱出ゲーム」, using pastel teal, cream, and pink colors with a shiny outlined style. Add a small rounded text plaque in the lower left that reads 「癒されるのに、意外とむずかしい…!?」 decorated with tiny flowers and a dangling baby bottle charm. Use a polished promotional key visual look for a cute indie app, highly detailed, soft airbrushed illustration, glossy typography, enchanting, comforting, and irresistibly adorable.

content:
Create a Japanese bishoujo game promotional poster in the style of a premium visual novel box cover and store page composite. The image is split into three vertical areas. The left two-thirds is a dramatic illustrated key visual at sunset: a dreamy spring sky filled with pink and violet clouds, glowing rim light, drifting petals, and a reflective wet road or riverside path. Show 4 anime girls in school uniforms, all with soft emotional expressions and highly detailed hair moving in the wind. The largest girl is centered upper-left, shown from the chest up in profile or three-quarter view, with long dark hair and a small flower hair ornament, looking wistful. A second girl stands at lower-left with very light silver hair and a ribbon accessory, turned slightly away. A third girl is at lower center, smaller, with mauve or reddish-brown hair and a bowed, melancholy pose. A fourth girl is at mid-right, blonde or light brown-haired, facing upward with a hopeful expression. At the very bottom center of the key art, show 2 tiny full-body silhouettes of a boy and girl holding hands in the glowing distance, reflected in the wet ground. Add a white feather near the upper-left and scattered cherry blossom petals throughout. Overlay elegant Japanese title typography in large white brush-like serif lettering near the bottom-left to center: 「{argument name="title text" default="さよならの向こう側で"}」, with a smaller subtitle line beneath it. Along the far left edge, place 3 vertical lines of small Japanese catchphrase text in white. In the bottom-left corner, add 2 stacked black product labels with white text like a PC game package badge, one reading Windows compatible and one reading all ages.

The center is a narrow dark indigo vertical band separating the art from the info panel. On this band, place the game title again vertically in large white Japanese characters, with a smaller vertical tagline beneath it. Keep this band clean and elegant, like the spine of a game box.

The right third is a soft cream-colored information panel with a gentle paper texture. At top-left of this panel, add a bold Japanese heading in brackets: 「【あらすじ】」 followed by several lines of Japanese synopsis text laid out like a visual novel description page. Below that, add a dotted or dashed divider line. Then add a second bracketed heading: 「【特徴】」 with 4 feature bullets, each preceded by a simple icon. The 4 features are: branching choices, full voice support, tearjerking emotional story, and many beautiful CGs. Use small dark blue-gray icons and text. Add another divider line, then a third bracketed heading: 「【プレイヤーへ】」 followed by 2 short lines of Japanese message text.

On the far right side of the cream panel, stack 4 rounded-rectangle screenshot thumbnails vertically, each with thin white borders. Thumbnail 1: the dark-haired heroine by a seaside railing at sunset. Thumbnail 2: a pale-haired heroine with windblown hair against a bright blue ocean. Thumbnail 3: a girl indoors by a sunlit classroom or café window, warm and contemplative. Thumbnail 4: a girl surrounded by cherry blossoms in soft pink light. At the bottom of the cream panel, place a wide rounded lavender feature bar containing 4 large icons with short Japanese labels beneath or beside them: an open book, a microphone, an image/photo symbol, and a branching path/share-like icon. The overall mood should be nostalgic, romantic, cinematic, and emotionally overwhelming, like a high-budget Japanese gal game advertisement from the 2000s to 2010s. Use polished anime illustration, luminous backlighting, rich pastel sunset colors, glossy reflections, detailed typography, and authentic visual novel promo design.
title: Japanese Visual Novel Promo Poster
description: A polished anime-style gal game advertisement poster combining a dramatic key visual with a synopsis panel, feature icons, and stacked screenshot previews for visual novel marketing.

content: A bright, polished Japanese airline promotional poster in anime illustration style, formatted as a full advertising key visual with a wide 4:3 composition. The scene shows an airport tarmac under a vivid blue sky with soft white clouds, sun flare, and a large Japan Airlines passenger aircraft parked behind the character, with the fuselage and tail logo clearly visible. In the foreground stands a cheerful high school girl traveler in a dynamic welcoming pose, one arm stretched toward the viewer as if inviting them to come along. She has long blonde twin-tail hair with soft waves and pink-dyed tips, windblown dramatically, and her face is simplified and unobstructed for a clean commercial illustration. She wears a black school blazer with gold trim, a white dress shirt, a red-and-black ribbon bow, a pleated black skirt with gold hem, thigh-high black socks, and carries a black shoulder bag with a cute round animal charm. Beside her is 1 silver rolling suitcase covered with multiple colorful travel stickers, including a prominent airline-themed sticker. The overall mood is youthful, aspirational, energetic, and travel-forward, blending school life and air travel. Include exactly 2 handwritten-style English phrases in the sky area: "Let's go!" near a doodled white airplane trail at upper right, and no other English handwritten phrase besides the brand text. Recreate the poster layout with exactly 1 airline brand block at top left reading "JAPAN AIRLINES" with a red crane logo, 1 large Japanese headline in brush-style lettering across the upper left reading {argument name="headline text" default="羽ばたけ、未来の私へ！"}, and 1 smaller Japanese subheadline beneath it reading {argument name="subheadline text" default="旅は、きみをもっと強く、もっと自由にする。"}. In the mid-left area, place a large white promotional panel with pink accents for a student discount campaign. This panel contains exactly 1 campaign title block with Japanese text reading {argument name="campaign name" default="JALの学生割引 スカイメイト"}, exactly 1 pink circular badge reading {argument name="discount text" default="最大12% OFF!"}, and exactly 3 bordered icon boxes aligned horizontally underneath. The 3 icon boxes should show: 1 graduation cap icon with Japanese text indicating students can use it, 1 suitcase icon with Japanese text indicating all domestic routes are eligible, and 1 calendar icon with Japanese text indicating same-day reservation changes are allowed. Add additional handwritten-style Japanese copy in smaller sizes around the lower half of the image for an emotional travel-ad feel, plus 1 pink call-to-action banner at the bottom left with a search-bar-like box containing Japanese reservation text. Place 1 circular red JAL logo at the bottom right corner. content:
Genre: {argument name="genre" default="Hamburger"}
Brand Name: {argument name="brand name" default="Kashiko"}

Based on this image, generate a photorealistic poster image with a concept that completely deviates from common sense and does not exist anywhere else in the world.

Don't just make it an extension; leap with the idea to a level where it 'makes sense but the interpretation is insane.'

[Absolute Conditions]
- Photorealistic expression (reproduce textures, atmosphere, and even light particles like a real-life photo)
- All language must be in Japanese

[Exaggerated/Boosted Elements]
■ Font Design
- The characters themselves are objectified or phenomenological
- The font physically interacts with the theme

■ Text Placement
- Ignore normal layouts and place text within the space itself
- Layouts with abnormally strong gaze direction

■ Composition
- Unrealistic perspective, extreme wide angles, distortion, scale destruction
- Clear foreground, middle ground, and background layers with abnormally high information density
- A central element that catches the eye instantly + countless subtle oddities in the details

■ Lighting
- Movie-level cinematic lighting
- Intense backlighting, rim lights, neon, particle light, volume light
- Light itself has meaning (functioning as a guide or emphasis)

■ Catchphrase
- Short, intense Japanese text that makes sense but is hard to fully grasp
- Copy that is slightly off-situation but fits strangely well

[Additional Effects]
- A sense of discomfort where reality and unreality coexist simultaneously
- Parts of the image ignore the laws of physics
- Quality that functions as a professional-level advertisement

Ultimately, make it a poster that is 'understandable yet beyond comprehension' and warrants a second look. If the reference image is a character, apply actions such as wearing, using, or trying to eat the brand. Do not use any real brand logos, company names, or personal names; make it completely original. Verify that no real-world elements are included in the final finish. Suppress noise or balance disruptions caused by excessive detail, maintaining overall visual unity and a sophisticated impression.
title: Hyper-realistic Surreal Poster Design Prompt
description: A detailed prompt for creating a cinematic, photorealistic poster that blends reality with surreal concepts, featuring deep customization for branding and visual elements.

content: A dramatic Japanese boxing match poster in a polished anime illustration style, vertical composition, split straight down the center into warm gold on the left and electric blue on the right. At the very top, huge metallic gold embossed lettering reads {argument name="headline text" default="JUNGLE PREMIUM Vol.7"}, with a bright glow and beveled 3D effect. Directly beneath it, centered white Japanese text reads "世界4団体フェザー級タイトルマッチ". Show 2 male featherweight boxers facing each other in fighting stance inside a boxing ring, both full body, highly muscular, lean, and sharply defined with glossy skin highlights. The left boxer is a blond anime-style young man with short tousled hair, wearing gold boxing gloves, black-and-gold trunks with a white-red accent on one leg, black boxing boots with gold laces, and a thick championship-style waistband patch reading "SEIJI". He stands on the gold side with explosive golden sparks and streaks surrounding him. The right boxer is a black-haired anime-style young man with short spiky hair, wearing bright blue boxing gloves, dark navy-blue trunks, blue boxing boots, white socks, and a waistband patch reading "JUNICHI". He stands on the blue side with swirling blue energy, light trails, and glowing particles. Place a circular championship belt emblem in the center background between them, with ring ropes visible behind, and the words "WORLD CHAMPION" legible on the belt medallion. Add 2 large faded portrait overlays in the background, one behind each boxer: the left background portrait tinted gold and the right background portrait tinted blue. Along the far left side, place bold vertical Japanese calligraphy reading "黄金の閃光" in glowing white-gold. Along the far right side, place bold vertical Japanese calligraphy reading "蒼き鉄拳" in glowing white-blue. At the bottom, feature 2 very large Japanese name blocks: left in gold reading "松浦聖司", right in icy blue-white reading "藤原潤一", with a blazing gold "VS" between them. Beneath that, centered large white date text reads {argument name="event date" default="7月19日(日)"}. At the very bottom, centered gold serif text reads {argument name="venue name" default="SUN BIRTH STADIUM"}. Use extreme contrast, cinematic arena lighting, energetic particle effects, premium sports-event poster design, glossy typography, and a heroic high-stakes championship atmosphere.

content:
A high-end food product photograph of a loaded pizza slice centered against a warm rustic wooden-toned background. The slice features a thick golden crust with a crispy edge, stretchy melted mozzarella cheese with visible pull strands, rich tomato sauce underneath, and toppings including pepperoni slices, black olives, capsicum, and herbs. The textures are highly detailed with glossy melted cheese, slightly oily toppings, and realistic baked crust texture. Soft cinematic lighting creates depth and subtle shadows. Ultra-sharp focus, premium food advertisement style, hyper realistic, 8K.

Create a hyper-realistic exploded vertical infographic composition of a gourmet pizza slice.
Top → Bottom structure:
Melted Cheese Layer (stretchy, glossy mozzarella with pull texture)
→ Toppings Layer (pepperoni, olives, capsicum with natural detail)
→ Herb Seasoning (oregano flakes and spice particles lightly scattered)
→ Tomato Sauce Layer (rich red smooth sauce with slight gloss)
→ Dough Crust Base (thick baked crust with crispy edge texture)
All layers must be perfectly centered, evenly spaced, and aligned vertically. Use a warm rustic background with soft studio lighting and realistic shadows beneath each floating layer. The composition should feel like a premium food campaign combined with a clean infographic layout.
Add clean infographic labels with thin pointer lines using these exact labels:
“Cheese”
“Toppings”
“Seasoning”
“Sauce”
“Crust”

Ultra-detailed food texture, DSLR macro quality, hyper realistic, premium advertisement aesthetic, 8K.
title: Pizza Food Photography and Infographic
description: A set of prompts for generating high-end food product photography and vertical infographics of a gourmet pizza slice.

Her pose is relaxed and natural, sitting on a dark woven outdoor chair with her arms resting down in front of her lap, shoulders soft, body facing forward.
