content: A futuristic luxury skincare product advertisement in a cool icy blue palette, shot as a high-end studio beauty campaign. Center a frosted white pump bottle labeled {argument name="brand name" default="SECURE-IP"} with minimalist navy text reading {argument name="product name" default="IP ADDRESS CLEANSER"}, plus smaller lines "for risk-free connections", "pour des connexions sans risque", and "75 ml / 2.5 fl. oz. - Data Stream Purifier" near the bottom. Place the bottle upright on a glossy wet reflective surface covered with realistic water droplets, with the translucent round cap lying off to the right behind the bottle. Surround the product with floating sharp-edged transparent glass shards and crystal fragments, suspended in midair like shattered ice. Several larger shards act as labeled callout panels: exactly 6 text shards reading "TEXTURE" on the left over a close-up of dewy skin, "SHIELD" in the upper right, "HYDRATION" on the right over a close-up of a blue eye and wet skin, "SECURITY SHIELD" in the lower left over a subtle hexagonal honeycomb pattern, "PROTECT" at bottom left, and "CLEANSE" at lower right. Integrate beauty-image fragments inside some of the shards: one shard shows cheek and lips with luminous skin texture, one shows a female eye with long lashes and water droplets on the skin, and one shows a scientific honeycomb barrier pattern. Add a tall soft rectangular frosted panel hovering behind the pump head in the upper center to create layered depth. Include two iridescent glass spheres on the wet surface, one at the lower left corner and one at the lower right corner. Use bright sparkling highlights, prismatic rainbow refractions, glowing rim light, floating mist, micro-particles, and a crisp 4K cosmetic advertising finish. The composition should feel premium, clean, protective, and cyber-skincare themed, blending hydration science with digital security metaphors.
title: Futuristic Cyber Skincare Product Ad
description: This prompt generates a glossy 4K beauty product advertisement with icy glass shards, skincare callouts, and a cyber-protection aesthetic for premium social or print marketing.

content: A photorealistic top-down product-style photograph of a single luxury tasting menu printed on bright white textured paper and placed on a dark walnut wooden tabletop, with soft warm ambient lighting and gentle natural shadows. The sheet is portrait orientation, slightly rotated clockwise, occupying most of the frame with clean margins around it. The design is an ultra-minimal fine-dining menu with elegant editorial typography, lots of negative space, precise alignment, and a refined black-and-dark-gray ink palette. At the upper left, the restaurant identity appears in 3 stacked lines: a large serif word {argument name="restaurant name" default="Silence"}, below it 2 Chinese characters "沈默", and below that a large serif French line "Le Silence". Under the title is a small location line reading "Ginza, Tokyo B3F". At the upper right is a small date line in French followed by Japanese date text: {argument name="date text" default="22 Avril 2026 • 令和八年四月二十二日"}. The main body is organized into 3 vertical content zones: a left numbered course list, a middle translated course list, and a far-right icon column. The left list contains exactly 9 numbered courses labeled 1 through 9, each with French title and Japanese subtitle and an English ingredient line beneath; the 9 visible course titles are: "Huître de Bretagne, eau de mer", "Daurade de Kyoto, pétale de sakura", "Oursin d’Hokkaidō, consommé d’algue", "Asperge de Nemuro, sauce mousseline", "Homard de Miyako, bisque légère", "Canard de Challans, figue et balsamique", "Boeuf de Kagoshima, truffe noire", "Fromage de chèvre, miel du Japon", and "Agrume, thé vert et gin". The middle list repeats the 9 dishes in a second compact column with French titles and Japanese descriptions. The far-right column contains exactly 9 horizontal icon rows aligned to the courses, each row showing small monochrome hand-drawn ingredient or allergen pictograms; some rows have 2 icons and some 3, for a total of 19 icons overall. Near the lower left is a section titled "Le mot du chef" followed by a short French paragraph in small serif text. Below that is a section titled "Origine des ingrédients / 食材の産地" with a dense 2-row ingredient-origin grid listing exactly 15 numbered origin entries in tiny text. In the lower right quadrant, include a small label "Chef" above a large sweeping handwritten signature reading {argument name="chef name" default="Keiichiro Aoyama"}. Along the very bottom edge is a thin horizontal rule and a centered allergen legend line with exactly 7 small outline icons and labels: shellfish, crustaceans, egg, fish, milk, gluten, sulfites, each labeled in French with Japanese beneath. The overall impression should be high-end Michelin-style menu design, editorial restraint, immaculate spacing, subtle paper grain, sharply legible text hierarchy, and realistic photography rather than a flat scan.
title: Luxury Bilingual Tasting Menu Photo

content: A cinematic nighttime automotive action shot of a futuristic electric sports coupe racing through a modern downtown city, viewed from a low rear three-quarter tracking angle. The car is a sleek {argument name="car brand" default="Audi"} concept vehicle with a glossy {argument name="body color" default="white"} body, black roofline, dark tinted windows, extremely wide rear tires, illuminated rear light bar, and glowing {argument name="rear badge text" default="tron"} branding centered on the back. The rear lower section is partially transparent or open, revealing advanced electric drivetrain and battery hardware with metallic detail and cool blue illumination. Add flowing pale gray and blue side graphics on the doors and rear quarter panels for a concept-car look. The vehicle is driving fast on a wet multi-lane urban expressway, with strong motion blur in the asphalt, lane markings, and surrounding buildings. The background is filled with tall glass office towers at night, hundreds of bright window lights, scattered red aircraft warning lights on rooftops, and streaking traffic lights in the distance. Include reflections along a barrier or wall on the far left edge to emphasize speed and camera motion. Lighting is cool, high-contrast, and moody, with blue-white highlights, glossy reflections on the road, and a premium sci-fi luxury aesthetic. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, long-exposure feel, dynamic tracking shot, sharp focus on the car while the city environment blurs from speed.

The glowing Audi four-ring logo is illuminated in white at the center rear, with a stylized glowing model badge beneath it that reads "tron" in a futuristic font. The car rides on oversized deep-dish black wheels with ultra-wide rear tires, and the tire sidewalls feature bright white Japanese-style lettering around the circumference. Surround the scene with abstract urban bokeh, streaking neon signage, reflections of red, blue, and white city lights across the wet pavement and glossy bodywork. High contrast, cyberpunk atmosphere, realistic automotive photography, dramatic nighttime lighting, ultra-detailed metal textures, cinematic lens, dynamic composition, speed, power, futuristic engineering.

content:
Please create a high-aesthetic, high-completion "Brand Packaging System Display Image" for the brand {argument name="brand name" default="Brand Name"} in the category {argument name="category" default="Product Category"}. This is not a common e-commerce white background shot, nor a single product photo, but a brand proposal-style display showing a 'packaging family' with visual identity system logic and commercial photography texture. The image should reflect the 'unified implementation of a single brand across multiple packaging carriers,' presenting a complete packaging system for a mature consumer brand.

[Aspect Ratio Requirements] The overall composition must be a fixed 4:5 vertical poster. Horizontal compositions or scattered arrangements are prohibited. The layout should follow poster reading logic: breathing space at the top, the main visual focus of the packaging system in the center, and auxiliary packaging, labels, and products at the bottom. The weight should be concentrated and suitable for immediate release as a brand display poster.

[Core Requirements] Automatically match the most reasonable packaging combination based on the [Category] and build a unified visual system around the [Brand Name]. Choose a small but representative number of packaging forms to form a refined system. Prioritize hierarchy, brand unity, and display beauty over quantity. You can include: shopping bags, gift boxes, shipping boxes, long boxes, single item boxes, pouches, sleeves, sample bags, bottles, jars, tubes, spray bottles, pump bottles, labels, stickers, tags, cards, and the actual product itself.

[Category Adaptation] Adapt packaging forms to the [Category]: e.g., paper bags and food containers for Bakery; cups and sleeves for Coffee/Tea; jars and tubes for Beauty/Skincare; candles and cards for Fragrance/Lifestyle; drawer boxes and tags for Fashion/Collectibles. The result must feel category-appropriate and systematic.

[Quantity Control] Control the number of items; do not overcrowd. The scene should be "less is more." Suggest: 1-2 large items, 2-3 medium items, 2-4 small items/labels, and 1-3 actual products. Total visible elements should be between 6-10. Ensure enough white space and clear hierarchy.

[Visual System] All packaging must belong to the same brand system, using the [Brand Name] as the core element. Maintain consistent logo placement, font style, graphics, illustration/pattern systems, and material texture. The style can be minimalist, organic, modern, luxury, or youthful, but must be mature and high-quality.

[Color Mechanism] Avoid fixed combinations. Generate different schemes like Cream White/Caramel Brown, Mist Blue/Warm White, Olive Green/Linen Beige, Chocolate Brown/Ivory, etc. Avoid neon or cheap high-saturation colors. Maintain a sense of high-end restraint.

[Composition] Use a commercial studio setting with a 3/4 top-down or slight perspective view. Arrange in layers: large items in the background, core packaging in the mid-ground, and small items/products in the foreground. At least one product should interact with its packaging (e.g., half-out of a box). Create a balanced triangular or staggered composition.

[Visual Style] High-end commercial photography feel. Clean studio background (white, warm white, light grey). Emphasize material textures (paper folds, box structures, bottle silhouettes, print quality, embossing, matte/cotton/kraft textures). Modern and clean visual language.

[Lighting] Commercial grade lighting. Soft studio light or slight directional natural side light. Use clear but restrained shadows for depth. The light should be transparent and bright, never dark or messy.

[Final Effect] The final image should look like a mature brand's packaging proposal poster or visual landing page, emphasizing vertical poster feel, brand unity, systematic completeness, and commercial photography quality.
title: Professional Brand Packaging System
description: A comprehensive, high-aesthetic prompt for creating a complete brand packaging system display with commercial photography quality.

content: Create a clean, premium Japanese corporate poster for a {argument name="company name" default="Arks"} video production company, in a minimalist editorial layout on an off-white background with lots of negative space. Portrait orientation, A4-like poster proportions. At the very top left, place an oversized bold black sans-serif logotype reading {argument name="company name" default="Arks"}, spanning nearly the full width of the page. In the upper right, add a small stacked brand mark in thin uppercase letters: "VIDEO" on one line, "PRODUCTION" on the next, "COMPANY" on the third, with a small burnt-orange geometric accent nearby. Below the logo, add a vertical burnt-orange bar on the left and a large elegant Japanese headline in black Mincho-style serif: {argument name="headline text" default="4つの領域で、映像を磨く。"}. Directly underneath, add a smaller service line in Japanese with slash separators: "SNS運用 / ショートドラマ / MV制作 / AI映像". The main body is a 2 by 2 grid of exactly 4 service panels with thin light-gray divider lines. Each panel has a large black editorial number and a Japanese label. Panel 1 label: "SNS運用" with the number "01"; image shows a close-up hand holding a smartphone displaying social media analytics, on a desk with charts, a calendar sheet, a pen, and a coffee mug, in warm natural office lighting; caption below in Japanese: "企画・分析・運用を一つの流れで。" Panel 2 label: "ショートドラマ" with the number "02"; image shows exactly 2 Japanese high-school-age students in white shirts standing outdoors on a rooftop or balcony, one female and one male, side-profile composition, muted overcast daylight, cinematic shallow depth of field; caption below: "共感が残る、短編の物語設計。" Panel 3 label: "MV制作" with the number "03"; image shows a moody musician playing electric guitar in a dim studio, backlit by soft haze, with a camera monitor in the foreground showing the same performer; caption below: "アーティストの世界観を、映像で可視化。" Panel 4 label: "AI映像" with the number "04"; image shows a dark professional AI video-generation or image-editing software interface on a monitor, with a cinematic scene of a lone figure standing on rocks under dramatic clouds, plus thumbnail timeline images and side control panels; caption below: "技術を表現へ変える、次世代の映像制作。" At the bottom left, place a small three-line English slogan in uppercase: {argument name="tagline text" default="CREATE.\nCONNECT.\nLEAVE A MARK."} with a small burnt-orange line accent above it. At the bottom right, place the website {argument name="website" default="arks-vp.com"} in small serif text with a short black horizontal line beside it. Use a refined mix of bold modern sans-serif for the large logo and numbers, and elegant Japanese serif for headlines and labels. Color palette: black, charcoal, warm off-white, light gray rules, and restrained burnt-orange accents. The overall feel should be realistic, polished, contemporary, Japanese editorial advertising design, with accurate Japanese typography and natural image tones.

description: A minimalist Japanese corporate promo poster showcasing four video production services, suitable for agency branding, service overviews, and recruitment or PR materials.

content:
Create a cinematic commercial storyboard sheet.

LAYOUT:
- Fixed 6-panel grid (2x3), evenly spaced
- Clean white or neutral background
- Each panel clearly separated, no UI, no clutter

GLOBAL STYLE:
- Cinematic realism, high-end commercial look
- Soft controlled lighting, consistent across all panels
- No character or environment drift

STORY ARC (strict order):
1. Setup
2. Tension
3. Product reveal
4. Product interaction
5. Transformation (impact)
6. Clean closing shot

SCENE CONCEPT:
{argument name="story concept" default="A woman lives in a quiet apartment with a tense, unpredictable tiger. The tiger behaves like a domestic cat but carries constant danger. When she serves the product (cat food), the tiger visibly relaxes and transforms into a calm domestic house cat."}

PANEL REQUIREMENTS (for EACH panel include):
- Cinematic frame (clear composition, subject readable)
- Shot / Action (focused on character + product when applicable)
- Camera (shot type, angle, movement)

PRODUCT RULES:
- Product must be sharp, readable, and well-lit in panels 3, 4, 6
- No distortion, no redesign
- Packaging must remain consistent

VISUAL PRIORITIES:
- Strong contrast between tension (tiger) and relief (cat)
- Clear readability in every frame
- No abstract or surreal distortion, grounded realism

TEXT:
- Minimal, small, professional labels only (panel number + short shot note)
- No extra graphics
title: Commercial Ad Storyboard Layout
description: A highly structured prompt for generating a six-panel commercial storyboard layout with consistent characters and a narrative progression.

content:
Create a premium Japanese figure advertisement poster on a clean off-white background with subtle pale gray brushstroke textures and tiny scattered gold flecks. The layout should look like a luxury hobby product introduction page for an original anime/mecha statue. The main centerpiece is a highly detailed 1/7 scale-style figure of {argument name="character name" default="Samurai Mecha Girl"}, a slim teenage anime girl in a dramatic crouching attack pose, turned three-quarters to the viewer, with one knee bent under her body and the other mechanical leg planted forward. She raises a katana overhead with both hands as if about to strike. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft square blur block. She has long brown hair with loose strands flying outward, a white headband with a small mechanical side ornament, and a navy Japanese sailor school uniform with a cropped long-sleeve top, red neckerchief, short pleated skirt, and exposed midriff. Her arms and legs are mostly robotic: metallic silver-gray mechanical arms with articulated fingers and visible joints, bulky armored mech thighs and calves with realistic pistons, seams, weathering, and small orange caution markings. The sword is a polished katana with a white-and-black wrapped handle and a metallic guard. Render the statue as a realistic painted collectible figure with studio lighting, glossy and matte material contrast, precise shadows, and showroom-grade product photography.

Design the page like a commercial figure brochure with exactly 5 numbered detail callout sections. On the left side, stack 4 rectangular close-up panels vertically, each with a number and Japanese label plus short descriptive body text in Japanese: panel 1 shows a close-up of the face and hair, labeled "01 表情"; panel 2 shows the upper torso and uniform, labeled "02 上半身"; panel 3 shows the raised mechanical arms and sword grip, labeled "03 メカアーム&ソード"; panel 4 shows the mechanical legs, labeled "04 メカレッグ". At the bottom right, add a wider rectangular panel labeled "05 武装・ディテール" showing exactly 2 katana close-up views arranged horizontally, one above the other. Keep all panel images bordered lightly and integrated into the poster layout.

At the upper left, place a large expressive brush-calligraphy title reading {argument name="main title" default="Samurai Mecha Girl"}, with an ink-brush circle motif behind the first word. At the upper right, add a gold minimalist logo and the brand name {argument name="brand name" default="TENNEN"}, with small Japanese tagline text beneath it. Along the right side, place a vertical Japanese promotional slogan in elegant dark text. In the lower left area, include small product specification text in Japanese with exactly these lines of product info styling: scale, product name, sculptor credit, paint credit, brand, and a release date line. Use {argument name="release date" default="2025年12月"} in the schedule area. Along the bottom, add a dark horizontal footer bar with the gold brand logo on the left, the brand name repeated, a short Japanese brand statement in small text across the center, and tiny legal/disclaimer text at the far right. Overall style: high-end Japanese figure marketing sheet, refined editorial composition, realistic collectible statue photography, elegant white-and-gold packaging aesthetic, anime girl fused with hard-surface mecha design, polished and premium.
title: Samurai Mecha Girl Figure Poster
description: A luxury Japanese-style product poster for an original anime mecha-girl figure, ideal for mock collectible figure ads and hobby brand presentation layouts.

content:
Create a premium Japanese plastic model kit product-poster layout on a clean white studio background with subtle gray gradients and a glossy floor reflection. The main subject is a highly detailed anime mecha schoolgirl figure posed dynamically in the center-left, in a wide combat stance, holding a katana horizontally across the frame with one robotic hand gripping the hilt and the other making a peace sign near her face. The character has a blurred face area, short dark navy-blue hair in a tousled bob with small side strands, and gold horn-like mechanical hair ornaments. Her outfit is a fusion of a Japanese high school sailor uniform and hard-surface sci-fi armor: white armored torso with mechanical panel lines, a red sailor neckerchief, a pleated navy skirt, bulky white armored thighs and shins, red and blue accent parts, gold circular joint details, a dark blue waist ribbon or back cloth, and red mechanical backpack-like attachments at the hips and lower back. The katana has a dark blade and a blue-and-gold wrapped handle. Render the figure like a professionally photographed collectible model or action plastic kit, with sharp material definition, realistic molded plastic surfaces, slight satin sheen, and commercial product-shot lighting.

Design the page as a figure advertisement/spec sheet with exactly 1 large hero image and 5 smaller detail panels stacked vertically on the right. The 5 right-side panels must show: 1) close-up of the head and hair ornaments, 2) upper-body torso detail with sailor scarf and chest armor, 3) weapon and articulated hand close-up with the sword near the face, 4) waist attachment and skirt/hip armor detail, 5) leg detail close-up showing joints and armor construction. Include thin blue divider accents around the right-side panel area.

At the top left, place a large Japanese title in bold serif-like characters reading "女子甲生", with the middle character in dark red and the others in dark navy. Beneath it, add a smaller Japanese subtitle line: "— メカ × 少女 × 青春 —". On the upper right, place a sleek logo and brand name reading "{argument name="brand name" default="TENNEN"}" with small Japanese text beneath it. Add a vertical Japanese slogan block on the left side of the hero figure reading "鋼に咲く、乙女の意志。" with the middle phrase in red. Add Japanese captions beneath each of the 5 right-side detail panels: "表情造形", "上半身ディテール", "武装・可動手", "腰部アタッチメント", "脚部ディテール". In the lower left, include a boxed scale label reading "{argument name="scale label" default="1/12 SCALE"}" and nearby English product text reading "FULL ACTION PLASTIC MODEL KIT". Add two small bullet lines in Japanese beneath that: "◆ 塗装済み髪パーツ付属" and "◆ マーキングデカール付属". Across the bottom, add a dark navy footer band with the brand logo and "{argument name="footer brand" default="TENNEN"}" centered, plus small Japanese text below.

Use a polished modern hobby-brand aesthetic, Japanese mecha-girl collectible packaging design, minimal white negative space, crisp typography, balanced editorial layout, and realistic studio-photo rendering of a non-existent original figure. Color palette: white, navy blue, dark blue, red, gray, black, and metallic gold. Aspect ratio 3:4.

content: A photorealistic close-up tabletop scene showing a large mound of uncooked long-grain white rice poured onto a warm brown wooden surface, filling almost the entire frame. The camera is slightly elevated and angled toward the pile so the rice forms a broad dome centered in the image, with thousands of individual grains sharply visible and softly lit by warm indoor lighting. Hide a tiny easter egg in the rice: exactly 1 unusual rice grain near the lower-left area is rotated horizontally and has the text "{argument name="engraved text" default="GPT Image 2"}" neatly engraved on its surface in small legible letters. Add a circular magnified callout in the bottom-left corner with a bright red outline, zooming in on that single engraved grain among surrounding rice grains so the text becomes readable. Also add exactly 1 small picture-in-picture inset in the bottom-right corner showing a casual indoor livestream or interview setting with 4 seated people around a round wooden table and an open laptop, warm ambient lighting, and faces slightly indistinct; the inset should feel like a secondary contextual thumbnail, much smaller than the main rice image. Prioritize realistic texture, convincing macro detail, natural shadows, subtle ivory color variation in the rice, and clear but believable engraved text on the highlighted grain.
title: Hidden Engraved Rice Grain
description: This prompt generates a realistic close-up of a pile of rice with one engraved grain highlighted by a magnified callout, useful for easter-egg visuals or AI demo imagery.

content: A Japanese listing-ad style landing page hero banner for a fictional law office and tax accountant office, designed like a bold web advertisement with four equal vertical panels across the top and a strong call-to-action area across the bottom. Panel 3 is green and labeled 「相続税」 at the top, showing an elderly couple seated at a table consulting with a suited professional, with papers and a small house model visible; the bottom green caption reads 「税相続対策をしっかりサポート！」 in large bold white Japanese text. Panel 4 is orange and labeled 「離婚問題」 at the top, showing a distressed woman sitting indoors with her head resting on one hand; the bottom orange caption reads 「慰謝料・親権の悩みを解決！」 in large bold white Japanese text. Make the four panels touch edge-to-edge with clean white dividers, each panel occupying the same width, and use highly saturated primary colors with glossy ad-design styling. Beneath the four panels, create a cream or light beige background footer area. On the left side, place a smaller black subheadline in Japanese: 「法律相談・税務相談なら」. Centered below it, place the large main office name in metallic gold gradient bold Japanese lettering with a slight bevel effect: 「{argument name="office name" default="〇〇法律事務所・税理士事務所"}」. On the lower right, place a large glossy red rounded rectangular button with a bright gradient and white bold Japanese text reading 「{argument name="button text" default="無料相談受付中！"}」. content: Create a clean, premium Japanese landing page hero image for a fictional tax accountant office specializing in inheritance tax consultation. The design should look like a modern listing-ad LP first view, wide desktop format, with a soft ivory and warm white background, muted sage green and gold accent colors, elegant serif Japanese typography for the headline, and a calm trustworthy atmosphere. On the left upper area, place a refined circular logo with a thin gold ring, a large serif letter C, and a small botanical line illustration, followed by the office name 税理士事務所 {argument name="office name" default="C"} and the English subtitle TAX ACCOUNTANT OFFICE {argument name="office name" default="C"}. In the top right, add a rounded white contact bar split into 2 blocks: a phone block with a green circular phone icon, the small text 初回相談無料・土日祝も対応, and the large number {argument name="phone number" default="0120-987-654"}; and a mail block with a gold circular mail icon and the text メールでのお問い合わせ 24時間受付中. The main headline on the left should be large Japanese text reading 相続の不安に、安心という答えを。, with the key phrase 安心という答えを。 in sage green. Beneath it, add a supporting sentence in smaller Japanese text: 相続税の申告・節税対策を、経験豊富な税理士がご家族の想いに寄り添い、丁寧にサポートします。 Below that, place 3 rounded rectangular feature cards in a row with pale backgrounds and green line icons: card 1 shows a document icon and the text 相続税申告実績 1,000件以上 with a tiny note ※累計実績; card 2 shows a bar chart icon and the text 節税対策のご提案で 税負担を軽減 with a tiny note ※状況により効果は異なります; card 3 shows a group icon and the text 初回相談 無料 with a tiny note 安心の明朗会計. On the right half, show a bright consultation scene photo-style image: 3 Japanese adults around a desk in a sunlit office with greenery in the background, consisting of 1 male advisor in a navy suit seen from behind on the right, and 2 clients facing him, a middle-aged man in a light beige jacket and a woman in a white blouse. Place an open laptop on the table. Their expressions should feel calm and attentive. Overlay a pale circular badge near the lower right of the photo with delicate leaf decoration and the text 安心の 相続専門サポート わかりやすいご説明ではじめての方も安心. Across the lower middle, add a slim consultation invitation line reading 相続に関するお悩み、まずはお気軽にご相談ください, framed by diagonal slash marks. Under it, place 4 rounded category tabs in a row: 相続税の申告, 生前対策・節税, 遺産分割サポート, 二次相続対策. At the bottom right, add a large green rounded contact CTA area split into 2 main columns: the left column with a white phone icon, the small text お電話でのお問い合わせ（フリーダイヤル）, the large number {argument name="phone number" default="0120-987-654"}, and the small line 受付時間 9:00〜18:00（土日祝対応可）; the right column with a white mail icon, the text メールでのお問い合わせ 24時間受付中, and a rounded white button reading ご相談はこちらから. Along the very bottom, create a white reassurance strip with 3 horizontally arranged items separated by thin vertical dividers: 1) shield icon and 秘密厳守・プライバシー保護を徹底, 2) clipboard icon and 明朗会計・事前お見積りで安心, 3) handshake icon and 相続の専門家がワンストップで対応. Use subtle shadows, rounded corners, soft natural light, polished commercial web design, and a highly believable Japanese legal-tax service advertisement aesthetic.
title: Japanese Inheritance Tax LP Hero
description: A polished Japanese landing page hero for a fictional inheritance tax accountant office, suitable for legal and tax service advertising mockups.

content: Create a polished Japanese landing-page hero banner for a fictional combined law firm and tax accountant office, with a clean corporate style, high trust, soft daylight, and a white background with faint modern city buildings on the far right. Card 3 is for inheritance tax, with a circular icon showing a house at the top, a warm gold color scheme, the title "相続税", supporting copy "円満な相続と、最適な税務対策をサポート", a tabletop scene with a model house, papers, and a calculator, and a mustard-gold bottom band listing exactly 2 bullet lines: "相続税の申告・節税対策" and "生前対策・事業承継支援". Card 4 is for divorce, with a circular icon showing a broken heart at the top, a rose-pink color scheme, the title "離婚", supporting copy "あなたの未来のために、納得できる解決を目指します", a soft professional consultation scene with a woman in a white blouse resting her hand near her chin while speaking across a desk, and a dusty-rose bottom band listing exactly 2 bullet lines: "親権・養育費・財産分与" and "離婚協議・調停・裁判対応". In the lower center, place 3 compact white feature boxes with navy line icons and short Japanese text: box 1 shows a group-of-people icon and says "各分野の専門家が対応", box 2 shows a handshake icon and says "相談者様に寄り添う親身なサポート", box 3 shows a document icon and says "初回相談60分無料". Add a small disclaimer beneath them: "※ご相談の内容によっては有料となる場合がございます。" On the lower right, create a prominent navy call-to-action panel with rounded corners. Include a small Japanese line "まずはお気軽にご相談ください", a large white phone number with phone icon {argument name="phone number" default="03-1234-5678"}, and a gold pill-shaped strip at the bottom reading {argument name="business hours" default="平日 9:00〜18:00（土日祝は事前予約で対応可）"}. content: A cozy indoor lifestyle photo of a fluffy long-haired calico cat sleeping with its eyes closed and its chin gently resting on top of a glossy white cylindrical appliance shaped like a rounded tube, viewed from the front at table height. The cat has a thick tricolor coat with orange, black, and white fur, a white muzzle, pink nose, large pointed ears, and a very soft, plush appearance. Its body is draped behind and around the appliance on a long matte-black tabletop with natural light wood edges, creating a centered composition with the appliance in the foreground and the cat filling the upper half of the frame. The appliance has a circular front opening with a metallic inner ring and a small oval control window near the bottom. The setting is a warm, sunlit modern home interior with a window directly behind the subject, soft daylight coming in, a pale wall, warm wooden floor, and 1 small potted plant on the windowsill at the top right. Shallow depth of field, gentle warm color grading, realistic fur detail, natural reflections on the appliance, calm sleepy mood, high-resolution candid pet photography.
title: Sleeping Calico on White Appliance
description: A warm, realistic pet photo of a fluffy calico cat napping on a sleek white device, ideal for cozy lifestyle or home-interior imagery.

content: A bold minimalist brand poster on a matte black background with a soft grainy print texture, designed like a startup landing-page hero graphic. In the top left, place a simple cream-colored logo icon followed by the brand name {argument name="brand name" default="Biscuit"} in a refined serif wordmark. Below it, create a large left-aligned typographic block occupying roughly the left half of the composition. The main headline reads: {argument name="headline text" default="Built for solopreneurs."} in oversized elegant cream serif type with strong contrast and generous line spacing. Directly beneath it, add a second headline line in vivid hot pink italic serif reading {argument name="tagline text" default="Backed by simplicity."}. Below that, add a smaller white sans-serif body copy block, left aligned, reading {argument name="body text" default="Everything you need to launch, run, and grow—all in one place."}. Near the bottom left, place the URL {argument name="website text" default="biscuit.so"} in bold hot pink sans-serif. On the right half, feature a cute abstract mascot: a rounded irregular cloud-like pink blob character with scalloped edges, 2 large cream-and-black circular eyes, 1 small curved smiling mouth, and 2 tiny rounded hands resting on top of a large curved pink foreground shape that rises from the bottom edge like a hill or product surface. Add a dense field of hot pink spray-like speckles and particles in the upper-right quadrant fading toward the center, giving a playful cosmic ink-splatter effect. Use a limited palette of black, cream, white, and saturated pink; high contrast editorial typography; lots of negative space; a clean, modern, approachable, founder-friendly SaaS branding aesthetic; centered-right character placement; portrait poster composition.

content: A minimalist clean poster on a warm light beige studio background with a subtle wall-to-table horizon line, lots of negative space, and soft diffused lighting. Center-right stands a full-body vintage silent-film comedian resembling {argument name="character type" default="Charlie Chaplin"}, wearing a black bowler hat, dark worn suit, vest, white shirt, tie, oversized trousers, and old leather shoes, holding a thin curved cane in one hand and smiling gently. His other arm is extended in a presentation gesture toward a large green jar of {argument name="product name" default="anti-itch cream"} placed in the foreground at center. The jar has a white screw cap, translucent green body, and a bright yellow-green label with Chinese medicine-style packaging details, including small Chinese characters and the English text {argument name="label text" default="ANTI-ITCH CREAM"}. A realistic human hand rises from below to support the jar from underneath, making the product the visual focal point. Add fresh green mint leaves around the base of the jar and near the character’s feet for a natural herbal cue. Composition should feel like a modern advertising poster: product large and centered, character slightly behind and to the right, clean cutout look, soft shadows, crisp edges, muted neutral palette with the green jar as the main color accent. No headline, no extra layout elements, no clutter, no border. Include a tiny four-point sparkle icon in the lower right corner. Aspect ratio vertical poster, polished commercial photomontage style.

content: A realistic fashion-photo style full-body cropped portrait of a {argument name="character type" default="young woman"} shot from a dramatic low angle against a bright blue sky with 2 soft white cloud patches. She is turned mostly away from the camera in a three-quarter back view, looking over her shoulder, with long wavy {argument name="hair color" default="auburn red"} hair falling to mid-back and moving naturally in the breeze. She wears a fitted black ribbed long-sleeve crop top that exposes the waist, olive green cargo pants with a low-rise fit, 5 visible belt-mounted utility pouches around the waistband, 2 visible back flap pockets, and 1 visible side cargo pocket on the left thigh. She also wears a pair of glossy black leather gloves, with one gloved hand raised near her neck and jaw and the other lowered near her thigh. The bottle has a matte silver pump dispenser with a short side nozzle and a clean cylindrical form. On the bottle, elegant black serif typography reads {argument name="brand name" default="AURA"} on the top line and {argument name="product name" default="Hydrating Serum"} below. Around the bottle on the tray are exactly 4 small off-white paper cards placed loosely in the foreground and right side, each printed with a short phrase in a different language: one English card reading "Quiet skin, every morning", one French card reading "Peau calme, chaque matin", one vertical East Asian text card, and one Arabic text card. Warm natural morning sunlight streams in from the upper left, casting long soft-edged shadows of the bottle and cards across the sandy textured tray surface. The background is softly blurred and neutral, with creamy beige architectural shapes and a calm editorial spa aesthetic. Photorealistic studio lifestyle product shot, high-end beauty campaign look, soft warm tones, subtle texture, shallow depth of field, refined minimalist composition, premium packaging photography.

content: Create a dramatic square commercial poster for a spicy snack brand, with a fiery red storm atmosphere and high-energy food advertising style. The background is a dark crimson sky filled with glowing clouds, scattered sparks, and visible lightning bolts. In the center, a giant tornado made of swirling transparent wind rings, glossy whole red chili peppers, square corn chips, crumbs, and seasoning particles rises upward from an opened snack bag, forming a powerful vortex. The tornado should feel dynamic and explosive, with chips and chili peppers flying outward in different sizes and depths for a cinematic 3D look. At the bottom center, place a glossy red snack packet standing upright, labeled with the brand logo and product name {argument name="product name" default="Crispy Nachos Chips"}, with a spicy flavor badge reading {argument name="flavor text" default="Spicy Masala"}, a small chili illustration, a corn note near the bottom, and a printed image of square nacho chips on the front. Put a stylized playful logo at the top left reading {argument name="brand name" default="SnaX"} in bold yellow and white script with a red outline, and a clean white platform watermark at the top right reading {argument name="platform text" default="Pollo.ai"}. On the left side, add a huge stacked distressed headline in bold condensed uppercase, with the first word in golden yellow and the remaining three lines in white, reading exactly: {argument name="headline text" default="WARNING! CRUNCH STORM INCOMING"}. Use intense rim lighting, glossy highlights, deep shadows, rich red-orange color grading, and a premium snack advertisement composition that feels spicy, crunchy, chaotic, and irresistible.
title: Spicy Nacho Tornado Ad
description: A bold square snack advertisement featuring a tornado of chips and red chilies erupting from a spicy nacho bag, ideal for food marketing and social media promos.

content: A photorealistic architectural exterior rendering of a large modern luxury family house viewed straight on from the front gate, perfectly centered and symmetrical. The house is a two-story contemporary mansion with smooth off-white stone or stucco walls, dark charcoal roof trim, large black-framed windows, and a grand recessed entrance with tall dark double doors under a flat canopy. On the left side, an open garage clearly reveals 1 white luxury SUV parked inside. On the right side, a floor-to-ceiling glass living room window shows 1 black grand piano inside, with elegant interior lighting faintly visible. In the foreground, 2 tall gray stone gate pillars frame the entrance, each topped with 1 classic black lantern for a total of 2 lanterns, and the right pillar has a gold nameplate engraved with Japanese text {argument name="nameplate text" default="藤 咲"}. A wide light-gray tiled walkway leads from the gate to the front door, bordered by neatly manicured green lawn and abundant white rose flowerbeds on both sides. Add trimmed shrubs, slender cypress-like trees near the doorway, low hedges, and rooftop terrace greenery. Surround the property with lush leafy trees at the edges of the frame. Use bright midday summer sunlight, crisp shadows, a vivid deep blue sky with a few small white clouds, ultra-clean materials, high-end residential design, realistic reflections in the glass, and a polished aspirational real-estate advertisement look.
title: Modern Luxury Mansion Exterior
description: This prompt generates a polished photorealistic front-view image of an upscale contemporary mansion, ideal for luxury real estate, architectural visualization, or dream-home concept art.

content:
Vintage botanical-style infographic for “{argument name="product" default="Artisan Brew Coffee Beans"}.” 19th-century lithograph look, aged parchment tones (brown, beige, muted green). Center: steaming coffee cup + labeled bag, elegant title “{argument name="title" default="Premium Coffee Craft"}.” Surrounding small illustrations: beans, plant, grinder, kettle, cup. Simple process grid: harvest → dry → roast → grind → brew → pour. Scenic coffee farm footer. Fine ink lines, soft watercolor, rustic, artisanal feel.

A carefully drawn ingredients with labels, measures, and implements like bowls, whisks, or spoons should surround the composition's focal point. To create a {argument name="mood" default="homey, nostalgic"} vibe, use textured shading, warm pastel colors, and fine, ink-like outlines. Add recipe writing in the handwritten manner, including the ingredients and directions organically into the layout. content: Create a clean Japanese lifestyle advertisement poster for a futuristic compact home appliance that automatically folds laundry. Use a bright, airy, minimalist Scandinavian-style living room in the background with soft daylight, white walls, a light wood table, a sofa, and green plants near a window, all softly blurred to keep focus on the product. The main product is a sleek white rectangular machine with rounded corners on a tabletop, shown in a 3/4 front view, with its front door tray folded down and a neatly folded white T-shirt sliding outward from the machine. Add a faint digital display on the top front panel showing “04” and subtle modern control icons. Place a small stack of exactly 4 folded garments in the foreground at lower left: 3 white shirts and 1 pale blue shirt at the bottom. Use a premium consumer-electronics ad style, photorealistic product rendering, soft shadows, high-key lighting, gentle blue-gray accents, and a clean composition with lots of white space. At the top left, add very large blue Japanese headline text reading {argument name="headline text" default="置くだけ、4秒。"}. Beneath it, add a smaller dark gray Japanese subheadline reading {argument name="subheadline text" default="毎日の“たたむ”をゼロに。"}. On the left side below the subheadline, place 3 rounded rectangular feature badges stacked vertically, each with a blue outline icon and Japanese text: 1) a T-shirt icon with "Tシャツ・タオル対応", 2) a cube icon with "コンパクト設計", 3) a family icon with "家族みんなで使える". Along the bottom center, add exactly 4 minimalist blue line icons with labels separated evenly: 1) stopwatch icon with "最短４秒", 2) T-shirt outline icon with "サイズぴったり", 3) folded towel icon with "省スペース", 4) hand snap icon with "誰でも簡単". At the bottom left, add the product branding in a modern sans-serif layout: {argument name="product name" default="Foldy Home 20"} with smaller Japanese text below reading {argument name="product category" default="全自動服たたみ機"}. At the bottom right, display a large blue price reading {argument name="price" default="￥19,800"} with smaller gray text "（税込）". Include a subtle "Pollo.ai" watermark in the top-right corner. Vertical poster format, crisp commercial layout, realistic Japanese home-appliance catalog aesthetic.
title: Japanese Auto Laundry Folder Ad
description: This prompt generates a polished Japanese-style product advertisement poster for a compact automatic clothes-folding appliance, suitable for mock marketing visuals and concept campaigns.

content: Create a premium vertical fast-food lifestyle advertisement in a polished commercial photography style, designed like a summer campaign poster for McDonald's and McCafé. Show a glamorous young woman with softly blurred, unidentifiable facial features sitting confidently on the hood of a sleek red sports car parked on a winding mountain road at golden hour. She has long wavy auburn hair glowing in warm sunset backlight, wears a dark green satin bomber jacket with gold detailing, a white camisole, high-waisted burgundy pants, and black ankle boots with heels. Her pose is relaxed and stylish, one leg bent and one extended forward, while she holds out a clear plastic cup of iced coffee with a straw and visible McDonald's golden arches branding toward the camera. Scatter red roses across the car hood around her, and place 1 McDonald's paper takeout bag on the right side of the hood. Use a dramatic canyon or hillside background with warm sunlight, soft haze, cinematic depth of field, and a luxurious aspirational road-trip mood. Include floating red flower petals in the air. Compose the layout as a high-end ad with the model centered slightly right and large promotional typography on the left. content: Create a high-end futuristic skincare advertisement poster in icy blue and white tones, vertical 2:3 composition. The scene features a translucent glass female bust in left profile with a low bun hairstyle, occupying the left two-thirds of the frame. Inside the transparent head, neck, and torso is a surreal miniature landscape of blue cliffs, glowing water, and multiple waterfalls, like a frozen digital sanctuary contained within the body. Add tiny suspended bubbles, glossy reflections, misty atmosphere, and soft aurora-like light streaks drifting diagonally across the image. On the right side, place a clean white cylindrical skincare bottle standing upright on a jagged translucent ice pedestal. The bottle label should read {argument name="brand name" default="SECURE-IP"} and below it {argument name="product name" default="IP ADDRESS CLEANSER"}, with smaller technical cosmetic copy beneath in a minimal editorial layout. Set giant vertical glowing text along the far right edge reading {argument name="side headline" default="DEEP CORE PURITY"}. Add 4 small infographic-style callouts in a sleek tech-beauty design: a top-right droplet icon with the heading “MOISTURE LOCK” and two short lines of tiny supporting text, a mid-right shield icon with the heading “IP PROTECTION” and three short lines of tiny supporting text, a lower-left headline block reading “PURE CONNECTION PURE CONFIDENCE” with 2 short lines of body copy, and a far-left small label reading “DATA STREAM PURIFIER” with a bracket line pointing toward the glass figure. Include a centered solid pale blue rectangular overlay covering part of the face and upper torso, as a flat opaque block. Lighting is ethereal, glossy, and premium, with strong bloom, frosted highlights, soft backlight, and luxury sci-fi cosmetic campaign styling. content: A retro-futurist propaganda-style poster pasted on a rough white plaster wall, photographed straight-on in natural light. The poster is slightly wrinkled, creased, and weathered with worn corners and subtle tears, giving it the look of an old screen-printed street poster. Use a mid-century space-race aesthetic from the 1950s–1960s, with a limited palette of deep navy blue, faded cream, muted teal, and bold red-orange. The poster has 5 visible text elements: the large cream headline {argument name="headline text" default="ChatGPT"} at the upper left in bold condensed sans-serif, the large red-orange subheadline {argument name="subheadline text" default="Images 2.0"} directly below it, the vertical red text {argument name="rocket text" default="OpenAI"} printed on the rocket body, and the small cream tagline {argument name="tagline text" default="EXPLORING TOMORROW"} along the bottom red band, plus a small cream star icon to the left of the tagline. Composition: a tall white-and-black rocket launches from the lower right edge with red exhaust flames and billowing cream smoke; the rocket is near-vertical and dominates the right third of the poster. A small detached space capsule floats to the left of the rocket, angled diagonally. A thin cream orbital path curves in a large loop across the upper half of the poster, passing behind and around the rocket. The lower left shows the curved horizon of Earth in muted teal and cream, cropped by the frame. The background is a dark navy star field with exactly 3 visible celestial accents: 1 small cream planet or moon near the top center-left, 1 bright star near the upper right, and 1 smaller star near the middle-left. Add a solid red-orange horizontal band across the bottom of the poster. Emphasize vintage print texture, paper folds, faded ink, and nostalgic sci-fi optimism. The final image should look like a realistic photo of a pasted old space-age poster rather than a clean digital graphic.

content: A high-energy vertical anime street poster inspired by a pirate adventure crew, designed like a stylish summer campaign key visual in a modern Japanese shopping street under a vivid blue sky with fluffy white clouds. Show exactly 8 characters grouped closely in the foreground and midground, all happily eating colorful ice cream cones while walking through the city. Center front: a young man in a wide straw hat, oversized red graphic T-shirt, blue shorts, and a black crossbody waist bag, holding a mint-blue ice cream cone. Front left: a green-haired young man in a black oversized graphic shirt with green lettering and layered necklaces, eating ice cream. Front right: a small chibi-like reindeer mascot character wearing a large pink hat with a white X, black and pink streetwear jacket, and holding a blue-and-pink ice cream cone. Right midground: a long-nosed smiling young man in a cap and casual streetwear, loudly laughing with an ice cream cone; behind him a tall skeleton man with a large black afro, crown-like hat, purple hoodie, sunglasses, and an ice cream cone. Left midground: an orange-haired young woman in a cropped white tank top and jeans holding ice cream; behind center-left a blond young man in a blue shirt with a relaxed pose and ice cream; center-right a dark-haired young woman in a purple outfit with sunglasses on her head holding ice cream. The mood is cheerful, summery, fashionable, and adventurous. Make the composition feel like a premium anime tourism or retail poster with dramatic perspective from street level, dense urban signage, shop windows, hanging signs, and branded poster panels. Add large brush-script title text across the top reading {argument name="headline text" default="ONE PIECE"} in huge white paint strokes, with a yellow handwritten subtitle reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="Straw Hat Crew"}. On the upper left, stack poster text blocks reading exactly: "STRAW HAT CREW", "2024", "WE GO! TOGETHER! NEW WORLD!". On the right side, add a vertical street sign reading "New World". Include a pink hanging sign reading "ICE CREAM" with a skull emblem. Add pirate-skull hat emblems in the corners and on storefront signage. At the lower left, place white handwritten script reading "Enjoy! Ice Cream" with a small smiley, and beneath it smaller bold text reading "一起去吃冰淇淋吧！". At the lower left edge add small text: "I'M GONNA BE KING OF THE PIRATES!". At the lower right add "ONE PIECE 2024", a barcode, and tiny caption text "STRAW HAT CREW SUMMER ICE CREAM". Use glossy anime illustration rendering, bold cel shading, crisp line art, rich fabric folds, detailed accessories, vibrant summer lighting, cinematic contrast, poster-grade typography, and a polished commercial key art finish. Aspect ratio 2:3 portrait.
title: Anime Summer Street Poster
description: This prompt generates a polished vertical anime-style ensemble poster of a pirate-themed friend group eating ice cream in a sunny city street, ideal for fan-art key visuals, event posters, and stylish promotional graphics.

content: Create a clean minimalist static ad on an off-white light gray studio background with a centered editorial layout. At the top, place a large luxury-fashion-style serif headline in black reading {argument name="headline text" default="Stop gambling with your ad spend."}, with the word "gambling" set in italic serif for emphasis. In the middle, show a vintage metal slot-machine window viewed straight on, slightly weathered and realistic, with 3 vertical reels inside a rectangular steel housing and a lever with a black knob on the right side. The 3 reels must display, from left to right, "$", "$", and "?". Make the rightmost reel background pale pink while the first 2 reels are aged white. Add a hand-drawn neon-pink annotation style over the image: 1 arrow-and-note on the left pointing to the first reel reading {argument name="left annotation" default="your attribution"}, 1 starburst scribble above the pink question-mark reel, 1 arrow from the question-mark reel to a circled note on the right reading {argument name="right annotation" default="actual revenue"}, and 1 large curved arrow in the lower left pointing toward the body copy area. Below the slot machine, center a short sans-serif paragraph in black reading {argument name="body text" default="See which campaigns drive revenue, not just clicks. Connect Meta, Google, and Stripe in 60 seconds."}. At the bottom center, place a simple black analytics-style bar logo icon followed by the bold sans-serif brand name {argument name="brand name" default="Humblytics"}. Use strong text fidelity, polished product-ad composition, soft studio shadows, restrained palette of black, steel gray, off-white, and hot pink, and a modern direct-response ad aesthetic.
title: Minimal Slot Machine Attribution Ad
description: This prompt generates a polished static marketing ad with a vintage slot machine metaphor, handwritten annotations, and strong centered typography for analytics or attribution software promotions.

content: Create a bold static SaaS ad on a matte black background with a premium editorial look and highly accurate typography. At the top, place a large stacked serif headline in off-white reading: "Your analytics stack" on the first line, "shouldn’t cost more" on the second line in bright magenta italic serif, and "than your rent." on the third line in off-white serif. Center the composition around a large curled, crumpled receipt made of white thermal paper, angled slightly from upper left to lower right, with visible paper texture, soft shadows, and rolled ends on both the upper right and lower left. On the receipt, show exactly 5 line items in black monospaced or receipt-style text aligned in two columns: "GA4" with "$0", "Hotjar" with "$99", "Optimizely" with "$2,450", "GTM setup (dev hours)" with "$1,800", and "Tag manager debug" with "$400". Highlight the word "Optimizely" with a jagged magenta starburst sticker behind it. Add a dashed divider line below the items, then a bold "TOTAL" label on the lower left of the receipt. On the lower right of the receipt, place a large price reading "{argument name="monthly price" default="$19/mo"}" in heavy black type, circled with 2 hand-drawn magenta marker loops. Add 3 handwritten magenta annotation elements: on the left side, the words "{argument name="left annotation" default="one tool"}" in brush script with an underline and a curved arrow pointing to the receipt; near the bottom center, a curved magenta arrow pointing upward toward the circled price; and at the bottom right, the handwritten tagline "{argument name="tagline text" default="One script. One price."}" with an underline. In the bottom-right corner, add a small block of white sans-serif body copy, right-aligned, reading "{argument name="body copy" default="Analytics, heatmaps, A/B testing, and revenue attribution."}". Use an editorial ad-photography style with crisp text placement, clean hierarchy, high contrast, subtle paper realism, and a limited palette of black, white, and hot pink.
title: Editorial SaaS Receipt Ad
description: This prompt generates a high-contrast startup advertisement featuring a crumpled receipt, bold editorial typography, and pink handwritten callouts for analytics pricing campaigns.

content: Create a minimalist static SaaS ad on a warm off-white background with elegant editorial typography and clean, high-fidelity text rendering. At the top, place a large black serif headline in two lines reading: "{argument name="headline text" default="Your dev team shouldn’t be your analytics team."}" The words “dev team” should appear in italic serif while the rest remains bold high-contrast serif, with generous spacing and a luxury magazine-style layout. Centered below, show a slightly tilted white paper invoice sheet with a soft drop shadow and a subtle vertical fold crease down the middle, as if photographed from above. The invoice uses black monospaced typewriter-style text and reads exactly: “INVOICE — DEV HOURS, OCTOBER” as the header, then 5 line items with hours and prices aligned in columns: “A/B test setup on pricing page   8 hrs   $1,200”, “GTM tag install (3 events)   4 hrs   $600”, “Funnel tracking debug   6 hrs   $900”, “Meta pixel mapping   3 hrs   $450”, and “Attribution reporting build   12 hrs   $1,800”. Under the 5 items, add a dashed divider line, then a bold monospaced “TOTAL” on the lower left and the total price “$4,950” on the lower right. Draw a hand-drawn yellow line striking through the total price. Add 4 doodle-style annotation elements around the invoice: on the left, handwritten yellow text saying “every month??” with a yellow arrow pointing right toward the paper; on the upper right of the paper, a yellow starburst scribble; below the total, a green curved arrow pointing up toward the crossed-out price; and on the lower right, a green hand-drawn circle containing the handwritten words “zero devs,” connected to the green arrow. At the bottom center of the ad, add a smaller black sans-serif body copy in 2 lines reading: “{argument name="body text" default="Marketers ship tests and track revenue themselves.\nNo tickets. No tag manager. One script."}" Keep the composition airy, premium, and conversion-focused, blending modern startup ad design with tactile paper realism and playful marker annotations.
title: Minimal SaaS Ad With Invoice Mockup
description: This prompt generates a premium static marketing ad featuring a developer-hours invoice, strong editorial typography, and hand-drawn annotations for SaaS landing pages or paid social creatives.

Surround the product with airborne orange seasoning dust and smoky spice clouds, especially behind the bag and to the left side. Scatter coarse salt crystals and orange-red seasoning powder across the pedestal and foreground surface. The pedestal should be a thick, jagged, matte-black rock slab with sharp fractured edges. content: A cinematic commercial product photo of a glossy red snack bag standing upright on a wet city street at night, centered in frame, shot straight-on at eye level with shallow depth of field and dramatic orange neon lighting. The package is covered in realistic water droplets and reflects warm streetlights. The brand name on the bag reads {argument name="brand name" default="CRUNCHY CHIPZ"} in very large bold white bubble letters with a thick dark outline, stacked across two lines in the center. Behind the logo is a jagged yellow-orange comic-style starburst graphic. In the lower right area of the bag, smaller printed flavor text reads {argument name="flavor text" default="ZESTY CHEDDAR"}, with tiny subtext below reading "FLAVORED CORN SNACKS." Near the bottom left edge of the bag, tiny text reads "SAVORY TRIANGLES." Show exactly 3 triangular corn chips total: 2 printed on the front of the bag and 1 real chip placed on the wet pavement in front of the package, leaning slightly back. The chips are orange, heavily seasoned, and textured. The background is a moody urban alley with blurred neon signs and round bokeh lights, all in deep amber, orange, and red tones, with glossy reflections on the rain-soaked ground. Ultra-detailed advertising photography, high contrast, sharp focus on the bag and front chip, premium snack packaging mockup, realistic condensation, rich saturated colors, studio-quality product retouching blended with a rainy street lifestyle setting.

content: Create a dramatic studio food advertisement poster on a dark black textured background with moody, high-contrast lighting and rich warm orange tones. The composition is vertical and split visually: bold stacked ad copy on the left, hero food action on the right. Show a deep rustic bowl overflowing with triangular cheddar corn chips in the lower center-right, with thick glossy cheese sauce being poured in a continuous stream from a tilted dark metal saucepan entering from the upper right. The cheese lands heavily on top of the chips and drapes over them in thick molten folds. Behind the bowl on the left, place 1 upright red snack bag with a large yellow-orange starburst graphic and the brand text {argument name="brand name" default="CRUNCHY CHIPZ"} in big white outlined letters, plus smaller flavor text {argument name="flavor text" default="ZESTY CHEDDAR"} and tiny subtitle "FLAVORED CORN SNACKS". Print tiny text near the lower left of the bag: "SAVORY TRIANGLES". Add 2 small condiment bowls on the dark tabletop: 1 shallow bowl of shredded cheddar in the bottom left corner and 1 tiny bowl of reddish seasoning near the bottom center-right. Scatter a few crumbs and cheese shreds across the table, with a dark napkin tucked under the main bowl. Include bold distressed condensed uppercase typography in a vintage poster style. On the upper left, stack the headline in 5 lines reading: {argument name="headline text" default="THE ULTIMATE MUNCH."} with "THE" on line 1, "ULTIMATE" on line 2, and "MUNCH." on line 3 in large type, followed by line 4 "EXPERIENCE" and line 5 "TRUE UMAMI." in smaller white text. In the bottom right, place a 3-line orange callout reading {argument name="tagline text" default="DIP, POUR, MUNCH."}. content: Create a refined editorial presentation cover slide in a warm, Claude-inspired design system. Use a landscape 16:9 composition with a parchment-paper background, subtle paper grain, soft shadows, and layered torn-paper collage elements. The overall palette should be warm ivory, cream, sand, charcoal, muted black, and terracotta accent. On the left half, place a small top label reading "{argument name="system label" default="Claude-inspired presentation system"}" with a small terracotta dot and a thin horizontal divider line. Below it, set an oversized elegant high-contrast serif headline in black that reads "{argument name="main headline" default="Thoughtful Systems"}", split across two lines and dominating the left side. Under the headline, add a smaller serif subheadline in terracotta reading "{argument name="subheadline" default="Warmth can still feel precise."}". Beneath that, create a vertical list of exactly 4 design principles, each on its own row with thin divider lines and a small icon at left: 1) a rectangular parchment-sheet icon with the text "Parchment canvas", 2) a serif capital T icon with the text "Serif-led hierarchy", 3) a filled terracotta circle icon with the text "Terracotta for signal", 4) a chain-link icon with the text "Organic diagrams over cold chrome". Add a tiny footer caption at bottom left reading "CLAUDE-INSPIRED PRESENTATION SYSTEM" in spaced small caps. On the right half, build a layered collage of exactly 3 paper cards: first, a tall off-white art card with a fine border containing the heading "A more considered approach", a short body paragraph about complex problems yielding to clarity, a minimal landscape line drawing with a terracotta sun, and a vertical terracotta botanical branch overlapping the card; second, a dark charcoal rectangular card partially behind it with the lowercase title "thinking process" and an exact 5-step numbered list: "01 Observe", "02 Interpret", "03 Connect", "04 Synthesize", "05 Act with care", plus a delicate circular orbital diagram in dotted lines and terracotta highlight; third, a torn off-white note card in front near the bottom with a hand-drawn overlapping-circles diagram where one crescent-shaped intersection area is shaded in terracotta, alongside a handwritten quote reading "{argument name="quote" default="Clarity emerges when systems are designed with intention."}". Include one extra light beige paper strip tucked beneath the lower cards. Emphasize tactile realism, elegant negative space, print-editorial sophistication, soft natural lighting, and a calm, thoughtful luxury-tech mood.
title: Thoughtful Systems Presentation Cover
description: A warm editorial slide cover for AI or product design presentations, using parchment textures, serif typography, and terracotta-accented collage cards.

content: Create a premium minimalist keynote-style presentation cover slide in an Apple-inspired industrial design aesthetic. Use a wide 16:9 layout with a deep matte black upper background and a pale concrete-gray lower platform occupying the bottom quarter of the frame. Place a large photorealistic floating rectangular slab in the right-center foreground, resembling a thin black glass device or polished obsidian platform with mirror-like reflections, chamfered chrome-metal edges, and precise industrial finishing. The slab should hover above the light surface and cast a soft elongated shadow directly beneath it. Add a tall vertical gray metallic wall or pillar on the far right edge to frame the composition. Use extremely sparse, high-end art direction, lots of negative space, cinematic studio lighting, subtle gradients, and crisp contrast between black and silver materials. On the left side, set clean white sans-serif typography with a clear hierarchy: a tiny top caption reading "{argument name="system label" default="Apple-inspired presentation system"}", a very large bold headline reading "{argument name="headline text" default="Clarity At Scale"}", and a medium subtitle reading "{argument name="subtitle text" default="The strongest slides behave like products."}". Below that, include exactly 3 numbered principles in a vertical list with thin separators and refined spacing: "01 | {argument name="principle 1" default="One focal object"}", "02 | Binary light / dark rhythm", and "03 | Blue only for signal". Add a short thin horizontal rule above the list and a tiny blue accent line below the list. Draw a very fine horizontal guide line near the top spanning most of the slide, with the small page number "01" at the upper right. Repeat the small caption "Apple-inspired presentation system" once again at the bottom left on the light surface. Overall look: luxury tech presentation, editorial product-launch slide, ultra-clean Swiss grid, restrained monochrome palette with only one subtle blue accent, photorealistic rendering blended with presentation design.
title: Apple-Style Minimal Presentation Cover
description: This prompt generates a sleek Apple-inspired presentation title slide with editorial typography and a floating black-glass product object, ideal for keynote covers, pitch decks, and design system presentations.

content: A clean fashion comparison studio photo of 4 adult East Asian women standing side by side against a plain light gray seamless background, full body visible from head to shoes, photographed straight-on with soft diffused lighting and a polished commercial look. Above each woman, centered over her head in black serif text, place height labels reading exactly: 145cm, 155cm, 165cm, 175cm. Emphasize realistic proportional differences in height while keeping all four women slim, elegant, and similarly styled, with long dark brown to black softly wavy hair and neutral expressions. Their faces are obscured by smooth rectangular blur blocks. The women stand very close together in a friendly pose, with subtle arm contact and one woman lightly resting an arm around another. Use a coordinated beige, cream, taupe, and soft blush wardrobe palette with smart casual feminine outfits and matching ivory loafers. Woman 1 under the 145cm label wears a short-sleeve cream ribbed knit top tucked into high-waisted light beige shorts with a fabric belt, plus a small quilted shoulder bag with a chain strap. Woman 2 under the 155cm label wears a white long-sleeve blouse with a bow tie at the collar and a taupe mini skirt with a slight flared hem, carrying a small light beige crossbody handbag. Woman 3 under the 165cm label wears a sleeveless blush-beige ribbed knit top and a simple ivory mini skirt. Woman 4 under the 175cm label wears a draped white V-neck blouse with sleeves rolled to the forearms, high-waisted taupe belted shorts, and a medium taupe shoulder bag. All 4 women wear cream or ivory horsebit loafers. Composition is vertical, centered, minimal, stylish, realistic, like a fashion catalog image comparing female heights.
title: Fashion Height Comparison of Four Women
description: This prompt generates a realistic studio fashion image showing four women of different labeled heights, useful for social media comparison posts or editorial-style visual guides.

content:
Create a bold Korean-style beverage advertisement poster with a warm golden splash background and dramatic commercial lighting. Show a {argument name="celebrity spokesperson" default="Donald Trump-like older male politician"} from the chest up, wearing a navy suit, white dress shirt, bright red tie, and a small American flag lapel pin, facing camera with a confident sales-pitch expression. His face is obscured by a flat rectangular censor block in a skin-toned color. In his left hand, extended close to the camera in forced perspective, he holds a yellow aluminum can of Korean rice punch drink labeled prominently in Korean, with red top and bottom bands and the main product text "비락 식혜" and "Since 1993" on the can. The can also includes smaller Korean copy, an image of sweet rice drink near the bottom, and the volume text "238 ml (120 kcal)". His right hand gives a thumbs-up.

Use an energetic retro-commercial composition, with splashing sweet rice beverage and droplets behind him, glowing golden highlights, and a slightly low-angle heroic framing. At the top, include 3 distinct headline text groups: a small handwritten-style black slogan on the upper left reading "전통의 맛, 한국의 DRINK!", a huge central headline in distressed bold Korean type reading "걸죽는 땐?" in dark brown-black and "비락 식혜!" in vivid red, and a brand logo on the upper right reading "비락" with small red text "Since 1993" beneath it. Add 2 callout badges: on the left, a yellow circular seal with a tiny crown icon and the text "대한민국 국민음료 No.1"; on the right, a white speech bubble with handwritten Korean text "한국이 만든 맛있는 전통!" and red English text "I LOVE IT!".

At the bottom foreground, place 2 food elements: a brass bowl filled with sweet rice drink and floating rice grains on the left, and a wooden bowl piled with white rice on the right. Across the lower middle, add 2 lines of large brush-style promotional text, the first in white reading "달콤하게! 시원하게!" and the second in mixed white and yellow reading "속까지 시~원하게!" with an energetic yellow underline stroke. Along the very bottom, include 3 circular feature icons with captions in Korean: "국내산 쌀 엄선된 재료", "시원하게 갈증해소", and "부드러운 단맛 속 편한 식혜". In the lower right corner, add tiny disclaimer text "연출된 이미지입니다". Make the overall look glossy, exaggerated, funny, and convincing like a viral parody print ad.
title: Korean Rice Drink Parody Ad Poster
description: This prompt generates a humorous, high-impact parody beverage advertisement poster featuring a famous politician-like spokesperson promoting a Korean canned rice drink.
