content:
Please generate a "hand-drawn packaging proposal board style" product introduction poster for {argument name="product name" default="milk powder"}.

If I provide a product image, please use it as the main reference, retaining the core visual characteristics, packaging form, colors, materials, brand identity, and overall temperament of the product. Prioritize the main color tone and color relationships from the product image for the design.
If I do not provide a product image, please automatically generate a product appearance and packaging design that fits the positioning of {argument name="product name" default="milk powder"}, and automatically match natural and reasonable main, auxiliary, and background colors based on the product attributes, category characteristics, and temperament.

Overall poster style requirements:
This is not a standard e-commerce detail page or a simple studio-shot poster, but a creative proposal board that integrates "product finished image + packaging design sketches + brand concept development process." The overall presentation is a high-aesthetic, high-completion brand design display image, as if a designer is presenting a packaging concept proposal.

Visual requirements:
- Vertical composition
- Use a unified background with a brand feel; the background color should be naturally determined by the product itself and not fixed to any one color.
- Color schemes should coordinate with product attributes: if there is a reference image, prioritize inheriting its main and brand colors; if not, automatically generate a reasonable color scheme based on the product name.
- Place the most complete and eye-catching product main visual in the center, with realistic textures, 3D lighting, and commercial finish effects.
- Surround the product with multiple auxiliary visual elements: packaging sketches from different angles, structural sketches, local form explorations, hand-held display drafts, packaging unfolding ideas, and brand lettering layout experiments.
- Add natural and casual black or dark hand-drawn line art, arrows, circles, symbols, and handwritten Chinese annotations to give the image a strong sense of "design process" and "creative proposal."
- The finished product image should be relatively refined and realistic, while the sketch parts should be relatively casual and dynamic, creating a contrast between the "finished product + design sketches."
- The layout should look relaxed and free, but overall it must have order, rhythm, and a visual center, reflecting a high-end graphic design feel.
- Small graphics, symbols, or interesting elements related to the product can be added appropriately to enhance brand memory points.
- The final effect should have a sense of branding, creativity, process, and visual impact.

Color principles:
- Do not fix a yellow background.
- Automatically select the main color tone based on product type, material, use, consumer experience, and brand temperament.
- The background color, product color, text color, and sketch line art color should coordinate with each other.
- High-saturation monochromatic backgrounds or soft, unified color schemes can be used, as long as the overall image has a brand feel and visual impact.
- Colors should naturally serve the product rather than overshadow it.

Style keywords:
Packaging design proposal board, brand concept development, hand-drawn sketches, design process feel, moodboard, creative review draft, product finished rendering, visual experimentation, commercial design poster.

Special notes:
- If there is a reference product image, prioritize following it and do not deviate from the product itself.
- If there is no reference image, automatically generate reasonable product appearance, packaging, and color schemes based on the product name, maintaining overall style consistency.
- The focus of the image is "product introduction + creative design process display."
- Do not make it look like a common e-commerce detail page, a promotional poster, or overly neat and stiff; do not lack sketches and handwritten annotations; avoid a cheap feel or an immature cartoon style.
title: Packaging Design Proposal Board Prompt
description: A highly detailed prompt for creating professional hand-drawn style product packaging design proposals and conceptual mood boards.

content: Create a vertical 9:16 luxury-campaign poster for a fictional crossover product, a disruptive co-branded handbag advertisement between {argument name="brand one" default="HERMÈS PARIS"} and {argument name="brand two" default="拼多多"}. The composition is a violently split, collage-style fashion key visual with a torn-paper seam running vertically down the center, dividing two clashing aesthetics: on the left, refined premium luxury branding in warm Hermes orange, cream paper, and elegant editorial minimalism; on the right, aggressive Chinese e-commerce promotion energy in black and metallic red foil, with loud sale graphics, confetti, ripped stickers, and explosive discount typography. At the top center, place both brands prominently with a large collaboration headline in Chinese, the left logo area styled like a classic luxury house with serif typography and horse-and-carriage emblem, the right logo area in bold red Chinese branding. Below that, add the main headline text in huge Chinese characters: {argument name="headline text" default="颠覆性联名款"}, and a boxed subheadline: {argument name="subheadline text" default="百亿补贴铂金包"}. The centerpiece is one Birkin-style luxury handbag shown front-facing and large, perfectly centered but visually split in half along the torn seam: the left half is orange pebbled leather with gold hardware, the right half is crinkled metallic silver leather with silver hardware, both halves seamlessly merged into one surreal bag. The bag should include 5 clearly visible accessory/product elements around or on it: 1 orange clochette hanging on the left, 1 metallic silver hanging strap with lock on the right, 1 central turn-lock closure with padlock, 1 orange Hermes-style gift box with dark ribbon at lower left, and 1 beige dust bag with small logo near the bottom left. Behind the bag on the left is a painterly orange brushstroke on textured cream paper; behind the bag on the right is a crushed reflective red metallic wrapper surface with spark-like highlights and falling confetti. On the right half, add 8 aggressive promotional text bursts and stickers layered diagonally like an online shopping festival poster: 1 giant white Chinese slogan "百亿补贴 全网最低", 2 "限时秒杀!!", 3 a torn price sticker reading "补贴价 ¥999?!", 4 "万件疯抢", 5 "百亿补贴 官方直补", 6 "直降到底", 7 a large bottom torn banner repeating "补贴价 ¥999?!", and 8 small text "建议零售价 ¥1000000+". On the left margin, add a slim vertical editorial text column with 4 grouped text blocks in a luxury layout: 1 "限量发售 / 全球瞩目 / 2024 LIMITED EDITION", 2 "HERMÈS PARIS MADE IN FRANCE", 3 "CRAFTED FOR ELEGANCE", and 4 "DESIGNED TO DEFY THE ORDINARY". At the bottom, create a black app-like information bar with 3 feature blocks from left to right: 1 a red brand icon with "拼多多" and a search-bar style pill containing "百亿补贴铂金包", 2 a lightning icon with the text "百亿补贴 官方补贴 所以低价", and 3 a shield icon with the text "正品保障 假一赔十 3期免息". Add a thin final slogan line across the very bottom in small Chinese text. Use hyper-detailed commercial product photography, premium graphic design, sharp lighting, embossed textures, foil reflections, paper tears, and strong depth. The overall mood must feel like a world-class art director forced a heritage luxury campaign and a chaotic discount-shopping poster to collide in one image, producing extreme visual tension, irony, and high-impact contrast.
title: Luxury x E-commerce Split Poster
description: This prompt generates a high-impact vertical campaign poster that collides luxury fashion branding with chaotic discount-platform promotion for a provocative co-branded product ad.

content: A vertical 9:16 luxury-fashion parody advertising poster with a single centered handbag as the hero product, designed as a brutal collision between ultra-premium maison branding and chaotic Chinese e-commerce discount graphics. The top half should feel like an elegant Hermes-style campaign: a warm beige and taupe atelier interior with soft morning window light, shallow depth of field, refined wall paneling, a wooden worktable, and visible artisan tools including exactly 6 workshop elements around the bag: a brush cup with several brushes on the left, a small ceramic vase on the far left, a leather awl or burnishing tool on the table front left, a knife-like leather tool on the table front left edge, an adjustable desk lamp on the right, and a spool of thread on the right. At the top center place a gold luxury logo with a horse-and-carriage icon above the word HERMÈS and PARIS beneath it, followed by one giant serif headline reading BIRKIN in gold. In the center, show one large structured crocodile-embossed Birkin-style handbag in {argument name="bag color" default="warm greige taupe"}, front-facing, highly detailed leather texture, polished gold hardware, upright handles, sitting on the tabletop, photographed like a premium product shot. Across the right-middle of the bag, add one torn-paper rip effect revealing aggressive discount advertising underneath; around the tear add exactly 5 digital glitch accents in neon magenta, green, cyan, black, and white. On the torn area place exactly 3 visible Chinese promo stickers layered diagonally: a small red sticker reading 福利价, a large red sticker reading 百亿补贴, and a black sticker with bright outline reading 亿补贴. The bottom third of the poster should erupt into a loud comic-book and livestream-sale visual explosion with torn-paper separation from the luxury upper half. Use saturated red, yellow, white, black, and cyan with sharp starburst shapes, speed lines, heavy outlines, and flying gold coins. Include exactly 7 bottom promotional text blocks: 1 large central red banner reading 百亿补贴, 1 red rounded rectangle below it with the Pinduoduo logo and the text 拼多多, 2 side banners partially cropped with 拼多多, 2 additional yellow-red 百亿补贴 bursts at the lower left and lower center, and 1 handwritten black calligraphy slogan at the lower right reading 砍一刀. Add one extra handwritten black phrase at the lower left reading 只需9.9元!. The overall composition must feel like an elite fashion campaign violently invaded by cheap viral bargain marketing, with cinematic lighting, strong visual hierarchy, realistic product rendering, premium typography above, explosive discount chaos below, and intentional aesthetic contrast between sophistication and low-cost internet commerce. Make it look like a high-end brand collaboration key visual poster for {argument name="collaboration brand text" default="拼多多 × 爱马仕"} promoting {argument name="promo text" default="百亿补贴铂金包"}.
title: Luxury Bag Meets Discount Chaos Poster
description: This prompt generates a vertically composed fashion-ad poster that contrasts a refined Hermes-style Birkin product shot with explosive Pinduoduo-style subsidy graphics for satirical luxury collaboration visuals.

content: A hyper-detailed vertical Japanese theme park advertisement poster set in a lush tropical jungle under a vivid blue sky with scattered clouds and strong golden sunlight flaring from the upper right. The style is cinematic, photorealistic, dramatic, and slightly absurdist, like a premium satirical travel ad. At the top, huge three-dimensional stone-textured gold Japanese headline text reads {argument name="headline text" default="ジャンキリア沖縄"}, with a smaller white Japanese tagline underneath that reads "— やんばるの大自然に包まれた、超本格ジャングル・テーマパーク —". In the center foreground, a giant modern smartphone stands upright, slightly tilted, dominating the composition like a monument. Its screen shows a lottery waiting-ticket interface with a safari silhouette header and large bold Japanese text "整理券抽選中", a dotted loading circle, smaller text "結果発表まで30分", and a tiny note "※この画面を閉じずにお待ちください". The phone status bar shows 10:00. To the left midground, a roaring Tyrannosaurus rex emerges from dense jungle foliage behind a huge aged concrete sign with oversized red Japanese text "待ち時間 180分". To the right midground, an ornate extravagant gold entrance gate to a premium area rises above the trees, with a black signboard reading "プレミアムパス入口" and a red-carpeted queue lane beyond it. A long crowded line of park visitors stretches from the foreground deep into the background along rope barriers; the visitors wear summer vacation clothing, hats, towels, backpacks, handheld fans, water bottles, and parasols, showing exhaustion, heat, and anticipation. In the lower left foreground, 3 stacked rustic wooden signboards are visible: the top board says "駐車場 2,000円" with a parking icon, the middle board says "アプリ必須 ダウンロードしてね!" with a smartphone icon, and the bottom board says "当選者だけが冒険へ" with a dinosaur silhouette. Along the right side, large vertical white brush-style Japanese copy reads {argument name="side slogan" default="待つこと、それが冒険だ。"}. Near the lower right are 3 circular gold icon callouts with short Japanese promotional lines: 1 dinosaur icon with "抽選に選ばれし者だけが、恐竜に会える。", 1 smartphone battery icon with "スマホの充電が尽きる前に、夢は始まる。", and 1 VIP icon with "プレミアムな近道も、ご用意しました。". At the very bottom center, include a small black strip with white Japanese disclaimer text: "このポスターは架空のパロディ広告です". The jungle should be dense and glossy with large tropical leaves framing the foreground, warm rim lighting, high contrast, and a polished blockbuster-poster composition. Keep all Japanese typography crisp, clean, and perfectly legible.
title: Japanese Jungle Theme Park Parody Poster
description: This prompt generates a cinematic satirical Japanese poster for a tropical dinosaur theme park, ideal for showcasing dense typography, ad design, and photorealistic scene composition.

content: Create a clean premium Japanese tech infographic poster for {argument name="product name" default="Meta Quest 3"}, centered on a vertically stacked exploded view of a white mixed-reality headset floating in space against a soft lavender-to-blue gradient background. At the top, place the Meta logo in blue followed by a large bold black sans-serif headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="Meta Quest 3"}, with a smaller Japanese tagline beneath: 「まったく新しい現実を、まったく新しい構造から。」. The central subject is a highly polished 3D product render shown as an engineering breakdown with exactly 9 numbered layers, each layer separated evenly from top to bottom and labeled with blue circular number markers on the left side from 1 to 9. The 9 visible layers are: 1) the white outer faceplate shell with three front sensor/camera openings, 2) a row of exactly 3 black tracking camera modules, 3) the main logic board with chips and a clearly visible Snapdragon XR2 Gen 2 processor graphic at the center, 4) a pair of large pancake lens assemblies with vivid purple-blue glass reflections, 5) the black internal frame chassis with openings for optics, 6) the battery/electronics bar with glowing blue accents, 7) two white articulated side strap arms, 8) a white fabric head strap loop, 9) a black soft facial interface cushion at the bottom. Add rounded rectangular annotation boxes with thin white borders and subtle transparency on both sides, each connected by fine white leader lines to the corresponding layer. There are exactly 7 feature callout boxes total: 3 on the left and 4 on the right. Left side boxes, from top to bottom, read: 「Snapdragon XR2 Gen 2」 with a chip icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「調整可能なIPD機構」 with an optics adjustment icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「精密設計されたヘッドストラップ」 with a headset strap icon and smaller Japanese body text. Right side boxes, from top to bottom, read: 「フェイスプレート」 with a simple faceplate icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「トラッキングカメラ」 with a camera icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「パンケーキレンズ」 with a dual-lens icon and smaller Japanese body text, 「高性能バッテリー」 with a battery icon and smaller Japanese body text, plus a lower-right box reading 「柔らかなフェイスインターフェース」 with a soft cushion icon and smaller Japanese body text; keep the overall visual balance elegant and symmetric. At the bottom, add a wide white rounded banner spanning most of the width. On its left side place a large bold Japanese statement in blue: 「体験は、構造から進化する。」 and below it smaller Japanese explanatory copy in black. On the right side of the banner place the blue Meta logo and the wordmark “Meta”. Use a sleek Apple-like product marketing style, ultra-sharp 3D rendering, soft studio lighting, subtle glow, precise shadows, glossy plastics, realistic materials, minimal clutter, and a high-end corporate presentation aesthetic.

content: A clean retro-futurist presentation board on a muted periwinkle-blue background with a minimalist editorial layout, showing 4 analog-inspired audio product concept visuals arranged horizontally. On the far left, a partially cropped reference image of a vintage reel-to-reel tape deck and silver stereo receiver on a wooden shelf against a warm off-white wall; two large white reels with dark green centers, brushed metal knobs, a blue-lit display, and pale mint and silver hardware. To the right, 3 tall rounded-corner poster cards evenly spaced, all using the same cream paper tone, dark forest-green typography, mint-green product styling, and soft studio shadows. First poster: a spherical retro speaker/radio on a pedestal base, pale mint body with a circular front face, small display, and two side knobs, centered under a large bold uppercase headline reading {argument name="headline text 1" default="SOUND, REIMAGINED."}. Second poster: a mint-green vintage oscilloscope-like device with a CRT screen displaying a waveform, silver knobs and switches, and a metal tilt stand, centered under a bold uppercase headline reading {argument name="headline text 2" default="WAVEFORM"}. Third poster: a compact mint-green portable cassette recorder/boombox with handle, front cassette window, buttons, speaker grille, and silver knobs, centered under a bold uppercase headline reading {argument name="headline text 3" default="ANALOG STILL HITS."}. Each poster includes tiny microtype, fake brand marks, and footer icons in a refined Swiss-modern advertising style. Use a restrained palette of dusty blue, cream, sage mint, forest green, silver, black, and warm wood. Add thin horizontal guide lines across the background and small footer text at the bottom reading {argument name="left footer text" default="MJ REFERENCE"} on the left and {argument name="right footer text" default="KREA  //  GPT 2"} on the right. Overall look: premium concept design board, consistent aesthetic translation from analog hi-fi inspiration into three polished product posters, soft lighting, high-end graphic design, minimal clutter, crisp typography, and subtle nostalgic realism.

content: A minimalist fashion moodboard on a pale sage green background, laid out as a wide horizontal comparison sheet with four portrait panels of young male models wearing oversized white sports T-shirts. Use a soft editorial studio look with cool periwinkle-blue backdrops inside the portrait frames, subtle film grain, muted contrast, and a highly consistent color palette of sage green, cyan trim, off-white, deep shadow, and blue-lavender. On the far left, include 1 large cropped reference portrait that is partially cut off by the canvas edge, showing the left side of a dark-skinned male model’s shaved or closely buzzed head, ear, jawline, neck, and shoulder in profile, wearing a white shirt with a bright aqua ribbed collar; place 2 overlapping semi-opaque rectangular blocks over the face area, creating a graphic censorship/collage effect. To the right, place 3 rounded-corner portrait cards in a row, evenly spaced, each featuring a different young male model from the chest up against the same blue studio background: card 1 shows a light- to medium-skinned man with short slicked-back dark hair, facing slightly left, wearing a white athletic shirt with aqua collar trim and a small Nike swoosh on the lower right chest; card 2 shows a light-skinned man with medium dark hair swept back, turned three-quarters left, wearing a white Nike shirt with a black swoosh centered on the chest; card 3 shows a dark-skinned man with a short fade haircut, turned three-quarters right, wearing a white Adidas shirt with a cyan Adidas logo centered on the chest and a small hoop or cross earring. Add 3 face-obscuring gradient rectangles, one over each smaller portrait face, in dark green fading to gray-green, aligned vertically like graphic overlays. Include 2 thin horizontal divider lines across the full composition, one near the top and one near the lower third, in a slightly lighter sage tone. At the bottom, add small uppercase monospaced editorial text: near the lower center-left write "MJ REFERENCE" and near the lower right write "KREA  //  GPT 2". The overall image should feel like a premium AI-fashion comparison board, graphic design presentation, or concept consistency sheet, with clean spacing, flat background, and polished art-direction.

content: A clean editorial fashion concept board on a pale powder-blue background with a minimalist green monochrome palette, combining 4 full-body lifestyle photos of the same youth streetwear tennis-inspired character arranged in a horizontal layout. On the far left, a tall vertical photo panel partially overlaps the background, showing a standing model in an oversized light gray-blue Nike windbreaker, mint green shorts, white crew socks, and white sneakers, holding a white tennis racket at their side and a small mint towel or accessory in the other hand. The character’s head is replaced by a large white doodle coffee-cup face icon with a smiling expression and ruler-like tick marks across the top rim. To the right are 3 rounded-rectangle photo panels, evenly spaced. In panel 1, the model sits in a folding chair reading a magazine and holding a green mug, with a dark Nike duffel bag on the floor and a few scattered cups nearby; the white doodle cup head has 2 steam squiggles rising above it. In panel 2, the model stands beside a pyramid made of approximately 28 stacked green and white paper cups, one arm resting on the top; they wear a soft green Nike T-shirt and shorts set, white socks, and white sneakers; a small white typographic logo in the upper left reads like a cafe or service-court brand mark. The doodle cup head here is a simple smiling cup with a wide rim. In panel 3, the model leans casually with crossed legs, holding a green cup, next to a small wire cart containing green tennis balls and topped with a retro CRT television; they wear a white polo shirt, mint shorts, white socks, and white sneakers. The doodle cup head in this panel has horizontal stripe bands across the top. Keep all faces fully replaced by the graphic cup icons, with no real facial features visible. Use a soft studio setup, flat even lighting, subtle shadows, matte textures, and a highly consistent mint, sage, olive, and white color story. Add thin white horizontal guide lines across the blue background near the top and bottom. Place small gray editorial footer text at the bottom: on the left, “{argument name="left footer text" default="MJ REFERENCE"}”; on the right, “{argument name="right footer text" default="KREA // GPT 2"}”. Overall style: premium streetwear campaign moodboard, playful surreal branding, minimalist graphic design, polished commercial photography, high consistency across all 4 looks.

content: A polished Japanese promotional poster for a community and sustainability project called {argument name="project name" default="セカイムラ"}, designed like a premium eco-lifestyle campaign flyer. Vertical layout, clean and elegant, with a soft cream paper background and a luminous, aspirational mood. The top half is dominated by a giant translucent globe centered in the composition, glowing with warm sunrise light from the upper right. Inside the globe is a breathtaking aerial landscape of a green mountain valley opening to a calm blue bay or lake, with tiny villages and fields below, cinematic and utopian. Over the globe, place a smaller Japanese slogan line reading {argument name="tagline text" default="世界は1つの村になる。"} and beneath it the large main title in bold dark navy Japanese calligraphic lettering: {argument name="main title text" default="セカイムラ"}. Around the globe, create a collage of exactly 8 candid lifestyle photos fading into the edges: 1) top left, two people in conversation outdoors under trees; 2) upper left-mid, several people working together in a rice paddy; 3) left middle, a circle gathering inside a rustic wooden structure at night; 4) lower left, two portrait-style figures in nature; 5) top right, a group sharing a meal at a long table in warm indoor light; 6) right middle, a person tending plants or crops; 7) right lower-mid, a line of people holding hands on a ridge at sunset; 8) lower right, a close portrait of a person eating or holding food. The photographic style should feel human, communal, slightly idealized, with soft depth of field, natural skin tones, golden-hour highlights, and smooth ad-poster compositing. The bottom half contains 3 evenly spaced feature cards on a light cream background, separated by subtle vertical dividers. Card 1 on the left has the heading "セカイムラ 新月会" in dark blue, a circular photo of a nighttime campfire circle, and a short block of Japanese descriptive text below. Card 2 in the center has the heading "セカイムラ 満月会" in warm gold, a circular photo of an indoor evening gathering under string lights, decorative radiating sunburst lines around the circle, and a short block of Japanese descriptive text below. Card 3 on the right has the heading "セカイムラ 米部が今の一押し" in green, small rice plant illustrations near the title, a circular photo of a wooden bowl of white rice, and a short block of Japanese descriptive text below. Under these cards, add a centered Japanese statement line in dark blue: {argument name="footer slogan" default="人・自然・文化がつながり、循環する未来を一緒につくる。"}. Beneath that, place 4 small icon-and-text items in a horizontal row, each with a simple thin-line icon and two-line Japanese label: 1) people icon with "つながる 仲間と出会える"; 2) house icon with "まなぶ 暮らしを学べる"; 3) sprout icon with "つくる 未来を共につくる"; 4) globe icon with "ひろがる 世界にひろげる". At the very bottom center, include a circular logo mark followed by the project name in Japanese, and underneath a website URL: {argument name="website URL" default="www.sekaimura.com"}. Add a small QR code at the bottom right with tiny Japanese text indicating details are on the website. Use a refined palette of deep navy, forest green, gold, cream, and sky blue. Overall style: high-end Japanese nonprofit poster, eco-community branding, inspirational, harmonious, photoreal collage with subtle graphic design elements, balanced typography, soft glows, and magazine-quality print finish.

content:
A cinematic high resolution action portrait of a {argument name="subject" default="young man riding a modern motocross dirt bike"} across {argument name="setting" default="rough rocky terrain during golden hour sunset"}. He is leaning aggressively forward while turning, showing focus and intensity on his face. He has messy windswept dark hair, light stubble, sharp jawline, athletic build, wearing a fitted black compression t shirt, dark cargo pants, black motocross gloves with orange details, and black racing boots with orange accents.
The bike is a sleek matte black and gray off road dirt bike with detailed suspension, rugged knobby tires, visible engine parts, realistic mud splashes, spinning wheels, and dust flying from the rear tire. The rider is captured mid motion with dynamic energy and speed.
Background features a warm desert landscape with distant mountains softly blurred in the horizon. Huge clouds of dust rise behind the bike, illuminated by the sunlight. Sky has a smooth gradient from deep teal blue at the top to glowing orange near the horizon. Strong sunlight creates dramatic rim lighting around the rider and bike, with rich shadows and warm highlights.
Foreground has textured gravel, dirt, scattered stones, motion debris, sharp ground detail. Shot from a low angle for a heroic powerful perspective. Shallow depth of field keeps the rider sharp while background remains creamy and cinematic.

content: A photorealistic Japanese DVD cover styled like a commercial live-action comedy-thriller release, shot vertically with glossy retail packaging design. The cover shows a hospital room interior with soft beige walls, a bed, curtains on the right, and subtle medical fixtures in the background. In the center foreground, 1 seated young Japanese woman in a loose light-blue hospital gown sits on a bed, looking confused and vulnerable. Around her stand 3 young Japanese female medical staff: 2 nurses in pale pink uniforms with matching nurse caps and ID badges, and 1 doctor in a white coat with a stethoscope. Each of the 3 standing women is holding up a smartphone toward the camera, and each phone screen shows the seated woman’s face or body as if her consciousness has been transferred into their devices, creating a body-jack possession theme. The overall tone is playful, absurd, and slightly eerie, like a Japanese idol movie or hospital comedy DVD jacket. Use a polished magazine-quality layout with bold Japanese typography and colorful pop graphics. At the very top, place a small blue publisher logo on the left reading {argument name="studio name" default="DRILL PRESENTS"} with a heart icon, and a blue DVD VIDEO logo on the top right. Across the top center, add a pink Japanese banner line reading "シリーズ最新作！". Below it, make the main title huge, rounded, glossy, and bubbly in pink and blue Japanese text: {argument name="main title" default="ボディジャック"}. Under the title, add a pink subtitle in Japanese: {argument name="subtitle" default="～私のカラダ、乗っ取られました～"}. Add 3 comic-style speech bubbles near the upper characters: one saying "あなたのカラダ、私たちが使わせてもらうわね", one saying "これで私たちの思い通り♡", and 1 yellow startled reaction near the seated woman that reads "?!". On the left spine area, create a white vertical strip with blue and pink Japanese text repeating the title and subtitle, plus a small pink circle label reading "新作". At the bottom center, place a large flashy Japanese catchphrase in mixed pink, blue, white, and yellow outlined lettering: "人気アイドルのカラダと魂をめぐる、ドタバタ病院コメディ！" with small stars and heart doodles around it. On the lower right, add a blue circular burst with yellow and white Japanese text: "笑って、ドキドキ！悪ノリ注意の病院乗っ取り大作戦♡". Along the bottom edge, include exactly 4 small rectangular preview stills from the film, each bordered like DVD scene thumbnails, showing the same hospital characters in slightly different poses; add short Japanese captions on each thumbnail, including lines similar to "計画はバッチリ！", "え…どういうこと…？", "さあ、始めましょうか♡", and "助けて…私のカラダ…！". In the lower left margin include DVD package metadata in black text such as catalog number "DBJ-002", duration "120min.", "COLOR", and price "¥3,980 (税抜)", plus a small blue-and-pink DRILL logo. Bright retail-ready composition, realistic people, commercial Japanese movie jacket aesthetics, slightly campy, high-resolution, clean print design.
title: Japanese Hospital Comedy DVD Cover
description: A glossy photorealistic Japanese DVD jacket featuring a hospital body-swap comedy setup, ideal for generating commercial-style movie cover art.

content: Using the provided reference image, keep the same garden, pond, trees, hillside, and wooden deck viewpoint, but reposition the decorative sign installation so it stands on the wooden deck in the foreground instead of in the water. Enlarge it and center it more prominently in front of the camera while preserving a believable outdoor perspective, natural daylight, and consistent shadows. Keep the installation structure as a 3-column by 3-row set of 9 circular sign panels on slim green stands with the top header sign reading “对着镜子笑一场”. Make the panels look more reflective and mirror-like, showing realistic reflections of the surrounding greenery, while retaining the cute face graphics and Chinese text on the circles. The result should look like a realistic ad mockup/composite photo of the same display placed correctly in the scene.

content: A polished promotional mockup showing 3 tall smartphone screens displayed side by side in a vertical triptych layout, each presenting a modern beauty brand landing page for a lip product. The overall composition is editorial, minimal, and premium, designed like a social media showcase of mobile web designs. The left panel sits on a soft lavender-to-blush gradient background and shows a black-framed phone with a cream and blush beauty website for {argument name="brand name" default="Kosas"}. At the top of this panel, small elegant serif text reads {argument name="left headline" default="Fresh Pout."}. The phone screen features a cropped close-up beauty image at the top, a bold headline reading “Lips in their fullest expression.” with “fullest” in italic serif styling, a rounded dark call-to-action button, a strip of 3 lip close-up thumbnails, 3 labeled benefit tabs reading “Plumps,” “Tingles,” and “Shines,” and a row of 5 shade or effect icons underneath. The middle panel sits on a lavender-to-deep-violet gradient background and shows a second black-framed phone with a more typographic landing page. Above it, serif text reads {argument name="middle headline" default="Claude Code"}. The screen includes a cropped portrait image at top, a very large bold black stacked title reading “LIP PULSE.” with a pink italic script-style line “is here.” beneath it, a rounded dark button, a dark section with the phrase “Lips in their fullest expression.”, and a product grid near the bottom containing 6 shade cards arranged in 2 rows of 3. The right panel sits on a dark navy textured background and shows a third black-framed phone with a pink-forward e-commerce style page. Centered above it, monospaced white text reads {argument name="right headline" default="GPT Images 2.0"}. This screen prominently displays the product hero section with the brand name “Kosas,” a large title “The Lip Pulse,” a pink lip gloss tube angled to the right, small feature icons, a shade strip of 6 lip swatches near the middle, and a lower promotional block with additional pink product imagery. Keep the layout symmetrical with exactly 3 phones, one per panel, each fully visible and vertically oriented. Use high-end cosmetic campaign aesthetics, clean spacing, fashion-web typography mixing serif and bold sans serif, soft pink and cream UI palettes, subtle shadows, and a sleek product-design presentation suitable for showcasing AI-generated mobile website concepts.
title: Three Beauty Mobile Landing Pages

content: A high-end editorial fashion photograph shown as an open large-format hardcover magazine or art book lying flat on a clean off-white surface, viewed from directly above. The two-page spread contains 2 full-page portraits of the same elegant woman with her face obscured by a soft square blur, creating a privacy-censored look. On the left page, she stands against a pale stone or concrete architectural wall wearing a structured long-sleeve dress in {argument name="dress color" default="soft slate gray"}, with a fitted bodice, round neckline, sharply tailored seams, and an exaggerated sculptural bell-shaped skirt; the camera angle is slightly low, making her neck appear long and her posture statuesque. On the right page, she is photographed from the back in a dramatic {argument name="second dress color" default="black"} evening gown with a very deep open back, wide shoulder straps, and a voluminous full skirt, standing in front of a classic paneled wall or door in a dim, moody interior. Use luxury fashion magazine styling, minimal composition, muted tones, soft natural-looking light, refined shadows, realistic paper texture, visible book gutter, slightly curved pages, and crisp print detail. The overall mood is sophisticated, couture, cinematic, and understated, like a premium fashion editorial spread.

content: A slightly surreal but photorealistic portrait of a seated person in a quiet courtyard or patio, centered in frame, wearing a fitted white long-sleeve turtleneck top with delicate pink floral prints and a printed illustration of a girl on the chest, paired with loose cream floral pants. The person sits on a simple white metal chair and holds a small fluffy poodle-like dog in their lap; the dog has curly off-white fur and distinctly dyed orange ears. Perched on top of the person’s dark hair bun is a black crow or raven, facing left, calm and balanced as if it naturally belongs there. The subject’s pose is still, direct, and formal, creating an odd deadpan family-portrait feeling. Set the scene against a textured off-white stucco wall with exactly 4 notable decorative background elements: 1 brown sun-shaped wall ornament in the upper left, 1 small wall-mounted planter shelf with a small bird figurine and trailing flowers on the left, 1 tall arched window or mural on the right showing a bright blue sky with soft white clouds, and 1 white pedestal planter at lower right filled with long green leaves and exactly 2 pink flamingo ornaments. Include a bit of stone edging and dark greenery at lower left and a brown tiled floor. Lighting is soft natural daylight, slightly overcast, with muted colors, shallow depth of field, and a vintage editorial photography look. Composition should be vertical, full seated figure, straight-on, balanced, and quietly uncanny. Customize the main figure as {argument name="person" default="a middle-aged woman"}, the bird as {argument name="bird type" default="black crow"}, the dog breed as {argument name="dog type" default="small poodle mix"}, the dog ear color as {argument name="dog ear color" default="orange"}, and the outfit palette as {argument name="outfit colors" default="white and faded pink florals"}.
title: Surreal Patio Portrait with Crow and Dog
description: This prompt generates a photorealistic, slightly uncanny portrait of a seated person holding a small dog while a black bird perches on their head, ideal for editorial-style surreal photography.

content: A dramatic full-body photo of a woman dancing powerfully in a dark upscale lounge or bar, wearing a sleek black evening dress with a high slit and flowing velvet-like fabric that whips outward with her movement. She has long straight {argument name="hair color" default="black"} hair flying to one side, a slim athletic figure, and small hoop earrings. Capture her in a confident, stylish dance pose with one arm raised gracefully above her head and the other curved downward, torso turned in profile, emphasizing elegance and motion. The setting is dim and cinematic with warm amber practical lights, soft bokeh, and a blurred audience in the background, including a few seated onlookers and a glowing television screen off to the left. The mood is cool, sensual, and high-end, with strong contrast, shallow depth of field, realistic skin, subtle motion in the dress hem, and fashion-editorial lighting. Photorealistic, dynamic nightlife photography, vertical composition.
title: Woman Dancing in Black Dress
description: This prompt generates a cinematic photorealistic nightlife portrait of a woman in a flowing black dress dancing elegantly in a dim lounge, ideal for fashion, performance, or social media visuals.

Keep the app UI recognizable on the phone display, but place it in a realistic lifestyle context: a vineyard worker in the foreground holding a smartphone that shows the app, with vineyard rows, mountains, and a few workers in the background under natural daylight. Design the full page as a Spanish-language magazine cover with a refined agricultural-business aesthetic in green, cream, and earthy tones. Add a large masthead at the top reading “REVISTA CAMPO FUTURO”, a thin top strapline with 3 items separated by vertical bars: “Especial Viñas de Chile”, “Innovación agrícola”, and “Abril 2026”, plus a subtitle line beneath the masthead: “Agricultura, innovación y gestión rural”. On the left, add a green section tag reading “TECNOLOGÍA AGRÍCOLA” and a bold stacked main cover headline: “La app con IA que está revolucionando el campo”, followed by a short deck about Kimün replacing the traditional notebook and giving real-time control to vineyards and agricultural businesses. Add a circular callout badge mentioning a special feature about Kimün as an intelligent field notebook with AI. Include 2 bottom teaser photos: one close-up of the worker holding the phone in the vineyard with page label “p.18” and a caption about field diagnosis and cellphone alerts, and one small group scene with 3 people reviewing the app together with page label “p.24” and a caption about connected field teams, voice, records, and instant costs. On the right column, add 3 article teasers with icons and page numbers: one about the end of paper and the new era of the intelligent field notebook (p.30), one about more efficient vineyards through better data-driven decisions (p.36), and one about water management 4.0 and smarter, more profitable irrigation (p.42). Add a footer strip with 5 category labels: “AGRICULTURA”, “FRUTALES”, “VIÑAS”, “GANADERÍA”, “SUSTENTABILIDAD”, plus a barcode and a small price. Make it look like a polished real magazine cover photo shoot and editorial layout, not a flat app screenshot.
title: Agritech magazine cover from app screenshot
description: This prompt turns a mobile app screenshot into a realistic Spanish-language agricultural magazine cover, useful for product marketing, launch visuals, and editorial-style mockups.

content: A realistic editorial product photo of a glossy magazine lying diagonally on a warm medium-brown wooden table, viewed from above at a slight angle. The magazine dominates the frame and has a deep cobalt-blue cover with a large elegant serif masthead reading {argument name="magazine title" default="Convergence"} across the top. On the left side of the cover, a huge stacked white sans-serif headline reads {argument name="cover headline" default="CHATGPT IMAGES 2.0"}. The main cover image is a highly detailed green chameleon in close-up profile facing left, wearing a tan cowboy hat with a brown leather band and metal stud, creating a surreal but polished magazine-cover concept. Add small editorial cover lines in white text beneath and along the bottom, arranged in neat columns like a technology or design magazine, with tiny issue details in the upper right including a price and date. The magazine should look physically printed, with visible page thickness, subtle edge wear, and realistic reflections on the glossy cover. Surrounding environment: soft leafy shadows fall across the tabletop from the upper left, a clear faceted drinking glass is partially visible on the right edge, an orange-red plate peeks in from the top right corner, a pale yellow sticky note in the lower right reads {argument name="sticky note text" default="SOTA"} in handwritten uppercase letters, and a hint of a green houseplant appears in the upper left. Use warm natural afternoon sunlight, cinematic shadows, crisp focus, and photorealistic materials for a premium lifestyle desk scene.
title: Magazine Cover on Desk with Cowboy Chameleon
description: This prompt generates a photorealistic lifestyle shot of a tech magazine on a wooden desk, ideal for editorial mockups, AI feature announcements, or magazine-cover concept art.

content: Create a glossy, hyper-saturated social media ad poster for a futuristic beauty product launch, designed like a Canva marketing graphic. The composition is a single widescreen promotional banner centered on a cyan-to-purple gradient background, with rounded corners and a vivid neon pink color palette. Inside the banner, show a young woman from the chest up in a glowing sci-fi tunnel made of concentric pink and white light rings. Her face is obscured by a soft square blur block, but her hair is styled in two small buns, and she wears hoop earrings, layered chain necklaces, a metallic silver top, and an iridescent pink holographic jacket. She extends one hand toward the camera holding a clear lip balm tube close to the lens, creating strong foreground perspective. The tube label reads “GLOW MODE Lip Balm.” At the top center, large neon headline text reads “GLOW MODE” with a script subtitle “Lip Balm,” and below it a smaller line reads “JUICY SHINE. HYDRATING CARE. ZERO STICKINESS.” In the upper left corner, add a handwritten neon note reading “NEW!” In the upper right corner, place an orange rounded sticker with white text reading “gpt-image-2,” plus a small orange pointer tab beneath it. On the right side of the banner, include 2 circular callout badges: a pink starburst badge that says “ONLY $14.99” and a black glowing circular badge that says “VIRAL ON TikTok 2M+ views.” At the lower right, show 2 product display elements: one upright open lip balm tube with wand applicator beside it, and one whole sliced peach plus one cut mango half with green leaves, all sitting on a glossy reflective surface with pink light swirls. Along the lower center, add 3 feature icons with labels: a droplet icon labeled “HYALURONIC HYDRATION,” a fruit icon labeled “PEACH MANGO SCENT,” and a bunny icon labeled “100% VEGAN & CRUELTY-FREE.” In the lower left inside the banner, add a vertical stack of 3 social buttons with platform icons and handles: TikTok with “#GlowMode,” Instagram with “@LunaBeatty,” and Snapchat with “@LunaGlow.” Beneath them place 1 glowing QR code card, and next to it handwritten script text reading “Shop Now!” with an arrow pointing toward the QR code. Outside the banner at the bottom left, place a tilted teal rounded label reading “Canva AI,” with a small teal paper-plane style accent nearby. Add glossy reflections, lens flares, bloom, neon rim lighting, sparkles, and polished ad-design styling throughout, with crisp commercial product photography mixed with futuristic graphic design.
title: Neon Lip Balm Launch Ad
description: A vibrant futuristic beauty advertisement poster for a glowing lip balm, ideal for social media campaigns, product launches, and editable Canva-style promo designs.

content: A polished Apple-style macOS promotional desktop mockup shown as a full-screen screenshot, with a soft pastel dawn wallpaper of layered purple-blue rolling hills under a pale peach and lavender sky. Centered near the top is a large minimalist headline reading "macOS" with the subheadline "Redesigned." and a smaller line below that says "More clarity. More focus. More you." The top system menu bar is visible across the full width: Apple logo, Finder, File, Edit, View, Go, Window, Help on the left; Wi‑Fi, battery, search, colorful user icon, and the date/time "Mon Jun 10  9:41 AM" on the right. On the left side, stack 4 translucent rounded widgets vertically: a weather widget for "Sonoma, CA" showing "65°", "Sunny", high/low "H:72°  L:55°", and 6 hourly temperatures from 10 AM to 3 PM; an "Up Next" widget with 2 calendar items, "Design Review" and "Lunch with Sophie" with times; a "Focus" widget showing "Do Not Disturb" and "On Until 10:00 AM"; and a "Notes" widget with the note "Website redesign" and time "3:30 PM". In the middle-left foreground, place a Finder window with rounded corners and a light frosted interface, titled "iCloud Drive". Include a left sidebar with 10 items total: Favorites with 6 items "AirDrop", "Recents", "Applications", "Desktop", "Documents", "Downloads"; iCloud with 2 items "iCloud Drive" and "Shared"; and Locations with 1 item "Macintosh HD". In the main Finder area show 8 file items arranged in a grid: 4 folders on the top row labeled "Work", "Personal", "Projects", "Presentations", and 4 documents on the bottom row labeled "Brand Guidelines.pdf", "Project Brief.docx", "Research.png", "Moodboard.key". Add standard macOS traffic-light window buttons and small view/search controls in the title bar. On the right side, overlap a Mail app window with a three-column layout. The left mail list column is titled "Inbox" and shows "1237 messages" plus 5 visible senders/messages: "Antonio Manriquez" with subject "Design updates", "Jenny Court" with "Re: Team lunch", "Heather Lee" with "Q3 Planning", "Nisha Kumar" with "Re: Feedback", and "Simon Pickford" with "Offsite ideas". The reading pane shows the selected message from Antonio Manriquez to You with subject "Design updates" and body text about attached mockups for a new feature, plus a file attachment card labeled "Mockups.zip" and "12.4 MB". Use clean SF Pro-style typography, subtle shadows, translucent glassmorphism panels, soft ambient lighting, and a premium Apple keynote aesthetic. At the bottom center, include a glossy translucent macOS Dock with 15 icons: Finder, Launchpad, Safari, Messages, Mail, Calendar showing "JUN 10", Photos, Notes, Reminders, TV, Music, News, App Store, Settings, and Trash. Composition should feel balanced, airy, realistic, and highly refined, like an official Apple macOS redesign announcement image.

content: A premium e-commerce poster for fresh blueberries in a clean Chinese product-advertising style. Show a clear plastic clamshell box of blueberries as the main subject, placed diagonally from lower center to right side on folded blue fabric, viewed from a slightly elevated angle. The package must remain realistic and consistent: a transparent square container with rounded corners, filled with dark blue blueberries, with a large irregular rounded label on top in white, pale blue, and deep blue, featuring one oversized blueberry illustration in the center and elegant Chinese branding. Make the fruit inside look larger, plumper, fresher, and covered with subtle moisture droplets, while keeping the overall blueberry arrangement believable. The background is an airy icy-blue tabletop with soft cloudy texture, cool daylight, and scattered loose blueberries around the package. Add a few blurred green leaves entering from the top right and bottom right edges for a fresh natural feeling. In the upper-right corner, include 1 small inset image showing the original product package from above on a warm brown surface, like a reference thumbnail. On the left side, create Chinese promotional typography with a large dark blue calligraphy headline {argument name="headline text" default="决茗新"}, followed by 2 smaller lines of copy: {argument name="subheadline text" default="新鲜蓝莓 自然之选"} and {argument name="tagline text" default="每一颗都是自然的礼物"}. Below that, place 3 vertically stacked feature icons with short Chinese captions: a leaf icon for natural ripeness, a fruit icon for juicy fullness, and a heart icon for rich nutrition. Near the bottom left, add large white brush-style Chinese text {argument name="product name" default="蓝莓"}, a secondary line {argument name="benefit text" default="膳食纤维+花青素"}, and a small net weight line reading 125克. Use cool blue color grading, crisp commercial lighting, sparkling highlights on the plastic lid, premium supermarket packaging aesthetics, high detail, realistic product photography blended with polished graphic design.
title: Premium Blueberry Product Poster
description: This prompt generates a polished Chinese-style e-commerce advertisement for packaged blueberries, suitable for supermarket branding, product listings, and promotional posters.

content: A realistic editorial-style photograph of {argument name="public figure" default="Elon Musk"} standing at a scholar’s writing desk in a traditional Chinese study, leaning forward and writing Chinese calligraphy with a brush on a long horizontal white scroll. He wears a dark navy blazer over a black shirt, with a wristwatch visible, and his expression is focused and serious. The room is warm and elegant, with wooden bookshelves filled with books in the background, several rolled scrolls standing upright near the shelf, a carved wooden chair, a traditional lattice window on the left letting in soft natural daylight, and a hanging ink landscape painting on the wall. On the desk are 4 distinct calligraphy tools and materials: 1 rectangular black ink stone with ink, 1 brush rest area, 1 long wooden paperweight, and 1 large sheet or scroll of paper covered with bold black Chinese characters from the poem {argument name="calligraphy text" default="《满江红》"}. The composition is a medium full-body indoor shot from the front-left angle, with the brush touching the paper, shallow depth of field, rich wood tones, subtle cinematic contrast, documentary realism, high detail, authentic Chinese literati atmosphere, and carefully rendered ink brush lettering.
title: Musk Writing Chinese Calligraphy
description: A realistic cultural portrait of a well-known figure practicing Chinese brush calligraphy in a traditional study, suitable for editorial, social media, or concept-image generation.

content: A photorealistic Japanese izakaya advertisement poster in a warm, cinematic night-time mood, designed like a street-front restaurant flyer. The composition is vertical and densely layered. On the right side, a young Japanese woman with long straight dark brown to black hair, wearing a fitted black ribbed turtleneck sweater, stands from the waist up and holds a large frosty glass mug of golden highball with visible ice cubes in her right hand near chest level. Her pose is relaxed and inviting, looking toward the camera, with a soft nightlife ambiance. The background is a narrow traditional izakaya exterior or interior alley scene filled with warm orange lantern light, shallow depth of field, hanging wooden menu plaques with handwritten Japanese calligraphy, and a nostalgic bustling-after-work atmosphere. In the upper left, a large weathered dark wooden signboard dominates the design, with bold white brushstroke kanji reading 蓮華食堂, small hiragana above it reading れんげしょくどう, and a red brush-painted banner beneath reading 大衆居酒屋. Below that on the left-center, place a large cream-colored paper or painted panel featuring the drink special in oversized calligraphic typography: ハイボール above a huge red 198円, with small black（税込） beside the price, the numerals painted in energetic brush style. Along the far right edge, add vertical white Japanese text reading 今日も一日、おかれさまです。 Near the lower right over the woman’s torso, place a red circular stamp-like badge with white handwritten text arranged diagonally and vertically: 旨い！安い！居心地◎. Across the bottom foreground, show exactly 4 plated menu items lined up side by side on rustic ceramic dishes: 1) two glazed grilled chicken skewers with char marks, labeled 焼き鳥 盛り合わせ and priced 580円; 2) a sashimi assortment with slices of tuna, salmon, white fish, shiso leaves and wasabi, labeled お刺身 盛り合わせ and priced 780円; 3) a plate of fried chicken karaage pieces with a lemon wedge, labeled 若鶏の唐揚げ and priced 480円; 4) sliced rolled dashi omelet topped with chopped green onion and served with grated daikon, labeled 出汁巻き玉子 and priced 380円. At the bottom left, include a glowing red paper lantern graphic with black vertical text 居酒屋. Across the bottom center on a dark band, add large bold white brush lettering reading でかい！うまい！安い！ and below it smaller white text reading みんなの憩いの場、蓮華食堂へようこそ！ Add a decorative red lotus-like emblem near the top sign and another matching emblem in the bottom right corner. Use rich amber highlights, strong contrast, glossy food styling, realistic skin and drink textures, commercial poster polish, and a nostalgic Showa-inspired izakaya promotion aesthetic.
title: Japanese Izakaya Highball Poster
description: This generates a photorealistic Japanese izakaya promotional poster featuring a woman holding a highball, bold pricing text, and four featured dishes for restaurant advertising or nightlife-themed visuals.

content: Create a glossy Chinese co-branded beverage poster advertisement in a bold commercial style, vertical 4:5 composition, with a dramatic split-color background: bright saturated red on the left and vivid royal blue on the right, blended at the center with radiant streaks, motion lines, glow effects, and high-energy product-launch lighting. At the top, place 2 brand logo areas separated by a white multiplication sign: on the upper left, a snowman mascot logo with Chinese text {argument name="left brand name" default="蜜雪冰城"} and smaller subtitle text "始于1997冰淇淋与茶"; on the upper right, the deer logo and wordmark {argument name="right brand name" default="luckin coffee"} with smaller Chinese subtitle "专业咖啡新鲜式". Centered beneath the logos, add a huge Chinese headline in thick 3D extruded display typography with white faces, colored edging, heavy shadows, and a glossy embossed look, reading {argument name="headline text" default="蜜雪冰城 × 瑞幸咖啡"}, with the left half accented red and the right half accented blue. Below it, add a second slogan line in bold Chinese text, split by brand color, reading "冰爽甜蜜，咖啡加倍", flanked by short horizontal white dashes. Under that, place a rounded capsule banner in red-to-blue gradient containing the Chinese text "双品牌联名主打・人气招牌同框". In the center foreground, show 2 hero products: on the left, 1 vanilla soft-serve ice cream in a waffle cone, tall swirl, creamy white, slightly glossy, wrapped in a bright red cone sleeve printed with the snowman mascot and Chinese branding; on the right, 1 large clear plastic cup of iced latte or coffee with visible ice cubes, caramel-brown liquid marbling into milk, condensation droplets on the cup, a transparent lid, the blue deer logo, the wordmark "luckin coffee", and small Chinese subtitle text. Surround the cup with dynamic coffee splash arcs and exactly 3 flying coffee beans. Around the lower foreground, add scattered translucent ice cubes and white milk splashes to emphasize cold freshness. Include exactly 2 comic-style promotional burst badges: a red circular badge on the left reading "联名新品" and a blue circular badge on the right reading "限时热卖". In the bottom left corner, add 1 cute 3D snowman mascot character wearing a red cape and holding a tiny ice cream cone, smiling and winking. At the bottom center, place a large red-and-blue beveled ribbon banner with bold white Chinese text reading "今夏限定 立即尝鲜", ending with a yellow lightning bolt icon on the right. Along the very bottom edge, place 3 small selling-point items separated by vertical dividers: a snowflake icon with "冰爽甜蜜", a coffee bean icon with "咖啡加倍", and a heart icon with "双倍满足". Use premium e-commerce poster rendering, ultra-clean product retouching, glossy highlights, rich contrast, crisp Chinese typography, depth, reflections, splash effects, and an energetic summer limited-edition campaign aesthetic.

content:
Design a modern, high-end {argument name="app type" default="fitness app"} landing page and product UI for a brand called {argument name="brand name" default="PulseFit"}.

Create a clean web design mockup that looks like a real SaaS fitness platform and mobile companion app. The design should feel premium, motivating, and easy to use, with a polished UI/UX style similar to top-tier health and wellness apps.

Include:
- A hero section with bold headline, short subheadline, strong call-to-action button, and app preview
- Dashboard UI showing daily activity, calories burned, workout streak, heart rate, step count, and progress rings
- Workout program cards for strength, cardio, mobility, and recovery
- Nutrition tracking section with macro breakdown and water intake
- Progress charts and analytics widgets
- Trainer/community section with profile cards and testimonials
- Pricing section and download/app store callout
- Mobile app screens shown alongside the web design for a cohesive product ecosystem

Style direction:
- Sleek, minimal, modern interface
- Premium fitness brand aesthetic
- Smooth spacing, strong hierarchy, rounded cards, soft shadows
- Dark mode UI with energetic accent colors like electric blue, neon green, or vibrant orange
- Crisp typography, realistic charts, polished buttons, beautiful onboarding feel
- Highly detailed, dribbble-worthy, startup-quality product design
- Realistic UX case study presentation, not a cartoon or illustration

Composition:
- Full website homepage mockup
- Multiple UI sections visible in one polished presentation
- Slight perspective or straight-on product showcase
- Clean background with subtle gradients and professional lighting
- Ultra-detailed, sharp text rendering, visually balanced layout

Output:
A stunning, realistic UI/UX design concept for a fitness app website and dashboard that looks ready for development.

Make it look like a real Figma product design presentation for a premium startup.
title: Fitness SaaS Landing Page UI
description: A massive, detailed prompt for generating a complete web and mobile UI/UX design for a premium fitness brand, including dashboards and various interface sections.

content: A candid, photorealistic vertical photo of a woman seated at a rustic wooden table in an elegant upscale bar-cafe interior. She is centered in the foreground, leaning forward with one elbow on the table and her hand supporting her chin, giving a relaxed, intimate, editorial lifestyle feel. She has long, dark brown wavy hair parted near the middle, falling over both shoulders, and wears a fitted white ribbed long-sleeve scoop-neck top. On the table in front of her are exactly 3 visible objects: 1 peach-colored cocktail in a wide coupe glass on the left, 1 blue-and-white floral ceramic mug in the center-right, and 1 small clear glass bottle vase holding sparse dried stems on the far right. Behind her is a warmly lit, sophisticated bar with marble or stone finishes, ornate classical ceiling details, shelves of liquor bottles and glassware, glowing backbar lighting, and a bartender in a white shirt and dark apron working in soft focus. Include dark bar stools along the counter and a rich amber, cream, and brown color palette. Use shallow depth of field, soft natural indoor light mixed with warm bar lighting, realistic skin and fabric texture, subtle filmic tones, high-detail luxury hospitality photography, shot at eye level with a smartphone or portrait lens, vertical composition, cozy Parisian cafe meets hotel bar atmosphere.
title: Woman at Elegant Bar Cafe Table

content: Create a polished Japanese promotional website hero banner for an AI creator community, in a clean modern tech-advertising style with a soft pastel blue, lavender, pink, and white palette. Wide 16:9 composition. On the left, place a gradient triangular abstract logo and the Japanese brand name {argument name="brand name" default="AIクリエイターズ・スタジオ"} at the top, followed by a thin horizontal divider line with a small sparkle in the middle. Below that, a very large bold Japanese headline in 2 lines: first line in dark navy, 「AIで、もっと自由に」, second line in large gradient letters from cyan to purple to pink, 「創る・学ぶ・つながる」. Under the headline, add a short Japanese subheadline with sparkle marks, 「AIを使ったクリエイティブの可能性を広げるメンバーシップコミュニティ」. On the right half, create a collage of 6 rounded-rectangle visual cards showing AI-generated creative examples: 1 large dreamy portrait of a woman in profile surrounded by flowers and butterflies in ethereal purple light, 1 small cyberpunk city nightscape with a lone figure, 1 small close-up portrait of a fluffy cat, 1 small luxury cosmetic bottle labeled “AI STUDIO”, 1 small bright seascape or flower-field landscape with a woman in white, and 1 large tablet drawing device on a desk with a stylus, plus a coffee mug and plant nearby. Add a circular gradient badge overlapping the right side with bold white Japanese text {argument name="badge text" default="一緒に創造の未来をつくろう！"}. Across the lower middle, place a translucent white rounded feature panel containing exactly 5 equal columns with thin separators and pastel line icons. Each column has an icon, a bold Japanese title, and a smaller 2-line description. The 5 titles are: 「限定コンテンツ」, 「実践プロンプト＆テンプレート」, 「メンバー限定コミュニティ」, 「最新情報をいち早くお届け」, 「メンバー限定特典」. Use fitting icons for book, monitor, chat bubble, light bulb, and gift. Add concise Japanese descriptions beneath each title. At the very bottom, add a dark navy footer strip with a large Japanese call-to-action sentence in white and pink-purple gradient accent text, {argument name="footer text" default="AIを味方に、あなたの『創りたい』をカタチに。さあ、一緒に創ろう！"}. Overall look: premium startup landing page, glossy soft lighting, subtle sparkles, glassmorphism panels, clean typography, Japanese text rendered accurately, highly legible, visually balanced, professional social media thumbnail quality.

content: A sleek Chinese social-media style screenshot on a dark charcoal black interface, minimalist and premium, with a large rounded rectangular image card placed in the lower left-center and a small rounded chat bubble in the upper right. The overall canvas is mostly empty dark space, giving a clean tech presentation feel. At the top left of the main area, show one line of bold white Chinese text reading: “换成小米汽车，我做一张更像发布会级别的整车爆炸分解图。” In the upper right, include a single gray rounded speech bubble with white Chinese text: “小米汽车的产品拆解图”. Below, display one featured poster-like infographic card with rounded corners and a glossy black background. Inside that card, create a highly polished exploded-view automotive product presentation for a turquoise {argument name="car model" default="Xiaomi SU7"} electric sedan, shown in dramatic three-quarter front view, with the car body separated into many components suspended around the chassis. The hood is open, trunk lid lifted, four side doors detached and floating outward, front bumper and fascia separated, headlights isolated, interior exposed, and major mechanical and structural modules arranged neatly in layers beneath and around the body. The visual style should resemble a premium launch-event keynote slide: cinematic studio lighting, realistic reflections, sharp detail, dark background, subtle blue highlights, and precise technical composition. In the upper left of the infographic card, place large white Chinese title text in three lines: “小米汽车 SU7”, “产品拆解图”, “科技跨越，人车合一”. Add an orange square Xiaomi-style logo in the upper right corner of the card. Surround the car with 14 Chinese callout labels connected by thin white leader lines, identifying visible parts and systems. On the left side, include 6 labels for features such as integrated closed front fascia, LED headlights, front trunk design, high-voltage battery, front motor assembly, front double-wishbone suspension, and Brembo four-piston brake caliper. On the right side, include 8 labels for features such as electric tailgate, through-type taillight, frameless doors, hidden door handles, rear motor assembly, rear motor specs, all-aluminum alloy chassis, five-link rear suspension, and Michelin performance tires. Beneath the exploded car body, clearly show the battery pack, front and rear drive units, suspension subframes, wheel assemblies, braking components, front and rear seats, center console parts, underbody panels, and structural floor elements, all separated and floating in a carefully organized exploded arrangement. At the bottom of the infographic card, add a horizontal information strip divided into 5 columns of small Chinese specification text with headings for vehicle dimensions, power performance, range, intelligent driving, and safety structure. In the lower left of the card, place a bold white Chinese label “编辑”. In the lower center, include a circular down-arrow icon, and in the lower right, a share/export icon. The composition should look like a real screenshot from a Chinese AI chat app showcasing an automatically generated high-end car teardown infographic, with modern UI spacing, crisp typography, and a luxurious black-and-cyan color palette.

content: A dramatic Japanese food advertisement poster for a premium pork rice bowl, vertical composition, black and fiery orange background with glowing embers, smoke, and a high-contrast gourmet marketing look. The main focus is an oversized bowl of butadon in the lower center, filled with white rice and topped with many thick slices of glossy grilled pork belly, richly lacquered with dark sweet soy glaze, visible char marks, caramelized edges, and a stream of sauce pouring down from above onto the meat. Make the food look hyper-appetizing, juicy, rich, and slightly exaggerated like a restaurant flyer. Large bold brushed gold Japanese headline text dominates the upper left: {argument name="headline text" default="帯広の肉厚豚丼"}. Across the middle, a gold paint-stroke banner contains black Japanese text: {argument name="subheadline text" default="極上の炭火焼き。極上のタレ。"}. On the right side, add a cute anime girl mascot standing behind the bowl, about half-body visible, wearing a black-and-white cow-themed hoodie with small horns, long blonde hair, frilly sleeves, and a shy delighted pose with one hand near her mouth; keep her face intentionally obscured by a plain beige rectangle censor block. Add vertical white Japanese copy along the right edge in 2 separate text groups: 1 at the upper right, 1 larger at the mid-to-lower right. Add a small handwritten-style white note near the girl with a tiny heart. In the lower left, include a dark circular callout badge with gold rim and white/yellow Japanese text about charcoal grilling and flavor. Along the very bottom, place 3 circular ingredient-feature icons with exact labels beneath them: raw pork slices labeled {argument name="feature label 1" default="肉厚!"}, glowing charcoal embers labeled {argument name="feature label 2" default="炭火焼き!"}, and glossy dark sauce labeled {argument name="feature label 3" default="極上ダレ!"}. At the bottom right, add a huge energetic gold brush-calligraphy slogan with splattered paint effects, plus a smaller white sentence beneath it. Use intense lighting, glossy highlights, premium yakiniku flyer aesthetics, dense Japanese typography, bold brush fonts, and a mouthwatering late-night food terror vibe.
title: Fiery Butadon Japanese Ad Poster

content: A refined Chinese ink-painting style portrait on aged parchment, composed like a classical literati hanging scroll with muted sepia, tan, charcoal, and faded indigo tones. In the center stands a scholarly male figure in flowing dark blue-black Hanfu robes with intricate gold-patterned trim and wide cream inner sleeves, posed front-facing with a dignified stance. His face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular blurred block, while his hair is dark, wavy, and neatly styled. He holds a stitched traditional-style book against his chest with a vertical cover inscription that includes the large Latin letters "XAI" and 4 Chinese text columns beneath it. His other hand rests on an ornate armillary sphere set on a carved pedestal at the lower left. Behind him is a monumental shanshui landscape of 1 mountain range, layered mist, rocky peaks, and drifting clouds, rendered with fine brushwork in an old master style. In the upper right sky area, place 1 bold modern "XAI" logo with the stylized emblem above the letters, and to the far right include 1 slender rocket launching upward beside a launch tower, with smoke billowing into the clouds, blending futuristic aerospace imagery into the classical scene. On the upper left, add 1 vertical column group of Chinese calligraphy title text in black ink, plus 1 smaller vertical signature line and 2 red seal stamps beneath it. The overall effect should fuse ancient Chinese scholar portraiture with space-age technology and AI symbolism, highly detailed, elegant, balanced, and slightly satirical, with the texture of antique paper and the composition of a museum-quality scroll painting.
title: Classical Chinese Scholar with XAI Motif
description: This prompt generates a faux-ancient Chinese scroll painting that blends a robed scholar portrait with XAI branding, a rocket launch, and scholarly scientific symbolism.

content:
A refined sepia-toned illustration in the style of an ancient Chinese scholarly portrait fused with modern AI branding, on aged parchment paper with visible grain and ink-wash texture. Centered is a half-body portrait of a curly-haired male scholar inspired by Democritus, seated behind a wooden desk and wearing layered traditional robes in muted blue-gray and brown with intricate trim. His face is intentionally obscured by a flat rectangular block in a brown skin-tone color, creating an anonymized or redacted look. He holds 1 calligraphy brush upright in his right hand, while his left hand rests on the table. In the upper center-right, place the Claude logo with a rust-orange sunburst emblem and the word “Claude” in dark serif lettering. On the upper left, add a large vertical title in Chinese, “德米斯圖”, with 1 vertical column of smaller Chinese calligraphy text beside it reading: “以語言為媒，理解為舟，助人洞見，推動協作，造福人類，安全可信，通往更美好的未來。” Add a smaller vertical signature line on the far left reading “甲辰春寫” with 2 red seal stamps below it. The background shows a classical Chinese landscape painting with distant mountains, a small pavilion on a cliff, mist, and dense bamboo leaves framing the upper right and right edge, plus dark pine branches on the lower left.

The wooden desk fills the lower third and contains exactly 8 distinct object groups: 1 brush pot holding 4 brushes on the left, 1 stack of 4 stitched books with Chinese titles on the spines reading “人工智慧概論”, “機器學習原理”, “負責任的 AI”, and “對齊與價值觀”, 1 ink stone or ink dish near the center-left, 1 central parchment diagram sheet, 1 small dark cube seal near the bottom left with Chinese characters on two visible faces, 1 framed placard on the right, 1 rolled scroll at the bottom right, and 1 tabletop surface with visible wood grain. The central parchment diagram should show a circular node labeled “AI 安全 Safety” connected to 6 surrounding nodes labeled “準確”, “可靠”, “有益”, “透明”, “對齊”, and “隱私”, with delicate cloud motifs around the diagram. The framed placard on the right should read “AI 安全原則” as a header and list 4 bullet points in Chinese: “減少災難性風險”, “尊重人類價值觀”, “確保系統可控”, and “促進長遠福祉”. The rolled scroll at the bottom right should display the phrase “以謹慎之心 創造未來”.

Use a balanced composition, scholarly calm mood, highly detailed ink linework, subtle watercolor shading, antique museum-print aesthetics, and a restrained palette of parchment tan, ink brown, faded blue, and muted charcoal. The overall feeling should be an intellectual tribute poster blending classical East Asian literati painting, philosophical portraiture, and contemporary AI safety themes.
title: Ancient Scholar AI Safety Poster
description: This generates a parchment-style classical Chinese scholar poster with Claude branding and AI safety symbolism, suitable for editorial art, concept posters, or cultural-tech visual essays.

content: A sepia-toned ancient Chinese scroll painting reimagined as a visionary propaganda-style scene. In the center stands a scholarly robed figure styled like an imperial sage or philosopher, wearing flowing blue-gray hanfu with ornate trim, addressing a crowd of exactly 8 followers seen mostly from behind in the foreground. The sage’s face is intentionally obscured by a plain rectangular blur, and 3 members of the crowd also have blurred rectangular faces. The central figure raises one hand in a teaching gesture and holds a glowing geometric polyhedron crystal in the other hand. Behind him is a monumental hanging banner or framed plaque displaying the Google DeepMind logo and the words “Google DeepMind.” The background is a richly detailed traditional shanshui landscape with layered mountains, mist, trees, rocky formations, and a pagoda temple on the right. Along the upper right side, include vertical Chinese calligraphy text headed by “德米斯願景圖,” followed by several elegant columns of classical-style writing, plus a smaller vertical signature line and 2 red seal stamps. Use aged paper texture, muted brown ink, faded mineral pigments, fine linework, and the composition of a historic Chinese hanging scroll or literati painting, but with subtle anachronistic modern-AI symbolism. The overall mood is solemn, mythic, intellectual, and satirical, blending traditional East Asian art with corporate AI iconography.
title: Ancient Scroll Google DeepMind Vision
description: This prompt generates a faux-classical Chinese scroll painting that satirically portrays Google DeepMind as a philosophical vision in an ancient mythic setting.

content: A realistic full-body portrait photo of a young Japanese woman styled as {argument name="character name" default="Miko-chan"}, sitting on the floor indoors against a plain light beige wall. She has a soft shoulder-length bob haircut in {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"}, slightly tousled, with a natural casual look. She wears a modern cheerleader outfit in {argument name="outfit colors" default="blue, white, and red"}: a sleeveless cropped V-neck top with striped trim and bold text reading {argument name="jersey text" default="AITuber OnAir"} across the chest, plus a short pleated cheer skirt with matching color-block panels. She also wears white ankle socks and white athletic sneakers. Her pose is shy and demure, seated with both knees bent, one leg extended closer toward the camera and the other folded inward, hands clasped together between her thighs, shoulders slightly drawn in. Soft natural window light enters from the left, creating faint diagonal shadows on the floor and lower wall.
