content: A photorealistic overhead three-quarter view of a folded financial newspaper on a dark wooden desk, styled like a prestigious American business daily from the 1980s–2000s, with crisp realistic newsprint texture, subtle paper wrinkles, slightly worn folded edges, and warm morning sunlight casting diagonal window-shadow bands across the page. The masthead dominates the top in large classic serif capitals reading {argument name="newspaper name" default="THE WALL STREET DAILY."}. Directly beneath it is a thin header strip with small financial-paper details: "DOW JONES", "News Corp", the date line "MONDAY, APRIL 20, 2026 – VOL. CCLXXXV NO. 90", "WSJ.com", a star rating row, and the price "$5.00". The main lead story spans the upper center-left with a huge bold serif headline reading {argument name="main headline" default="Cook to Step Down as Apple CEO; Ternus Named Successor"}. Below it is a smaller serif subheadline: "Transition caps 15-year run; company pivots to AI-driven future". Add a byline line in small caps with 2 reporters: "By Tim Higgins" and "And Joanna Stern". Fill the lead article with dense, fully legible multi-column newspaper body text about Tim Cook stepping down as Apple chief executive, John Ternus succeeding him, Apple's growth, AI strategy, and corporate transition; the text should read like authentic financial journalism, not placeholder gibberish. On the right half of the lead story, place a black-and-white engraved stipple portrait of a male executive in collared shirt and jacket, centered in a rectangular image area; the face is partially obscured by a pale gray square censor block over the eyes and upper nose, creating a modern satirical effect. At the top-right, include a sidebar box titled "What’s New" with exactly 2 subsection headers, "Business & Finance" and "World-Wide", each followed by bullet-point briefs in small serif text; include exactly 3 bullets under "Business & Finance" and exactly 4 bullets under "World-Wide", all fully typeset and legible. Beneath the main story, add a secondary banner article across the page titled "Silicon Valley Braces for New Chapter in AI Arms Race" with a byline "By Liz Hoffman" and several short columns of text about big tech, startups, OpenAI, Google, Meta, chips, platforms, and AI competition. To the right of this lower-middle section, insert a compact markets table titled "Markets" with exactly 4 rows labeled "DOW JONES", "S&P 500", "NASDAQ", and "10-YR. TREASURY", with columns for index/value/change/percent and realistic numeric values in tight newspaper tabular formatting. Along the bottom strip of the front page, include exactly 3 teaser boxes: left box with section label "Heard on the Street" and headline "Why Investors Are Rethinking Big Tech" plus page marker "B12"; center box with section label "Markets" and headline "Earnings Season Lifts Stocks Despite Rate Uncertainty" plus page marker "B1"; right box with section label "Inside" and headline "Private Credit Sees Inflow Surge as Yields Stay High" plus page marker "B14". Make all typography clean, sharp, perfectly legible, and consistently aligned in authentic newspaper grid layout with thin rules between columns, justified text, classic serif fonts, and realistic print contrast. The newspaper sits slightly rotated clockwise on the desk. In the environment, show a white ceramic coffee cup filled with black coffee in the top-right corner and a pair of dark-framed eyeglasses resting near the lower-right edge of the paper. In the top-left corner, include the cropped edge of a dark cylindrical object, likely a camera lens or tumbler. Overall mood: premium editorial mock front page, serious business-news aesthetic, believable print photography, ultra-detailed, natural shadows, high resolution.

content: A realistic corporate office photo of a young man seated indoors, holding up a printed research paper toward the camera with both hands. His face is fully obscured by a solid rectangular censor block in a medium tan color. He has short dark brown hair and wears a plain dark charcoal crewneck sweater. The paper is a white letter-size document in portrait orientation, clearly visible and centered in front of his torso. The document title reads “DFlash: A High-Speed, Low-Latency, and High-Endurance Flash Memory Technology for Next-Generation Storage Systems”. Below it are the author lines “DFlash Research Team” and “DFlash Inc.” The page shows 4 visible text sections: “Abstract”, “1. Introduction”, “2. DFlash Technology Overview”, and “2.1 Dual Charge-Trapping Architecture”, set in a formal academic paper layout with dense black serif text. In the background, place a softly blurred modern office lobby with warm ambient lighting, beige walls, glass partitions, a sofa, indoor plants, and the black OpenAI logo and wordmark mounted on the wall at upper left. The composition is a medium shot, straight-on, with the subject slightly right of center so the OpenAI logo remains visible. Shallow depth of field, soft natural office lighting, polished photorealistic style, subtle warm color grading, high detail in the hands, paper, sweater texture, and interior environment. Keep the overall image clean, believable, and like a candid press or announcement photo. Use {argument name="document title" default="DFlash: A High-Speed, Low-Latency, and High-Endurance Flash Memory Technology for Next-Generation Storage Systems"} for the paper title, {argument name="company logo text" default="OpenAI"} for the wall branding, {argument name="sweater color" default="dark charcoal"} for the subject’s clothing, and {argument name="censor block color" default="medium tan"} for the face covering.
title: Censored Research Paper Office Portrait
description: This prompt generates a photorealistic office announcement-style portrait of a man holding a technical paper in front of visible company branding, useful for tech news, parody announcements, or corporate editorial imagery.

content: Using the provided reference image of the udon meal, turn it into a clean, print-ready Japanese restaurant promotional poster while keeping the food photo itself as the main hero image. Expand the composition vertically into a portrait flyer layout, add a light icy-blue seasonal background with subtle watercolor texture and faint wave motifs, and overlay decorative green maple leaves for an early-summer feel. Add 5 text elements in Japanese: a blue circular badge at the upper left reading "初夏のおすすめ", a large bold brush-calligraphy headline across the top in 2 lines reading "とり天" and "ざるうどん", a small red vertical seal near the headline reading "自慢のとり天", a tall translucent blue vertical copy block at the upper right reading "ひんやり、つるり。さっぱり、満たされる。", and a price block at the lower right reading "980円 税込" with a blue brushstroke banner below that says "大盛り無料！". Add a short 4-line Japanese body copy paragraph at the lower left describing the dish in a menu-poster style. Preserve the original meal arrangement and realistic photography, but enhance it slightly for advertising: brighter, more appetizing, crisp, and high contrast. Make the overall design look like a polished restaurant poster created from a casual food photo.
title: Turn Food Photo Into Japanese Poster
description: This prompt converts a reference meal photo into a polished Japanese restaurant advertisement poster, useful for menu promos and social media food marketing.

content: A luxurious tourism poster for {argument name="destination" default="Malaysia"}, designed as a vertical fine-art travel advertisement on a clean ivory-white textured background with subtle embossed ornamental patterns. The composition is built around one long flowing red-and-gold batik silk ribbon that sweeps diagonally and spirals through the page, forming an elegant S-curve and visually containing a dreamlike collage of landmarks, culture, and nature. At the top left, warm golden sunrise light pours over misty tropical mountains and rainforest with a waterfall, dense palms, and a large rhinoceros hornbill perched beside hibiscus flowers and white tropical blossoms. In the upper center, a detailed Kuala Lumpur skyline rises from mist, dominated by the Petronas Twin Towers, with the KL Tower and several modern skyscrapers visible. Near the upper right floats 1 colorful traditional wau kite with floral patterns against open white space. In the middle left, include 1 grand mosque with multiple domes and minarets set among palms and haze. In the middle center-right, include the historic Sultan Abdul Samad Building with its copper domes and clocktower. In the lower middle left, include 1 elevated red-and-silver urban train crossing through the city. In the lower center, show 1 ornate Chinatown gate labeled Jalan Petaling, decorated with red lanterns and bustling pedestrians. In the lower right-middle, depict the Batu Caves area with 1 towering golden Murugan statue and 1 steep rainbow staircase climbing into limestone cliffs, surrounded by crowds. At the lower right, nestle 1 landscaped city park with a turquoise lake and fountains. Purple orchids and tropical flowers are woven into the ribbon and foreground in several places. At the very bottom right, show 1 small traditional dancer in red and gold attire twirling the trailing end of the ribbon. The collage should feel luminous, hyper-detailed, majestic, and celebratory, blending photorealistic architecture with painterly fantasy travel-poster styling, soft clouds, atmospheric haze, and glowing highlights. Add elegant poster typography in the lower left: the main headline reads {argument name="headline text" default="VISIT MALAYSIA 2026"}, a smaller location line reads {argument name="location text" default="KUALA LUMPUR"}, a blue script tourism slogan reads {argument name="tagline" default="Malaysia Truly Asia"}, and below that a small refined subheading reads {argument name="subheading" default="Where Diversity Converges\nKuala Lumpur, City of Wonders\nThe Heart of Asia"}. Use a premium color palette of gold, crimson, ivory, emerald, sky blue, and tropical greens, with polished editorial composition and high-end destination-branding aesthetics.
title: Visit Malaysia 2026 Travel Poster
description: A premium vertical tourism poster showcasing Malaysia’s landmarks, culture, and tropical beauty, ideal for destination marketing and campaign visuals.

content: A hyper-detailed French popular science magazine cover in the style of a bold mainstream newsstand publication, full-page vertical layout, dramatic glossy print design, black background with intense neon lighting and saturated red, blue, purple, green, and orange highlights. At the very top, a wide red masthead bar with the magazine title {argument name="magazine title" default="SCIENCE & VIE"} in huge white serif capital letters with subtle beveling and metallic shine; small issue details on the upper right in tiny white text. On the upper left, a bright yellow and black special tag reading {argument name="special tag" default="SPÉCIAL PHOTONIQUE"} with a red arrow motif. The main headline dominates most of the upper half in gigantic white block capitals with a red glow and slight 3D shadow: {argument name="main headline" default="LA PHOTONIQUE RÉVOLUTIONNE TOUT !"}. Beneath it, 3 short cover lines in smaller white text with selected words highlighted in yellow, discussing ultrafast light-speed chips, a French record computer called Lucy, and light trapped for millions of cycles for energy-efficient AI. Centerpiece image: a futuristic square photonic processor chip floating in space at a slight perspective tilt, extremely detailed circuitry, metallic screws at the corners, glowing traces, and a bright cyan-blue core display labeled {argument name="chip name" default="Lucy"}; the chip emits intersecting beams and flowing fiber-optic light trails in electric blue, magenta, orange, and violet that radiate outward across the page. Background behind the chip shows 2 luminous server-wall corridors, red on the left and green on the right, fading into darkness, suggesting a high-tech datacenter. At the bottom, the curved horizon of Earth from space with a soft blue atmospheric glow and scattered city lights. Add 4 side callout boxes total: 2 stacked on the left and 2 stacked on the right, each with yellow headers and white body text, using a magazine cover typography hierarchy. Left box 1 header: "EXCLUSIF", featuring Lucy as the most powerful French photonic quantum computer in the world, with several short bullet lines and a yellow emphasis on "12 qubits". Left box 2 header: "RECORD MONDIAL", about light trapped for millions of cycles in a chip, with yellow emphasis on "millions de cycles". Right box 1 header area in yellow, with a bold red percentage "+300 %" and text about the French gem Soitec rising thanks to photonic AI and saving datacenters during the energy crisis. Right box 2 header: "ENQUÊTE", about the end of power-hungry GPUs, with yellow-highlighted numeric claims such as 100 times cheaper and 1,000 times faster. Near the lower center, tiny white image-credit text. A thick black bottom banner spans the page with a red square containing a white plus symbol on the left, and a large dossier teaser in white and red text: {argument name="bottom feature text" default="DOSSIER COMPLET Photonique & IA : les 10 avancées qui vont transformer votre quotidien"}. Along the very bottom, add 3 small circular red icon blurbs with short white captions about seismic optical fibers, a new generation of LiDAR and AR, and European sovereignty in progress. Lower right corner includes a white barcode box and a short block of white text about the issue being on sale. Overall look: sensational, prestigious, futuristic, glossy, information-dense, sharp editorial typography, dramatic science-news cover, cinematic lighting, high contrast, photorealistic 3D chip illustration mixed with premium magazine graphic design.
title: Futuristic Photonics Magazine Cover
description: This prompt generates a dramatic French-style science magazine cover centered on a glowing photonic chip, ideal for editorial mockups, tech news covers, and speculative science publication designs.

content: Create a dramatic vertical food advertisement on a pure black background, styled like a premium ingredient breakdown poster for a hearty Chinese chicken mushroom vermicelli stew. Use a clean top-to-bottom exploded composition with floating ingredients suspended in midair above the finished dish, each group clearly separated and lit with glossy commercial food-photography lighting. At the top, show a cluster of mixed brown shiitake and other savory mushrooms. Below that, show 2 grouped aromatics: a pile of red goji berries and a small bundle of green scallions with 2 thick ginger slices. Below that, show 2 grouped main items: several raw chopped bone-in chicken pieces with skin on, and 1 bundled nest of dry vermicelli noodles. Below that, show 2 grouped vegetables: peeled potato cubes and thick carrot slices. Beneath them, place 1 transparent glass bowl filled with rich golden chicken broth, with 4 shiitake mushrooms visible on the surface, tiny herb bits, a few floating oil droplets, and faint steam. At the bottom, place 1 dark brown ceramic casserole pot with side handles containing the finished stew: chicken pieces, shiitake mushrooms, translucent vermicelli, potato chunks, carrot slices, scattered goji berries, chopped green onion garnish, and glossy golden broth. Add drifting droplets, crumbs, and tiny garnish particles between layers to emphasize motion and richness. Include subtle steam rising from the final stew and 1 bright star-like sparkle highlight on the right rim of the casserole. Surround the ingredient groups with 7 bilingual callouts in Chinese and English, each with a thin curved arrow pointing to the relevant item. The 7 labels are: "榛蘑&香菇 / Hazel Mushrooms & Shiitake", "鲜美菌菇 / Savory Mushrooms", "枸杞&葱姜 / Goji Berries & Aromatics", "鸡肉&粉条 / Chicken & Vermicelli", "土豆&胡萝卜 / Potatoes & Carrots", "浓郁鸡汤 / Rich Chicken Broth", and "成品 / Finished Stew". Add 1 extra bilingual text note near the vegetables or middle area reading "丰富食材 / Rich Ingredients". Make the image hyper-realistic, appetizing, high contrast, razor sharp, with cinematic highlights, deep shadows, premium packaging-ad aesthetics, and a balanced centered layout optimized for a poster or social media ad.
title: Exploded Chicken Mushroom Stew Ad
description: A high-contrast vertical food poster showing an exploded ingredient layout and bilingual labels for a rich chicken, mushroom, potato, carrot, and vermicelli stew.

content:
Create a dramatic Japanese mobile game advertisement poster for a zombie survival RPG in anime-meets-cinematic style. Vertical smartphone poster layout, dense promotional design, gritty urban apocalypse background at dusk with ruined city streets, smoke, sparks, debris, damaged buildings, neon signs, and a crowd of zombies advancing from behind. In the center, a young anime woman sits on the ground in a slightly slouched pose, legs bent, holding a black handgun upright in one hand. She has straight dark brown to black shoulder-length hair, pale skin, and an oversized dirty white T-shirt splattered with blood. Large bold Japanese calligraphy is printed vertically on the shirt: "働きたくね〜". Her expression area is simple and unobtrusive so the composition emphasizes the shirt, weapon, and mood. Surround her with multiple zombies in torn clothing, reaching forward from the left and right background.

Use an aggressive game key-art design with 8 clearly separated promotional sections. Section 1: top-left game logo block, count 3 text elements, with large distressed English title "Dead or work", smaller Japanese subtitle "ゾンビサバイバルRPG", and heavy black paint-splatter background with white and red text. Section 2: right-side vertical slogan area, count 2 text elements, with white Japanese text "動かない、ただ" above giant red vertical text "生き残れ。" on a rough black brushstroke strip. Section 3: left-middle feature list panel, count 4 feature rows, each row with a white icon in a black square and yellow/white Japanese copy; labels are "ゾンビを倒して生き延びろ", "拠点を強化・カスタマイズ", "仲間と協力プレイ", and "デイリーミッションで報酬GET". Section 4: right-middle bonus campaign panel, count 1 headline plus 3 reward items; headline in a bright jagged yellow burst says "今すぐ始めると 豪華特典プレゼント!" and beneath it are three item boxes labeled "ゴールド ×5000", "レア武器 (7日間)", and "サバイバルキット ×10". Section 5: lower-middle gameplay screenshot strip, count 4 thumbnails with captions; captions are "リアルタイムバトル!", "基地を自由にカスタム!", "仲間とレイドボスに挑め!", and "広大なオープンワールド!". Section 6: bottom call-to-action banner, count 2 text elements, with a huge yellow-and-red Japanese phrase "今すぐダウンロード!" and smaller white/red subtext "あなたの選択が、生死を分ける。". Section 7: bottom-right store badges, count 2 badges, showing App Store and Google Play style download buttons. Section 8: bottom-right QR area, count 1 QR code in a white square.

Overall aesthetic: hyper-detailed, high-contrast, grimy, intense, commercially polished gacha/mobile game ad, combining anime character art with realistic zombie horror background. Use bold distressed typography, black brush textures, red warning colors, yellow promotional highlights, metallic UI framing, and cinematic orange-gray lighting.

In the top-right panel, show an energetic outdoor ad with 4 children running under a blue sky, bold Japanese headline text, teal and yellow graphic accents, and a yellow circular callout. In the bottom-left panel, show a modern kindergarten campus building with a grassy yard and children playing, with a large white speech-bubble-shaped text area on the left and muted green-beige abstract shapes. In the bottom-right panel, show an illustrated large green tree with children and parents underneath, sky-blue background, warm family-friendly Japanese copy, and soft rounded decorative shapes. Add 1 small gray circular overlay button labeled 「編集」 at the lower-left corner of this preview and 1 small semi-transparent circular upload/share icon at the lower-right corner. Under this first preview, include 4 small interface icons in a row: copy, thumbs up, thumbs down, and more options. Lower on the screen, show the second right-aligned light-gray chat bubble with this Japanese text: 「日本語の健康食品の広告画像を、トンマナ違いで4種類並べて画像生成して。プロデザイナーが作ったトレンドのデザインで。アスペクト比は16:9」. Beneath it is a second rounded rectangular generated image preview showing a 2x2 grid of health food advertisement variations. In the top-left panel, show a clean wellness ad in white and pale green with a woman touching her neck, Japanese headline text about inner balance, several circular benefit icons, and price text. In the top-right panel, show a dramatic black-and-gold supplement ad with a dark pouch package, glowing gold particles, luxury serif-style Japanese text, and a bold red-orange price tag reading 980円. In the bottom-left panel, show a soft pink beauty supplement ad with translucent floral or crystalline textures, pastel packaging, delicate Japanese copy, circular info badges, and feminine cosmetic styling. In the bottom-right panel, show a natural green juice ad with a tall glass of green smoothie, fresh vegetables in the background, a green-and-white product box, clean Japanese health copy, and a circular yellow callout. Add 1 small gray circular overlay button labeled 「編集」 at the lower-left of this second preview and 1 small semi-transparent circular upload/share icon at the lower-right. The overall image should feel like a realistic smartphone app screenshot of an AI image-generation chat, with generous spacing between the 2 conversations, rounded corners, crisp Japanese typography, and a premium contemporary UI.

The top navigation bar includes a small house logo at far left, the company name in Japanese, 5 navigation links across the top, and 1 rounded white contact button on the right. The hero area is split visually into 2 major zones: on the left, a green textured panel with layered organic leaf patterns, small introductory copy, a large white Japanese headline in multiple lines, a short paragraph of smaller Japanese body text, and 1 white rounded CTA button; on the right, a warm natural-light photo of exactly 2 people seated across a wooden table in discussion, with papers and a small architectural house model visible, indoor plants and window light in the background. The entire website card has soft shadows, premium editorial spacing, and rounded bottom corners. Along the bottom of the website mockup, include a narrow light-gray notice bar showing exactly 1 announcement item with a small green tag, a date, Japanese notice text, and a subtle link on the right. Add a semi-transparent gray circular badge overlapping the bottom-left corner of the website card containing the Japanese text 「編集」. In the bottom-right corner of the website card, add a small circular share/upload icon. content: A whimsical, photorealistic product-style food photograph of 8 ice cream cones lined up in a straight row on a matte black rectangular stand, each scoop designed to look like a different planet of the solar system. The scene is shot at eye level with a shallow depth of field and creamy urban bokeh in the background, suggesting an outdoor city street or café setting in soft daylight. From left to right, show exactly 8 cones: a gray speckled Mercury scoop, a yellow-brown swirling Venus scoop, a blue-and-green Earth scoop with white cloud patterns and a small blue drip, a deep red Mars scoop with darker marbling and red melted drips, a striped Jupiter scoop with its Great Red Spot visible, a pale tan Saturn scoop with a thin ring encircling it, a light icy blue Uranus scoop with a blue drip, and a vivid cobalt-blue Neptune scoop with glossy texture and blue dripping melt. Use crisp waffle cones, realistic melting details, glossy frozen surfaces, careful studio-quality lighting, and a centered symmetrical composition. Keep the planets highly recognizable but rendered as believable ice cream, with the black stand spanning the width of the frame and the background softly blurred.

On the center-right, {argument name="main dish" default="a bowl of steaming white rice topped with a raw egg yolk and soy sauce being poured over it"} sits in a vertically striped ceramic bowl. To the right, a small white dish contains exactly 3 slices of pickles (one green cucumber, one orange carrot, one white radish), alongside a blurred wooden miso soup bowl. The lighting is warm, appetizing, and professional, highlighting the glossy texture of the rice and egg.

content: A photorealistic amateur photograph of a custom building block set resting on a light wood grain table in a living room. In the background stands a large product box with a red logo reading "{argument name="brand name" default="BRICKLY"} BUILDING SETS". The box features text reading "8+", "540 PCS", "5 FIGURES", and the main large title "{argument name="set title" default="WATTERSON FAMILY HOUSE"}". A red circular badge on the box reads "CUSTOM SET FAN DESIGN", and the box art depicts the house and characters under a blue sky. In the foreground sits the fully assembled block model of a {argument name="house color" default="blue"} two-story suburban house with a brown roof, white porch, red steps, a white picket fence, and a blocky green tree. To the left of the house is a built block model of a {argument name="car color" default="pink"} station wagon. Standing in a row in front of the house are exactly 5 custom block minifigures: a blue cat in tan pants, an orange fish with legs, a tall pink rabbit in a white shirt and tie, a blue cat in a white shirt, and a small pink rabbit in an orange dress. The background is a slightly blurred living room with a grey sofa and white blinds.

content: A luxurious cosmetic product advertisement featuring a single elegant glass jar with a shiny gold lid resting on a round, light-colored marble slab. The jar has gold text reading {argument name="brand name" default="LUMIÉRE"} and {argument name="product type" default="MOISTURE RICH CREAM"} with "AGING CARE*" below it. The background consists of soft, draped, shimmering champagne-colored silk fabric with delicate white flowers on the left. The lighting is warm, ethereal, and sun-drenched with soft bokeh. At the top center, elegant dark brown Japanese typography reads {argument name="main headline" default="肌に、静かな贅沢を。"} above a small decorative gold divider and the text {argument name="subheadline" default="高保湿×エイジングケア*"}. To the right of the jar, a thin gold circle contains Japanese text meaning 'With dense moisture, high-quality firmness and radiance'. At the bottom center is a dark rectangular call-to-action button with a thin gold border containing the text {argument name="button text" default="詳しく見る"} and a right-pointing chevron. In the bottom right corner, tiny fine print contains Japanese text meaning '*Care according to age'.

content: A realistic 3D mockup of a softcover book standing upright at a slight angle on a plain off-white background, revealing both the front cover and the spine. The cover features a minimalist, serene illustration of a white arched doorway opening to a bright pastel sunrise over a calm sea, with a woman in a flowing white dress standing in the archway looking toward the horizon. Large, elegant vertical Japanese text in a Mincho serif font dominates the right and left sides of the arch, reading {argument name="main title" default="我慢をやめたら、人生が動き出した。"}. In the top left corner, smaller horizontal text reads {argument name="subtitle" default="自分の人生を取り戻す 7つのステップ"}. The bottom third of the book is wrapped in a light pink belly band. The band features a prominent horizontal catchphrase reading {argument name="obi catchphrase" default="もう、他人軸で生きなくていい。"}, with smaller text above it separated by a dotted line mentioning work, relationships, love, and future anxiety. On the right side of the band is a white circular badge with a small crown icon and text reading {argument name="sales badge text" default="累計 20万部 突破!"}. At the very bottom of the band are exactly 4 small rectangular boxes containing keywords about self-esteem, time management, mental organization, and ideal future, followed by the text "Everything will change!". The spine is white and displays the main title, subtitle, a placeholder for the author's name, and a placeholder for the publisher.
title: Japanese Self-Help Book Cover Mockup
description: Generates a realistic 3D mockup of a Japanese self-help book with customizable title, subtitle, and promotional belly band text.

content: A realistic over-the-shoulder shot of a person with dark hair wearing a grey shirt, sitting at a desk and looking at a large computer monitor while holding a black smartphone. On the desk in the bottom left corner is a {argument name="drink on desk" default="white mug filled with black coffee"}. The monitor displays a split-screen social media interface. The left column has the header "{argument name="left column header" default="English Post"}" with blurred-out feed items below it. The right column is in sharp focus with the header "{argument name="right column header" default="中文文案"}". Below this right header are 2 distinct social media posts: the top post features an avatar, pseudo-Chinese text, {argument name="first post image" default="a landscape photo of a mountain lake"}, and a heart icon with "2.5K"; the bottom post features an avatar, pseudo-Chinese text, {argument name="second post image" default="a photo of dumplings on a plate"}, and a heart icon with "1.8K". The person is holding the smartphone in their left hand and tapping the screen with their right index finger. The phone screen displays the exact same mountain lake social media post seen on the monitor. The image has a shallow depth of field, blurring the left side of the screen to emphasize the right column and the phone.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 as a wireframe layout, generate a polished, professional corporate web banner ad for an AI sales tool. Use a clean blue, white, and orange color palette. Transform the sketched character into a photorealistic image of 2 smiling Japanese business professionals (a man and a woman in suits) looking at a silver laptop in a bright office. In the top left, add a logo for {argument name="brand name" default="KAWAISALES"} with a small tagline 'AIを活用した新しい営業支援ツール'. Map the wireframe's text bubbles as follows: replace the top bubble with a white oval containing the blue text {argument name="main copy" default="その営業、AIで「飛躍」しませんか？"}; replace the middle bubble with {argument name="sub copy" default="リード獲得からクロージングまでAIがあなたの営業活動を強力サポート！"}. Replace the bottom CTA box with a bright orange pill-shaped button reading {argument name="cta text" default="今すぐ 無料デモを体験する >"}. In the lower-right center, add a blue 3D-style bar chart with an upward arrow, accompanied by a target icon showing 3 user silhouettes and a white UI card with 4 checkmarked bullet points. Finally, add a white panel in the bottom left containing exactly 3 blue line-art icons (a clock, a rising chart, and a laptop) with short captions below each.
title: Wireframe to Corporate Web Banner
description: Transforms a rough hand-drawn wireframe into a polished, professional web banner ad with photorealistic subjects, vector graphics, and customizable Japanese copy.

content:
Reproduce the layout of this handwritten rough (attached image) and generate an advertisement image with the following requirements.

# Title/Project
- A new sales support tool using AI: "{argument name="tool name" default="KAWAISALES"}"

# Purpose
- To gain free demo sign-ups

# Target
- Sales representatives of small and medium-sized enterprises struggling with sales performance

# Content
## Main Copy
- Why not let your sales "take flight" with AI?
## Sub-copy
- AI strongly supports your sales activities from lead acquisition to closing!
## CTA
- Experience the free demo now! ## Eye-catch 1
- A photorealistic stylish male and female sales representative in their 30s in suits, smiling while having an online business meeting with a customer on a laptop.
## Eye-catch 2
- Abstract illustrations or shapes symbolizing service benefits, such as a rising graph or icons indicating target customers.

# Impression
- Trustworthy, innovative, productive, easy to use

description: A professional advertisement generation prompt that uses a handwritten layout as a reference to create a modern sales tool promotional image.

content: A photorealistic scene of a massive metallic rocket hovering horizontally at a very low altitude over a {argument name="setting" default="residential neighborhood with palm trees"}. The side of the silver spacecraft clearly displays the text {argument name="company name" default="SPACEX"}. Bright orange flames and thick smoke erupt from the rear engines. The foreground features a dark concrete rooftop, while the background shows small multi-story buildings nestled among tropical vegetation under hazy {argument name="lighting" default="sunset"} lighting, creating a surreal juxtaposition of advanced aerospace technology and everyday life.

content: A bright, summery commercial product photography shot featuring a refreshing beverage on a weathered wooden table. In the sharp foreground, there is 1 tall glass filled with a golden, bubbly iced drink garnished with 1 lemon slice and a sprig of rosemary, sitting next to 1 silver aluminum can covered in cold condensation. The can prominently displays the English text {argument name="product name" default="TOKYO HIGHBALL"} below a small gold star logo, featuring a graphic of the drink itself and the Japanese text "アルコール分 7%" near the bottom. To the right of the can, 2 cut lemon wedges rest on the table. In the softly blurred background, a sunny beach scene unfolds with sparkling turquoise water and a clear blue sky. Standing to the left in the background is 1 young woman with long brown hair, wearing a white sleeveless top and a light blue skirt, looking out toward the ocean. Floating elegantly in the sky above the scene is the Japanese text {argument name="catchphrase" default="夏、これがいい。"}. The overall lighting is radiant and inviting, with sparkling bokeh and lens flares emphasizing the crisp, cold, and refreshing atmosphere of a perfect summer day.

content: Using REFERENCE_0 as the base style and preserving the central chicken illustration, transform the image into a product packaging label for a herbal soup mix. Shift the chicken to the right side. Replace the top text with a large, bold black brush-stroke headline {argument name="main headline" default="元气祛湿 鸡煲汤包"} and a smaller subtitle {argument name="subtitle" default="吃山林土货 味道当然好!"}. On the left side, add a new woven basket containing exactly 6 distinct piles of ingredients: woody root sticks, white square cubes, round sliced brown roots, yellow soybeans, dried orange peel strips, and dark red dates. Attach 6 small brown rectangular labels with white text to these ingredients. Below the chicken, add a circular orange badge containing the text {argument name="ingredients list" default="内含有:五指毛桃、茯苓、土茯苓、黄豆、陈皮、红枣"}. At the bottom, create a solid orange rectangular banner featuring a cooking pot icon, the text {argument name="usage instructions" default="用法:把汤料清洗干净放入锅中，加入姜片煮20分钟，后加入鸡肉再煮20分钟即可。"}, and a secondary slogan {argument name="bottom slogan" default="天然好料 滋补好汤"}.

content: A photorealistic, highly detailed image of a {argument name="car description" default="blue Alpine A110 R sports car with a black hood"} parked in the foreground inside a large, spacious aircraft hangar. Directly behind the car is a {argument name="airplane description" default="white Airbus A320 commercial airplane"} with "AIRBUS A320" painted on its fuselage and a blue tail. The car features black alloy wheels and a front license plate reading "{argument name="license plate text" default="A110 R"}". The hangar has a smooth, glossy concrete floor that clearly reflects both vehicles. On the left wall, a large sign reads "{argument name="hangar sign text" default="HANGAR 05 MAINTENANCE"}". The massive hangar doors are open in the background, revealing a bright, cloudy sky and a distant tarmac. Cinematic lighting, sharp focus, automotive photography style.

content: A highly detailed, photorealistic commercial poster. In the center, 1 large {argument name="central food item" default="Zongzi (sticky rice dumpling wrapped in glossy green bamboo leaves and tied securely with twine)"} floating magically in mid-air. The background features traditional Chinese red wooden double doors with rows of golden studs and 2 ornate golden lion-head door knockers, slightly out of focus. Floating around the center are various ingredients: on the bottom left, 1 halved salted duck egg with a rich, oozing orange yolk; on the bottom right, 1 small square wooden tray overflowing with dark red beans, and 1 whole, translucent orange salted egg yolk floating nearby. Several small red beans and glowing embers are suspended in the air. Above the central item, large, stylized golden calligraphy text reading "{argument name="top greeting text" default="端午安康"}" formed from magical, swirling golden smoke rising upward. At the very bottom, bold, metallic golden serif text reading "{argument name="bottom promotional text" default="满99减20"}". Cinematic lighting, rich red and gold color palette, festive and magical atmosphere, high-end food photography style.

content: A commercial food photography poster for a {argument name="burger type" default="shrimp burger"}. The central burger features a glossy brioche bun, lettuce, white sauce, spicy orange mayo, two grilled shrimp, and a thick crispy breaded patty. A blurred glass of iced cola and a faint {argument name="brand name" default="LOTTERIA"} logo appear in the dark background. The parchment bears a circular "SHRIMP BURGER" stamp. Top left Korean text reads {argument name="top left text" default="탱글한 통새우살이 입안 가득"}. The large central headline is {argument name="main headline" default="통새우 크런KIM버거"} with a small orange shrimp illustration. Below it is the subtitle {argument name="subtitle text" default="매콤바삭, 육즙가득! 올봄, 새우버거의 기준이 바뀐다!"}. The bottom left corner shows the {argument name="brand name" default="LOTTERIA"} logo. On the left wall, a dark sign displays the text {argument name="wall sign text" default="流体可視化実験 (煙による流れの観察) 車両周りの空気の流れを煙を用いて可視化しています。"} alongside 'F3 WIND TUNNEL TEST'. In the bottom right foreground, a black box labeled {argument name="box label" default="スモークジェネレータ"} sits next to a computer monitor showing a live feed of the car and the telemetry text {argument name="monitor text" default="風速: 50 m/s ヨー角: 0 deg 煙: ON"}. Dramatic, realistic engineering photography.

content: A cinematic product photography shot of an elegant, rectangular glass perfume bottle with a faceted crystal cap and gold accents, sitting in the center of a shallowly flooded ancient stone temple corridor. The bottle features a minimalist square label with a delicate flower logo and the text {argument name="brand name" default="AURÉLIA"} above "EAU DE PARFUM". The setting is ethereal and hazy, bathed in warm, golden volumetric lighting that creates glowing reflections on the rippled water surface. In the background, classical ruins emerge from the water: a fallen stone head on the left and a headless draped statue on the right. At the bottom of the image, elegant typography overlays the scene, featuring the large serif text {argument name="brand name" default="AURÉLIA"}, followed by "EAU DE PARFUM", a matching flower logo, and the tagline {argument name="tagline" default="ETERNAL. RADIANT. UNFORGETTABLE."} in a clean, spaced-out font.

content: An aerial drone photograph of a sprawling, lush green university campus on a sunny day. In the foreground, a wide multi-lane road with cars passes through a large concrete entrance gate bearing the large white text "{argument name="university name" default="ODTÜ METÜ"}". To the right of the gate, two tall flagpoles fly a {argument name="flag 1" default="Turkish flag"} and a {argument name="flag 2" default="white flag with a red circular logo"}. The midground features a long rectangular reflecting pool surrounded by green lawns and pedestrian paths, flanked by various modernist concrete academic buildings. Notable structures include a cylindrical building with red and white horizontal stripes on the left and a large pyramid-shaped building on the right. In the background, a dense city skyline representing {argument name="city skyline" default="Ankara"} stretches across the horizon, featuring a prominent tall observation tower, backed by rolling hills and mountains under a clear blue sky with scattered white clouds.

The right fighter is a younger man with dark wavy hair, wearing a black boxing glove featuring the OpenAI logo and text. ALL CHAOS."}" in red. In the center, large bold typography reads "MIKE TYSON" in red, "★ VS ★" in red, and "SAM ALTMAN" in large cream-white letters. Below this, text reads "{argument name="middle tagline" default="THE BRAWN. THE BRAIN. THE FUTURE."}". The very bottom footer reads "PRESENTED BY NETFLIX | TESLA | OPENAI".
